Name: Üstün Mikromobilite
Description: Enerji verimliliği ve tasarrufu çağımızın bacasız santralleridir. Bir yenilenebilir enerji kaynağı olarak görülmektedir. Bu kapsamda, şehir içi ulaşımda hem enerji tüketimi az hem karbon ayak izi düşük mikromobilite araçları günbegün değer kazanmaktadır. Bu araçların daha verimli olması için ise bakıma bakım içinde uzman bir servise ihtiyacı vardır. Üstün Mobilite Teknik Servis bu amaçla kurulmuştur. Elektrikli araç kullanıcılarının ihtiyaç duyduğu ve güvenebileceği bir servis olma yolunda deneme yanılma ile değil teknik analiz ve ölçümler ile arıza gidermek temel görevimizdir.

Name: Minute
Description:
رحلاتكم داخلية وخارجية : لأعمالكم أو لقضاء حاجاتكم أو حتى لنزهتكم 
لخدمة جميع فئات المجتمع داخل مناطق مملكتنا العظيمة.

Name: Partner Turizm
Description:
Partner Turizm, personel taşımacılığı sektörüne yeni bir soluk getirmek amacıyla, farklı sektörlerde kazandıkları deneyim ve uzmanlıkla bir araya gelen iki kurucu ortak tarafından kuruldu. Kurucularımız, sektördeki müşteri iletişimi, operasyonel sürdürülebilirlik ve kriz yönetimi gibi kritik konularda fark yaratma hedefiyle yola çıktı.
Şirketimizin odak noktası, müşteri memnuniyetini en üst seviyede tutarken, olası kriz durumlarına karşı hızlı ve etkili çözümler üreterek hizmetlerimizin kesintisiz devamlılığını sağlamaktır. Partner Turizm olarak, kriz yönetimini stratejik bir avantaj olarak görüyor ve bu alandaki güçlü yaklaşımımızla müşterilerimize her zaman güvenli ve sorunsuz bir hizmet sunuyoruz.
Gelecek vizyonumuz, özmal yatırımlar ve teknolojik yeniliklerle güçlendirilmiş, entegre bir online personel taşımacılığı sistemi kurarak İstanbul’da en büyük filoya sahip ilk 10 firma arasına girmek ve güçlü finansal yapımızla ülke genelinde şubeleşmektir.

Name: Şoför.co
Description: Şoför.co, 2023 yılı itibariyle verdiği kendi aracınızla saatlik özel şoför hizmeti, uzun yolculuklarda özel şoför hizmeti, araç muayene hizmetleri, araç servis ve expertiz hizmetleri, özel transfer hizmetleri, özel etkinlikler vale hizmeti, havalimanı transferi ve daha fazlası ile profesyonellerden oluşan saha ekibi ile İstanbul ve çevresinde 7/24 hizmet sağlamaktadır.

Name: NANCO Group
Description: Alnakhlah Rent car company started operating in 1969 with strategic aspiration to achieve leadership in car rental sector

Name: Keolis Downer
Description:
Keolis is a leading operator and integrator of public transport in Australia, enabling over 100 million passenger journeys each year. With more than 3,500 employees across five states and our head office in Melbourne, we deliver safe, reliable, and sustainable mobility solutions that connect communities and enhance everyday journeys.

We’ve been part of Australia’s public transport landscape for over 15 years. Today, our services include:

*   Gold Coast: Light rail network (G:link)
*   Newcastle: Integrated transport network (light rail, bus, ferry)
*   Across NSW, WA, SA, QLD: operation of more than 1,300 buses
*   Adelaide: Customer service and maintenance for Metro train services

As part of the global Keolis Group, we bring local knowledge and world class expertise to deliver innovative transport solutions in partnership with public transport authorities.

Name: Keolis Downer
Description:
Keolis Downer is a leading public transport operator and a committed partner to public transport authorities in Australia. Together, we deliver safe, reliable, sustainable, and inclusive mobility services to local communities.

Established in 2009, Keolis Downer is a joint venture between Keolis, a leading public transport operator established in 13 countries, and Downer, the leading provider of integrated services in Australia and New Zealand.

Name: Meep
Description:
Meep is a digital solution that integrates and connects different transportation services, creating sustainable, connected mobility ecosystems.

But Meep is not just technology. It is the engine that drives more humane and intelligent mobility. We unify, analyze and optimize transportation services, providing companies and cities with the data and intelligence tools they need to achieve more efficient, sustainable trips for everyone.

Name: HP Mobilidade
Description:
Página oficial da empresa HP Mobilidade no Linkedin.

Empresa vencedora do Troféu Ouro do Prêmio ANTP de Qualidade, somos a segunda maior concessionária de transporte coletivo da Rede Metropolitana de Goiânia. 

Nossa Missão:
Focar nas necessidades das pessoas para oferecer serviços de Transporte Público.

Nossos Valores:
- Paixão pelo transporte
- Amor em servir pessoas
- Compromisso
- Criação de valor para o cliente
- Inovabilidade

Name: Grupo Santa Zita
Description: Promover o deslocamento de pessoas com segurança, qualidade e respeito, visando um serviço eficiente aos clientes e contribuindo para o desenvolvimento da Região Metropolitana da Grande Vitória.

Name: CapMetro
Description:
CapMetro is the public transportation provider for over 1.3 million people in the Austin region. Our mission is to connect people and communities to jobs and opportunities, and our vision is to transform the daily lives of Texans. We provide a variety of transit services, including MetroBus, MetroRail, UT Shuttles, Pickup and MetroAccess, to meet the ever-growing needs of the Austin community. 

To serve the Austin of today and tomorrow, we’re working on Project Connect, the largest investment our region has ever made. The November 2020 voter approval of this transformative program will bring light rail service that changes the way Austinites move around the city, new MetroRapid routes that better serve East Austin and great regional service for the entire area. 

Join us in our mission to build a better Austin. At CapMetro, find work that works for you ~ It’s a thing around here!

Name: HP Transportes
Description:
Página oficial da empresa HP Transportes Coletivos no Linkedin para divulgação de vagas abertas.

Empresa vencedora do Troféu Ouro do Prêmio ANTP de Qualidade, somos a segunda maior concessionária de transporte coletivo da Rede Metropolitana de Goiânia. Atualmente, nossa frota é composta por 389 veículos e operamos em 144 linhas nas regiões sul, sudeste e centro expandido.

Nossa Missão:
Prover, de forma sustentável, serviços e soluções de transporte público coletivo, entregando níveis crescentes de satisfação aos clientes, acionistas, integrantes e demais partes interessadas.

Nossa Visão de Futuro: 
A sociedade que servimos nos reconhece como empresa referência em competitividade e sustentabilidade.

Nossos Valores:
- Amor em servir
- Paixão pelo Transporte
- Pessoas
- Clientes
- Inovação e Empreendedorismo
- Resultados

Name: ENAKL
Description:
Collective transport solutions enabled by technology to offer on demand reliable, safe, available, comfortable and sustainable urban transportation options in emerging countries.
By adapting Trasnport as as Service (TaaS) technologies to traditional local transport solutions (eg : shared taxis), ENAKL creates an affordable and convenient alternative to public transport, adapted to the real needs of the populations of the emerging cities.

Name: Ito
Description:
Ito solves transportation challenges across the globe for millions of travellers every day by delivering real-time transit data feeds to journey planners and a platform for transit authorities and operators. 

Our mission is to deliver data that is as close to the real-life experience of the traveller as possible. With offices in London and Cambridge, we serve clients from all over the world, such as Apple, Google, Microsoft, The Department for Transport (DfT), Arriva, and Go-Ahead.

Ito World has deep expertise in transit data and systems, having worked with transit data in hundreds of cities around the world. We combine this deep transit knowledge with tech developed by a team led by one of the UK’s foremost experts in real-time transit systems.

We deliver real-time transit data that powers the largest journey planners in the world as well as a SaaS platform for cities, authorities & operators.

The world's transit data flows through and is managed by our platform:
Over 60 million daily rides
Over 110 major cities / metro areas
1,000 transit authorities/agencies/operators 
120,000 vehicles tracked in real time

Name: Preimo
Description:
Preimo is more than luxury transport. We safeguard your brand reputation through our expert chauffeurs, distinguished fleet, and high standards of service. 

With 60,000+ trips and a 99.6% quality assurance rate, we ensure an exceptional experience. Effortlessly manage your trips with our advanced digital booking platform. Choose Preimo for airport transfers, VIP services, and corporate shuttles. Discover how Preimo can protect and enhance your brand reputation. Talk to Us

Name: AC Transit
Description:
The Alameda-Contra Costa Transit District is the largest public bus system in California, serving 13 cities and adjacent unincorporated areas in Alameda and Contra Costa counties. 

AC Transit has been serving the East Bay since 1960, taking over from the Key System and its predecessors, which carried passengers via buses, horse-drawn rail, electric streetcars, and ferries over the previous 100 years. 

AC Transit’s mission is to provide safe, convenient, courteous, and reliable transit service.

Name: Semitan
Description: La Semitan est une SEM (société d’économie mixte) détenue à 65% par Nantes Métropole et à 35% par des acteurs privés (Transdev, Caisse d’Epargne, CCI, associations). Liée par un contrat de délégation de service public avec Nantes Métropole, la Semitan exploite le réseau de transport en commun de l’agglomération nantaise. Elle est également mandatée pour construire, rénover et sécuriser le réseau. Elle est aussi en charge de la coordination de toutes les mobilités de l’agglomération nantaise.

Name: RATP Dev USA
Description: RATP Dev is a subsidiary of RATP Group established in 2002 to export the Group's operating and maintenance know how outside the historic transit network operated by RATP in the Paris region of France. RATP Dev now operates in 13 countries on four continents. In 2015, RATP Dev generated revenue exceeding 1.1B euros. In North America, RATP Dev USA employs over 6,000 team members transporting more than 80 million passengers throughout the U.S., and operates a wide range of services to include; fixed route, paratransit, rail, tour bus, and sightseeing shuttles.

Name: Operadora Distrital de Transporte S.A.S
Description:
El Concejo de Bogotá a través del artículo 91 del Acuerdo 761 de 2020, emitió autorización para la creación de la Operadora Distrital de Transporte en los siguientes términos “La Alcaldesa Mayor en representación del Distrito Capital o TRANSMILENIO S.A., para participar en la creación de una sociedad por acciones - Operadora Distrital de Transporte-, con la participación de entidades públicas de acuerdo con los resultados de estudios técnicos y financieros, con personería jurídica, adscrita al sector movilidad, con autonomía administrativa, contable, financiera, presupuestal y patrimonio propio, para lo cual se podrán realizar los aportes a que haya lugar.”
La mencionada autorización fue ejecutada por la Alcaldesa Mayor de Bogotá D.C. mediante el Decreto 188 de 2021 del 27 de mayo de 2021, “Por medio del cual se autoriza la constitución de la Operadora Distrital de Transporte”.

La Operadora Distrital de Transporte S.A.S. tiene como objeto social principal la prestación del servicio público de transporte masivo en Bogotá D.C. o su área de influencia, en sus diferentes componentes y modalidades, entre otras actividades, en las condiciones que señalen las normas vigentes, las autoridades competentes y sus estatutos.”

Entidad vinculada a la Secretaría Distrital de Movilidad, como sexta entidad del sector.

Name: Matawan
Description:
Matawan simplifies everyday travel by connecting public transport to all modes of mobility, for a unified, freer and more sustainable mobility.
Our SaaS platform improves the user service, facilitating travel with a single ticket and reducing the carbon footprint of trips. 
We fight for mobility in the public's interest.

Name: Réseau de transport de Longueuil
Description:
The Réseau de transport de Longueuil (RTL) is a public transit organization that serves the territory of the Agglomération de Longueuil, including Boucherville, Brossard, Saint-Bruno-de-Montarville, Longueuil and Saint-Lambert, and a population of more than 425,000 residents. 

As the third largest urban transit corporation in Québec, the RTL has a mission to provide public transit services that meet the transportation needs of citizens within the Agglomération de Longueuil. It plays a key social role and, by encouraging active transportation methods, it also promotes healthy lifestyle habits. Improving quality of life for the citizens of the Agglomération de Longueuil is a top priority for the RTL.

The RTL network comprises 83 regular bus lines. Its territory includes five cities, four terminals, three train stations and nine park-and-ride lots. 

The RTL provides more than 100,000 trips per day. 

The RTL also offer 14 shared taxi lines to residents in certain sectors that are distanced from the regular bus lines. The taxi drives the customer to the closest transfer point. 

The RTL also provides part of the school transportation services on its territory. Every day, RTL buses transport more than 5,000 students on its regular network. 

Finally, the RTL’s paratransit service is available to territory residents who are unable to use regular public transit because of a significant and persistent disability. Close to 5,000 customers are eligible for this specialized service.

Name: Glydways
Description:
High capacity, on-demand, affordable urban mobility. 
#TheFutureOfTransportation 
#BestWayToMovePeople

Name: San Mateo County Transit District
Description: The San Mateo County Transit District is the administrative body for the principal public transit and transportation programs in San Mateo County: SamTrans bus service, including Redi-Wheels paratransit service, Caltrain commuter rail and the San Mateo County Transportation Authority. Caltrain and the TA have contracted with the District to serve as their managing agency, under the direction of their appointed boards.

Name: RATP Dev France-Suisse
Description:
RATP Dev France-Suisse est une filiale de RATP Dev. Nous assurons la conception, l’exploitation et la maintenance de réseaux de métros automatiques, bus, tramways et autres modes de transport public pour se rendre au travail, à l'école, pour se déplacer, ou pour se connecter avec ses amis, sa famille.

Nous sommes 25 000 présents dans 17 pays et plus de 120 filiales et nous nous engageons avec passion, détermination, audace et transparence pour transporter les voyageurs du quotidien, relier les communautés, promouvoir une innovation utile et raisonnée et contribuer de manière responsable au développement économique et social.

Parce que les transports en commun font sens pour la planète, les communautés, les territoires et la vie quotidienne, nous nous engageons chaque jour pour la qualité de vie en ville.

Name: STCP
Description: STCP - Sociedade de Transportes Colectivos do Porto, E.I.M., S.A., is the largest and main public transport operator in the Porto Metropolitan Area. The company operates a vast network of public road transport, focusing its activity in the city of Porto and also covering the cities of Matosinhos, Maia, Valongo, Gondomar and Vila Nova de Gaia. STCP also operates a network of historic tramcars, with routes in the historic area of Porto.

Name: pony
Description:
Bus stops. Traffic jams. Empty docks.

Life’s too short... and you were made to move. Which is why the moment has come for a movement. To unchain the city and give you free rein: whoever you are and wherever you’re going. A movement powered by Pony.

No docking. No hassle. No limits.

Not just getting around.
Changing the way the world goes round.

Name: British Columbia Rapid Transit Company
Description:
Join a company that has been a part of moving Metro Vancouver for over 35 years.
 
British Columbia Rapid Transit Company Ltd. (BCRTC) maintains and operates the Expo and Millennium SkyTrain Lines from our central facilities in south Burnaby. Our services connect downtown Vancouver to the cities of Burnaby, New Westminster, Coquitlam, Port Moody and Surrey. With the future expansion of both the Expo and Millennium Lines gathering pace, infrastructure renewal and new asset acquisition projects underway, this is an exciting time to join our team of over 1,200 dedicated employees, working on one of the longest fully-automated rapid transit systems in the world.
 
Our work encompasses roles such as administration, engineering, elevator and escalator maintenance, field operations, vehicle maintenance, and wayside (station and guideway) maintenance.
 
When you work for SkyTrain, not only will you help move Metro Vancouver, you will also have access to comprehensive benefits including paid vacation, medical benefits, transit passes, training and more. We are a proud equal opportunity employer, committed to a diverse and inclusive workforce.
 
Come explore what makes us one of BC’s Top Employers!

Name: Gmovil S.A.S.
Description:
Somos un operador del Sistema Integrado de Transporte Público de Bogotá. 

Nuestro propósito superior: Movilizamos y hacemos que los sueños y oportunidades lleguen seguros a su destino

MISIÓN

Name: Admiral Mobility
Description: Admiral Mobility is the mobility business arm of Admiral Corporation of America Inc. Founded in Chicago, Ilinois in 1934 by US entrepreneur Ross Siragusa, Admiral has built a worldwide reputation for quality home appliances and consumer electronics. Admiral diversified into clean mobility and energy solutions in 2021. Admiral Energy is involved in design, development, and management of customized, comprehensive eco system for deployment of solutions related to clean mobility and energy storage for global markets. Established in 2022 Admiral Mobility is focused on expanding the portfolio to include commercial electric vehicles (EV’s).

Name: Greater Cleveland RTA
Description:
Connecting Greater Cleveland. Moving Forward Together. 

Since 1975, the Greater Cleveland Regional Transit Authority (GCRTA) has proudly served the Greater Cleveland area, providing safe, reliable, and accessible transportation across Cuyahoga County. With a fleet of more than 311 buses and trains, we connect over 3,000 stops, ensuring every rider can access essential services, education, and employment.

Our mission is simple: connecting the community. With each ride, we seek to go safely, sustainably, and efficiently. Whether commuting to work, attending an event, or exploring Cleveland, GCRTA is here to get you there. Ride with us today and be part of our journey! 


GCRTA's Social Media Code of Content: https://www.riderta.com/codeofconduct#digital

Name: Regional Transportation Authority of Northeastern Illinois (RTA)
Description:
The Regional Transportation Authority (a.k.a. RTA) was created in 1974. In 1983, the amended Act created three "service boards" known as the Chicago Transit Authority (CTA), Metra commuter rail and Pace suburban bus. The RTA's primary responsibilities became financial and budget oversight of CTA, Metra and Pace, and regional transit planning issues.

Guiding the RTA's oversight responsibility is a Board of Directors who approves an annual budget and two-year financial plan. The Board consists of 15 members and a chairman appointed from the six-county region. The RTA Board is also required annually to review and approve a five-year capital plan, which is a blueprint of the capital activities to be funded by the RTA and executed by the CTA, Metra, and Pace.

Name: Awto
Description: Somos Awto, el primer carsharing con presencia regional en Latinoamérica. Awto ofrece vehículos por minutos, días o meses, bajo un servicio que incluye combustible, seguros y puntos de estacionamientos gratuitos. Todo a través de nuestra app en tu smartphone. Además de ser una marca innovadora y pionera, Awto se posiciona como una alternativa económica, sustentable y social, que complementa otras opciones de transporte. Empresa B Pendiente que compensa su huella de carbono.

Name: Transit Systems
Description:
Transit Systems is Australia's leading mass transit provider. We innovate, design and deliver land transport solutions that attract customers because they are easy to use, reliable, convenient and safe. 

Transit Systems is part of Kelsian Group (Kelsian), Australia’s largest integrated multi-modal transport provider and tourism operator, with established bus operations in Australia, Singapore, USA, and the Channel Islands. Kelsian provides essential journeys for our customers by delivering safe and intelligent transport solutions designed to improve the sustainability and liveability of the communities we serve.

Kelsian has over 30 years’ experience delivering tourism and passenger transport services. The Group is a leader in sustainable public transport as the operator of Australia’s largest zero emission bus fleet and Australia’s largest electrified bus depot.

As at 30 June 2024, Kelsian directly employs over 12,500 people and operates over 5,500 buses, 115 vessels and 24 light rail vehicles that delivered more than 367 million customer journeys over the last year.

Name: Keolis Lille ilévia
Description:
Opérateur majeur du transport public de voyageurs en France et à l’international, Keolis s’est vu reconduire en 2025 pour l’exploitation du réseau de transport urbain de la Métropole Européenne de Lille. Un réseau qui compte 210 millions de voyages annuels et qui offre un large choix de modes de transports.

Véritable partenaire mobilité de la MEL, Keolis Lille ilévia est animé par une conviction forte : imaginer et déployer des mobilités sûres et durables au service de la Métropole Européenne de Lille, pour une meilleure qualité de vie de tous et de chacun. Pour tenir cet engagement, l’exploitant s'investit réduire notre empreinte carbone et environnementale, favoriser l'insertion, l'égalité et la diversité par l'emploi, promouvoir des solutions de mobilité sûres, durables et inclusives et agir collectivement pour le développement et l'attractivité du territoire.
 
Fort de ses 2 700 collaborateurs, l’exploitant met le voyageur au cœur de ses préoccupations, de la maintenance du réseau à la mise en place de nouveaux services en passant par la relation client

Découvrez les coulisses d’un réseau qui ne dort jamais : https://youtu.be/H9EdhjTZWJE

Name: Splend
Description:
Splend provides eco-friendly and affordable cars to on-demand drivers, so they can focus on earning an income.

For over seven years, we’ve been helping drivers earn more, improve their ratings, and enjoy their jobs. How do we do that? By offering an unrivalled level of support for our customers. 

We’re more than a car supplier. We provide resources and a community for drivers wanting to be their best. From dedicated support to advanced training and rewards, we help our customers take control of their careers with our flexible plans.

Splend was founded in Sydney in 2015. As on-demand driving became part of modern society, we expanded to nine cities across Australia, the Americas, and Europe, and grew our global team to over 150 employees.

We’ve helped students, retirees, former refugees, and single parents find work they love, which fits their lifestyle. We take pride in everything our members and teams achieved so far, and we’re only just getting started.

Name: Keolis Rennes Métropole
Description:
Le Groupe Keolis facilite le transport quotidien de ses clients dans 16 pays et sur 4 continents. Plus de 64 000 collaborateurs à travers le monde (dont plus de la moitié en France) œuvrent chaque jour pour le bon fonctionnement de tous les modes de transport urbain.

Le Groupe exploite des réseaux de bus, métro, tramway, mais propose aussi des vélos, du covoiturage, des services de transport adapté ou encore des navettes fluviales et des véhicules autonomes. De Las Vegas à Dijon en passant par Londres et Melbourne, le Groupe est également présent à Rennes. 

Au sein de notre filiale Keolis Rennes Métropole, un peu plus de 1000 collaborateurs dont environ 600 conducteurs de bus exploitent le réseau STAR de Rennes Métropole. 

Saviez-vous que les Km parcourus par les bus et métro de Keolis Rennes Métropole sont l’équivalent d’une fois le tour de la terre chaque jour ?

Chez Keolis Rennes Métropole, plus de 100 métiers concourent à offrir un service de qualité à nos clients et permettent à chacun de voyager sereinement sur le réseau.     

Keolis Rennes Métropole poursuit son développement et recrute régulièrement des conducteurs de bus mais également des agents de maintenance bus, des électrotechniciens, des électromécaniciens, des techniciens courant faible, … Retrouvez toutes nos offres ici : https://www.keolis-rennes.com/nous-rejoindrepostuler/nos-offres-demploi-et-de-stage

Name: Metro Transit
Description:
Make a difference with a career at Metro Transit!

Our diverse community and expanding economy depend on Metro Transit to help get people where they need to be. Be a part of this important work. Together we can help our region thrive.  

Metro Transit is a mobility leader for the Twin Cities, operating an integrated network of buses, light rail and commuter trains as well as resources for those who carpool, vanpool, or bike. As one of the country’s largest transit systems, Metro Transit is also developing a network of enhanced bus rapid transit (BRT) transitways.

We offer a variety of careers and excellent benefits.
Join our team as we build a stronger, better transit system: metrotransit.org.org/jobs

Learn about our work: metrotransit.org

Find us on social media: 
twitter.com/metrotransitmn
facebook.com/metrotransitmn
youtube.com/metrotransitmn
instagram.com/metrotransitmn

Name: Hamburger Verkehrsverbund (hvv)
Description:
Für drei Bundesländer, acht Kreise, 30 Verkehrsunternehmen und rund 3,67 Mio. Einwohner übernimmt der hvv das Management des öffentlichen Personennahverkehrs (ÖPNV) und gesamten Verkehrsangebots in der Metropolregion Hamburg, das heißt, für alle Bus-, Fähr-, U-, S-, A- und Regionalbahnleistungen im hvv. 

Mit rund 90 Mitarbeitenden ist die hvv GmbH die Regieorganisation und sorgt für einen leistungsfähigen sowie benutzerfreundlichen ÖPNV und ein abgestimmtes Verkehrsangebot. Die Bundesländer und (Land-)Kreise, die als Aufgabenträger zur Organisation und Finanzierung des öffentlichen Personennahverkehrs verpflichtet sind, haben zur Umsetzung dieser Aufgabe die Hamburger Verkehrsverbund GmbH (hvv GmbH) gegründet.
