Name: CUTRIC-CRITUC
Description:
The Canadian Urban Transit Research and Innovation Consortium (CUTRIC) supports projects that develop the next-generation of mobility and transportation technologies for Canadians. These advancements help grow the low-carbon and "smart" technology eco-system in the county, leading to job growth and economic development over the long-term.

CUTRIC's work generates solutions that decrease fuel consumption, reduce emissions, eliminate redundancies, reduce congestion, improve the quality of life for Canadians, advance the digital integration of low-cost mobility solutions for urban, sub-urban, rural and remote communities across Canada, increase road safety and reduce road accidents. CUTRIC supports the technologies required for a 21st century low-carbon economy.

CUTRIC strives to support the commercialization of technologies through industry-led collaborative research, development, demonstration/delivery, and integration (RDD&I) projects that bring innovation design to Canada's low-carbon smart mobility eco-system. Our vision is to make Canada a global leader in low-carbon smart mobility technologies across heavy-duty and light-duty platforms, including advanced transit, transportation, and integrated mobility applications.

Name: BIXI-Montréal
Description: BIXI Montréal est un organisme à but non lucratif créé par la Ville de Montréal pour gérer le système de vélo-partage à Montréal. Le réseau comprend plus de 12 600 vélos, dont 3 200 vélos électriques et 1000 stations sur le territoire montréalais, ainsi qu’à Laval, Longueuil, Boucherville, Terrebonne, Sainte-Julie, Sherbrooke, Deux-Montagnes, Saint-Eustache, Saint-Lambert, Westmount, Ville de Mont-Royal et Montréal-Est.

Name: EOMMT
Description:
La EOMMT es una empresa privada ecuatoriana que tiene la misión de operar la primera línea del Metro de Quito. Sus dos socios de altísima experiencia ferroviaria, 98 años de historia, Transdev y Metro de Medellín se unieron para lograr un solo objetivo: construir un modelo de transporte sostenible, seguro, eficiente y humano. 

Nuestro call to action, Somos lo que hacemos, nace de la vocación de servicio de nuestros colaboradores. Creemos en el desarrollo humano, la integridad de las personas y la convicción de vivir la Cultura Metro en cada kilómetro recorrido. 

Juntos a ti, iniciamos este viaje hacia un mejor futuro.

Name: Bernmobil
Description:
Die roten Trams und Busse prägen das Berner Stadtbild wie der weltberühmte Zytglogge-Turm oder die Lauben.

BERNMOBIL ist seit 1998 eine selbständige öffentlich-rechtliche Anstalt und befindet sich vollständig im Eigentum der Stadt Bern. 1890 fuhr das erste Tram vom Bärengraben bis zum Bahnhof. Seither hat sich das Angebot massiv entwickelt: Heute transportiert BERNMOBIL auf 5 Tramlinien, 3 Trolley- und 19 Buslinien jährlich über 100 Mio. Fahrgäste. Dank dem dichten Liniennetz und dem Fahrplan im 6-Minutentakt auf den Tram- und den Hauptbuslinien weist der öV in der Stadt Bern mit 46% den höchsten Anteil am Gesamtverkehr auf. Unsere moderne Tram- und Busflotte ist durchgehend niederflurig und behindertengerecht ausgerüstet, Echtzeitinformationen in den Fahrzeugen und an den Haltestellen sind Standard. Trams und Trolleybusse fahren mit Strom aus Wasserkraft C02-neutral, fast zwei Drittel der Busflotte werden umweltfreundlich mit Erd- und Biogas angetrieben.

Als traditionelles und leistungsfähiges Verkehrsunternehmen bietet BERNMOBIL einen kundenorientierten und zuverlässigen Transport mit dem öffentlichen Nahverkehr in der Stadt und Agglomeration Bern.

Mehr zu unserem Unternehmen und unseren offenen Stellen finden Sie auf http://www.bernmobil.ch/Seiten/Unternehmen/Jobs

Name: Metro Service A/S
Description:
Metro Service er en privat virksomhed, der driver og vedligeholder Metroen og Hovedstadens Letbane. 

Vores arbejde er baseret på mere end 800 engagerede medarbejdere i Danmark, der hver dag gør en ekstraordinær indsats, så passagererne kommer trygt og sikkert frem til tiden. Vi er en virksomhed i vækst, og hver måned siger vi velkommen til nye kollegaer, der har lyst til at arbejde med at levere gode kundeoplevelser, håndtere komplekse tekniske systemer og sikre høj driftssikkerhed.

Med udgangspunkt i mottoet Together on the journey tager vi i fællesskab ansvar for at passe godt på passagerer, tog, stationer, tunneller, skinner og tekniske systemer 24 timer i døgnet og året rundt. Det gør vi med en anerkendende tilgang til hinanden i et arbejdsmiljø, som er rodfæstet i vores værdier: Teamwork, faglig ekspertise, kundeorientering og bevidsthed om sikkerhed og miljø.

Metro Service er ejet af italienske ATM. Det betyder, at vores virksomhed hviler på et solidt økonomisk grundlag og knowhow fra et internationalt netværk med tusindvis af engagerede kollegaer. Vi trækker på næsten 100 års driftserfaring fra ATM, der dækker hele værdikæden af transport- og mobilitetsydelser i Milano og det nordlige Italien, ligesom de er til stede med metrodrift i Thessaloniki, Grækenland og busdrift i Paris, Frankrig.

Vi har en ambition om konstant at levere de bedste mobilitetsløsninger til samfundet ved at opfylde og overgå vores kunders forventninger til pålidelighed, sikkerhed og komfort.

Name: VIA Metropolitan Transit
Description:
VIA connects our community to opportunity, supports economic vitality, and enhances quality of life throughout our region. VIA, recognized by the Texas Transit Association in 2018 as the Outstanding Metro Transit Authority of the year, serves 14 member cities and the unincorporated areas of Bexar County, operating seven days a week on 92 routes. In 2017, VIA provided nearly 40 million passenger trips across the region. It's AAA bond rating reflects the organization’s sound management and financial practices. 

Visit VIAinfo.net for more information. Follow us on Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram to learn more about our programs, services and connections in the community.

Name: Subterráneos de Buenos Aires S.E.
Description:
Subterráneos de Buenos Aires Sociedad del Estado (SBASE) es la empresa de la Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires que tiene a su cargo la administración de la red de subtes, su desarrollo, expansión y el control de la operación del servicio. Además, es la autoridad de aplicación de la Ley 4472.

SBASE es pionera en Latinoamérica en construcción y operación de redes subterráneas, y sus profesionales trabajan para que cada día viajen en forma rápida, segura y confortable más de 1.250.000 pasajeros.

Nuestra misión es incrementar la cantidad de usuarios del subte para reducir el tránsito en superficie, mejorando la movilidad en la Ciudad de Buenos Aires y disminuyendo el impacto en el medio ambiente.

Nuestra visión es ser una empresa modelo en el sector del transporte público, brindando un servicio de excelencia y sustentable a largo plazo.

Nuestros objetivos:
- Frecuencia y experiencia del viaje
Mejorar la confiabilidad y la experiencia del usuario renovando la flota e invirtiendo en infraestructura y tecnología.

- Extensión
Ampliar la red actual incorporando una nueva línea y prolongando las líneas existentes, cubriendo así los corredores de alta demanda.

- Sustentabilidad económica y ambiental
Asegurar la sustentabilidad económica del subte en el mediano plazo con una operación del servicio más eficiente y reduciendo la contaminación ambiental.
Location: Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires, CABA

Name: Consorcio Express SAS
Description:
Empresa operadora del Sistema Integrado de Transporte Público de Bogotá - TransMilenio.
Concesión en las localidades de San Cristóbal y Usaquén.

Name: eTukTuk
Description: Enabling a sharing economy for cleaner, fairer transportation | Built on the #blockchain, powered by the #people

Name: Keolis Bus Lyon
Description:
Keolis Bus Lyon exploite le réseau de bus et trolleybus TCL pour le compte de l’Autorité Organisatrice Sytral Mobilités. 

Depuis toujours à Lyon, nous sommes engagés pour tous les déplacements du quotidien, pour accompagner les Lyonnais dans les moments qui comptent. 

Nous sommes près de 3 000 salariés et c’est cet ensemble de talents qui permet à notre réseau d’avancer.

Nous sommes un collectif engagé : nous recrutons des profils issus de tous horizons, et adaptons nos pratiques aux évolutions de la société et de nos métiers, grâce à nos politiques de diversité et d’inclusion.

Nous avançons tous les jours ensemble. Nous sommes une équipe soudée, où chacun s’engage pour le collectif. Où notre collectif s’engage pour le territoire. 

C’est en étant engagés, ici à Lyon et avec tous les autres réseaux du groupe Keolis à travers le monde, que nous sommes force d’innovation, pour faire avancer et progresser les mobilités du futur, durables et connectées, grâce à nos technologies uniques, qui façonnent nos déplacements et notre territoire.

Car nous sommes convaincus que c’est ensemble, et par notre engagement, que nous réussirons à répondre aux défis de la transition écologique et à avoir un impact positif sur notre territoire, et sur le quotidien de chacun d’entre nous. 

Nous sommes engagés, sur toute la ligne.

Name: Rideau Transit Maintenance
Description: Rideau Transit Maintenance (RTM) is a General Partnership firm of ACS Infrastructure Canada, SNC-Lavalin, and EllisDon. More than 200 employees work for Rideau Transit Maintenance.

Name: Weego
Description:
Weego is a mobility company that offers a variety of transportation options and solutions to people in Africa. 

Our main mission is to facilitate people's daily travel and make it easier and more convenient for them to get around.

One of our key offerings is our mobility as a service (MAAS) app, which brings together all the different transport options available in a given area. 
Our MAAS app allows users to easily access and book rides on public transit, ride-sharing services, and other modes of transportation, all from one convenient platform.

We also offer a software-as-a-service (SaaS) solution for operators [WeegoPro], which provides a range of tools and resources to help them manage and optimize their transportation services.

In addition to our MAAS and SaaS offerings, we also provide a staff transportation service for companies [WeegoLines]. 

Our staff transportation service helps businesses efficiently and effectively transport their employees to and from work, saving them time and money and improving productivity.

Weego is dedicated to providing innovative and convenient mobility solutions that make it easier for people to get around and connect with the world around them.

Name: Vélogik
Description:
Leading brand and key contributor in bike maintenance in Europe, the Vélogik group guarantees reliability and expertise since 2008. Historically specialized in BtoB maintenance, we are now deploying in BtoC maintenance, in skills training and designing digital business management tools.
Through our ISO 9001 certification, we’re ensuring the performance of your equipments.
To support us in our development, we are looking for new talents in France and in Europe!

Name: Benito Roggio transporte
Description: El grupo Roggio tiene participación en el área de transporte a través de Benito Roggio transporte que reúne a empresas del sector de transporte ferroviario de pasajeros (subterráneo y de superficie) y autotransporte; transporte de carga y transporte en el exterior. A través de ellas, forma parte de la gestión de un conjunto de emprendimientos y negocios de transporte que anualmente transportan cerca de 500 millones de pasajeros y 936.000 toneladas de carga

Name: Kleta
Description:
We exist to improve mobility in big crowded cities by offering a quality bike subscription service. Your own bike, no-hassle, or long-term commitment. We believe we can change mobility for good and eventually enable all of our users to own a bike without buying. 

Kleta is a startup founded in Barcelona, born from a simple idea: for a fixed monthly fee you get a bike. The freedom of owning a bike with no initial investment and no worries about theft or maintenance!

Name: Pace Suburban Bus
Description: Pace, the Suburban Bus Division of the Regional Transportation Authority, provides public transportation services to Cook, DuPage, Lake, Will, Kane, and McHenry counties in Northeastern Illinois.  Services include fixed bus routes, ADA Paratransit, On Demand, dial-a-ride, vanpools, and automated ride-matching at PaceCommuterRideShare.com.

Name: Transvial Lima
Description: Somos una empresa global de transporte urbano creada con el objetivo de proporcionar un sistema de transporte masivo, confortable, accesible, no contaminante, con frecuencias regulares ajustadas a la demanda, a través del apoyo de sistemas tecnológicos avanzados de gestión de flota.

Name: Nexport
Description:
#Nexport #ZeroEmissionTransport #Australia

Nexport is the leading Australian OEM. We utilise our global supply chain network and deep expertise in design, engineering and production to build and deploy great electric buses for the Australian market. 
GoZero has helped governments and operators across Australia to transition to zero emission transport solutions, quickly and efficiently. We are the Australian market leader with over 120 zero emission buses on the road and 6 million plus kilometers travelled since 2018.

#Nexport #ZeroEmissionTransport #Australia #ZEBs

Name: Conduent Business Solutions France
Description:
CONDUENT BUSINESS SOLUTIONS (FRANCE) SAS est implantée en région Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, sur le territoire ardéchois dans l'agglomération valentinoise, depuis plus de 50 ans.  Elle est le centre de compétences mondial des solutions Transit de Conduent Transportation. Ses 500 salariés développent des solutions pour la mobilité et les transports en communs, et déploient des projets dans plus de 20 pays. Ses dispositifs gèrent des millions d'interactions sur plus de 400 réseaux de transport, soit plus de 130 000 terminaux en exploitation.
NOTRE MISSION:
Les solutions logicielles et matérielles de Conduent Business Solutions
permettent aux personnes qui voyagent de se déplacer facilement et
rapidement à l’échelle d’une ville, d’une agglomération ou d’une région.
Grâce à des modes de paiements ou des supports de validation simples,
combinés à plusieurs modes de transports, les solutions innovantes
de Conduent Business Solutions France favorisent l’utilisation des
transports publics en améliorant l’expérience de voyage des usagers.

Name: EU Urban Mobility Observatory
Description:
Created more than 25 years ago and now Europe's main observatory on urban mobility. The EU Urban Mobility Observatory facilitates the exchange of information, knowledge and experiences in the field of sustainable urban mobility in Europe. It is aimed at individuals working in transport and related disciplines, including urban and regional development, health, energy and environmental sciences. 

The EU Urban Mobility Observatory provides the information, good practices, tools and communication channels needed to help you turn your cities into models of sustainable urban mobility

Name: GRUPO LIMA BUS
Description:
Somos un Grupo Empresarial peruano, que lidera la operación de 4 empresas de transporte público bajo una estrategia orientada a alcanzar altos estándares internacionales y reducir el impacto del sector en el medio ambiente. 
También participamos en la gestión de dos empresas de servicio automotriz, que utilizan tecnología de punta para una operacion eficiente de flota.

Desde el Grupo Lima Bus, promovemos la modernización del transporte público en Sudamérica para brindarle a los usuarios el servicio que merecen: digno, confiable y seguro.
En la actualidad contamos con las siguientes empresas: Lima Bus Internacional (operador de El Metropolitano en Lima), Consorcio Móvil Express, Consorcio Lima Sur - Grupo Diez, Sotramac (operador en Cartagena), Tellantas y Tilsac.

Name: Awto Brasil
Description: We are Awto, the first vehicle sharing company with a presence in Latin America. Awto offers vehicles for minutes, hours or days, in a service that includes fuel, insurance and free parking spaces. All through our app on your smartphone. In addition to being an innovative and pioneering brand, Awto is positioned as an economic, sustainable and social alternative that complements other transport options.

Name: Transdev Normandie
Description:
Au service des collectivités et des communautés, Transdev Normandie garantit chaque jour des solutions de mobilité durables, innovantes, et sécurisantes pour tous les voyageurs.

Véritable laboratoire des mobilités en Normandie, Transdev accompagne les collectivités et les entreprises grâce à une organisation répondant de manière durable et optimale à leurs attentes de mobilité.

Notre savoir-faire et notre écoute client nous permettent de concevoir des offres adaptées aux territoires, aux attentes des élus, des entreprises et des habitants.

Name: Casatransports SA
Description:
Casa Transports en Site Aménagé (CTSA) est une société de développement local (SDL) créée en 2009.
Notre mission est de mettre en place des solutions de mobilité innovantes, pratiques, et accessibles à tous les casablancais. 
Nous intervenons ainsi dans le développement, la réalisation et le pilotage de la gestion des projets et des services liées à la mobilité à Casablanca, notamment les services de Casatramway, Casabusway et Casabus. 
Parallèlement, CTSA est maître d’ouvrage délégué pour la réalisation d’importants aménagements d’infrastructures routières visant à fluidifier la circulation et à simplifier les accès à la ville.

Name: Hype
Description:
Launched by Mathieu Gardies in 2015 at COP 21 in Paris, in response to the public health and climate emergency of air and noise pollution in urban areas, Hype offers the only  zero-emission taxi booking application for the full range of services (Standard, Van, PRM, Premium) at no extra cost compared with the other on-demand transport operators whose fleets are mostly made up of polluting vehicles (diesel, petrol or hybrids).

To be able to provide a non-polluting, carbon-free solution tailored to each driver, Hype integrates all 100% electric technologies (hydrogen and battery). In particular, Hype has been operating the world's largest fleet of hydrogen taxis for the past 9 years, and is simultaneously developing a green hydrogen production and refueling network, open to all, which will also accelerate the transition of other professional mobility uses to zero-emission.

As Official Taxi Supporter of the Paris 2024 Olympic and Paralympic Games and with the historic commitment of the Paris 2024 Organising Committee, Hype has launched #2024jeBASCULE, an operation designed to encourage on-demand transport customers (Taxis & PHVs), and in particular major public and private clients, to switch to zero-emission. 

Since its creation, Hype has been investing 100% of its capacity and resources to immediately tackle pollution and global warming.

Name: Allibus
Description:
A ALLIBUS TRANSPORTES LTDA, está instalada com Sede Administrativa na Rua Joaquim Marra e utiliza como Garagem dormitório, imóvel situado na Rua Bento Quirino, Vila Talarico.

Atendendo a área 04 de São Paulo com uma frota de mais de 600 veículos agregados, transportamos diariamente, cerca de quatrocentos e trinta mil munícipes por dia, além de contribuirmos com o país empregando direta/indiretamente cerca de 3.000 colaboradores.

Atualmente contamos com três caminhões guinchos com funcionamento 24 horas/dia, posto de abastecimento interno, oficinas de manutenção preventiva e corretiva, almoxarifado de peças, borracharia, posto de molas etc.

Name: BKK - Budapesti Közlekedési Központ
Description: The Centre for Budapest Transport (BKK) is the transport organising authority of the Municipality of Budapest. BKK was founded in 2010 with the aim of coordinating the transportation processes of the capital. The core competences of our company are planning and development of the public transport system, contracting transport services, organising traffic in the city (public transport, bicycle, pedestrian and taxi traffic), maintaining municipality owned public roads.

Name: Göteborgs Spårvägar AB
Description:
Göteborgs Spårvägar är den största operatören av kollektivtrafik i Göteborgsregionen. Vi arbetar varje dag, året om för att ge våra resenärer en trygg och säker resa till jobb, skola och fritid.

Med 1 300+ anställda så levererar vi all spårvägstrafik i Göteborg och Mölndal, på uppdrag av Västtrafik. Utöver att köra dig dit du vill åka så underhåller vi också vagnarna genom bland annat reperationer, klottersanering och daglig tvätt. Men vi underhåller också banan och signalsystemet - tillsammans med mycket mer. 

Hos oss välkomnas du in i en go miljö med härliga kollegor och mycket arbetsstolthet!

Name: Keolis India Private Limited
Description:
Keolis India Pvt Ltd is a wholly owned subsidiary of Keolis Group, a global leader in shared mobility solutions. The Group is a French multimnational which is headquartered in Paris, France. With a strong international presence and decades of expertise, Keolis Group operates and maintains public transport networks — including metros, trams, buses, and more — across the world.
Keolis India Pvt Ltd has been established as a Special Purpose Vehicle (SPV) to provide Operations and Maintenance (O&M) services for Pune Metro Line 3.
Our mission is to provide world-class standards of service, with focus on safety, and operational efficiency for Pune Metro’s expanding network. Currently, our team is focused on critical mobilisation activities, ensuring we meet all targets set by PITCMRL and future operational benchmarks ahead of launching full revenue services for Line 3.
With a commitment to innovation, sustainability, and passenger experience, Keolis India Pvt Ltd aims to play a key role in transforming Pune’s urban mobility— connecting people, places, and creating opportunities through reliable, modern transit solutions.
Strategy – Operational Excellence for Pune Metro Line 3
Keolis India’s strategic focus is on delivering world-class Operations & Management (O&M) services for Pune Metro’s Line 3 corridor. By leveraging the Keolis Group’s global expertise, we ensure peak performance, passenger satisfaction, and seamless integration with infrastructure partners.

Name: GoCollective
Description: At GoCollective (formerly Arriva), we are in this journey together. With our approximately 2,000 employees spread across the country, we work to create good and cohesive public transport. We operate buses, trains, and harbor buses—and have been doing so for over 20 years. As the country’s largest private operator with more than 80 different nationalities employed, we are an important knowledge actor in the political arena, and we are happy to share our experience. Our diversity is our greatest strength, and every day our employees go to work with dedication, responsibility, and the strong customer focus that characterizes GoCollective.

Name: VAIMOO
Description:
First and Last-Mile mobility is a key element for the growth of public transport and electric micro mobility provides the capillarity, flexibility and cost-effectiveness needed to trigger intermodal transport, connecting classic rail and road lines with a network of thousands of electric vehicles such as bicycles, scooters or quadricycles. 

VAIMOO is the connected e-bike sharing solution whose objective is to empower transport authorities & operators in achieving a flexible, efficient, sustainable, safe and comfortable mobility experience.

Recently adopted by some of the largest European micro-mobility operators to extend their e-scooter sharing services in Denmark, Netherlands, Sweden, UK, and Poland, VAIMOO has been also implemented by the cycling capitals of Copenhagen, Rotterdam, Gdansk and Stockholm.
Its modular, innovative and flexible e-Bike Sharing system includes e-bike fleets, docking stations, the management platform integrable with third-party transports, and an engaging App for a multimodal user’s journey.

Name: Metro de Panamá
Description:
A partir de enero 2015, el Metro de Panamá se convirtió en una sociedad anónima de propiedad 100% del Estado.

La Ley 109 de 2013, dicta el marco regulatorio relativo al Sistema Metro de Transporte de Personas y autoriza la creación de la empresa Metro de Panamá, S.A., la cual se constituye como una sociedad anónima con autonomía, autoridad, representatividad, capacidad técnica y administrativa suficiente que le permite tener a su cargo el Sistema Metro de Transporte de Personas y asumir la responsabilidad de toda la regulación de sus actividades.

La sociedad anónima Metro de Panamá, S.A. está encargada privativamente de planificar, promover, dirigir, regular, coordinar, supervisar, disponer, controlar y ejecutar las obras de infraestructura y equipamientos para el Metro, así como de su operación, seguridad, administración, mantenimiento, expansión y la prestación de los demás servicios relacionados con el Metro en todas sus fases, líneas y modalidades, por lo cual  desarrolla, adopta y supervisa las políticas y procedimientos administrativos, operacionales y de seguridad, planes, reglamentaciones y demás acciones necesarias para su efectivo desarrollo y funcionamiento.

Name: transbus.org
Description:
transbus.org est consacré aux véhicules de transport collectif (autobus et autocars) et aux réseaux de transports en commun en France. 
Découvrez l'offre et les services de mobilité proposés par les réseaux de transports urbains et interurbains pour vos déplacements quotidiens ou occasionnels. Parcourez des fiches techniques sur les véhicules de transport en commun et leurs constructeurs. En complément, retrouvez une collection de dossiers thématiques, de nombreuses photos et les dernières actualités de la mobilité.

Name: Unimar Transportes
Description:
Da parceria de pessoas com grande experiência no ramo de transportes de passageiros nasceu, em agosto de 1997, a Unimar Transportes, que assumiu operação no Sistema Transcol com frota de 62 veículos.

Posteriormente, os sócios adquiriram outras 4 empresas com atuação também no segmento urbano.

Em 2006, a Unimar iniciou operação no segmento municipal, passando a atuar nas linhas que atendem à capital Vitória. Houve, então, a ampliação da prestação de serviço urbano de transportes de passageiros. Naquele mesmo ano, a empresa expandiu suas atividades, passando a atuar, também, nos segmentos de fretamento e locação, criando sua primeira filial, em Ponte Nova-MG. Em 2008, através de reestruturação societária, aconteceu a unificação legal, nascendo a nova e atual "Unimar Transportes Ltda", com operação em transporte urbano, fretamento e locação.

Atualmente, com matriz em Serra-ES, a empresa conta com frota aproximada de 680 veículos, distribuídos entre a sede e as filiais de Conceição do Mato Dentro-MG, Itabira-MG, Linhares-ES e representação em Parauapebas-PA onde atuam fortemente em Locação e Fretamento.

Name: Kelsian Group Limited
Description:
Kelsian is Australia’s largest integrated multi-modal transport provider and tourism operator, with established bus operations in Australia, Singapore, USA, UK and the Channel Islands. Kelsian provides essential journeys for our customers by delivering safe and intelligent transport solutions designed to improve the sustainability and liveability of the communities we serve. 

Kelsian has over 30 years’ experience delivering tourism and passenger transport services. The Group is a leader in sustainable public transport as the operator of Australia’s largest zero emission bus fleet and Australia’s largest electrified bus depot. 

As at 31 December 2023, Kelsian directly employs over 12,200 people and operates over 5,500 buses, 115 vessels and 24 light rail vehicles that delivered more than 332 million customer journeys over the last year.

Name: Go North East
Description:
For over 100 years, Go North East, part of the Go-Ahead Group Ltd, has connected the region's towns and villages with the cities of Newcastle, Durham and Sunderland and currently operates across Northumberland, Tyne and Wear, County Durham and into Tees Valley.

By providing essential bus services Go North East helps people connect with each other and get where they want to go, enabling access to education, retail and employment.

We place great importance on partnership, adopting a collaborative approach with local governments, local communities and strategic partners, and we are committed to providing our communities with affordable and sustainable travel.

Name: M TAG
Description:
M TAG exploite pour le compte du SMMAG, une partie du réseau de transports de l’Aire grenobloise M réso qui dessert la Métropole grenobloise et le Grésivaudan. 

Exploitation des lignes de tram et d’une grande partie des lignes de bus. M TAG c’est également la gestion des agences de mobilité M, des parkings Relais. 

Aujourd'hui, M TAG, ce sont 1400 salariés qui oeuvrent chaque jour pour assurer le transport des voyageurs M réso. 

Retrouvez nos offres d'emploi sur https://www.m-tag.fr/emploi

Name: Metropol Chile
Description: Trabajamos para movilizar a las personas con un servicio seguro y de calidad. Comenzaremos a operar en Chile en 2023. Lo haremos transportando personas desde San Bernardo, Puente Alto, Renca y Huechuraba al resto de la ciudad.

Name: VGMobility
Description:
VGMobility es una empresa con sede en Bogotá - Colombia enfocada en la electrificación del transporte en las Américas. La empresa cuenta con el respaldo de Vitol, el mayor comercializador de energía independiente del mundo. Con la presencia global de Vitol y nuestra experiencia operativa, VGM se encuentra en una posición única para ayudar a su empresa a alcanzar sus objetivos de bajas emisiones de carbono y pasar a la electromovilidad.

VGMobility is a company based in Bogota - Colombia focused on the electrification of transportation in the Americas. The company is backed by Vitol, the largest independent energy trader worldwide. With Vitol's global presence and our operational expertise, VGM is uniquely placed to help your business achieve its low-carbon goals and move into electromobility.

Name: Leipziger Verkehrsbetriebe
Description:
Gemeinsam bewegen wir mehr – jährlich 167 Millionen Fahrgäste vertrauen uns ihre Wege an. Unser Antrieb ist es, immer mehr Menschen für den öffentlichen Nahverkehr zu begeistern und sie sicher, schnell und komfortabel an ihre Ziele zu bringen. 

Dafür brauchen wir Menschen, die mit Leidenschaft und  Mut zu Innovationen umweltfreundliche Mobilitätslösungen vorantreiben. Das sind natürlich die Fahrer:innen, die Mitarbeitenden in den Leitstellen und Werkstätten. Aber auch Expert:innen für Infrastrukturplanung, IT und Technik. Genauso wie Service- und Sicherheitskräfte, Ingenieur:innen und vielfältige Talente hinter den Kulissen: Logistik, Controlling, Recht, Vertrieb, Marketing, Flottenmanagement, HR und ganz viele mehr.

Wir sind auf dem Weg, bis 2040 klimaneutral zu werden. Damit unterstützen wir die Stadt Leipzig, ihre Klimaschutzziele zu erreichen. Und leisten unseren Beitrag für eine lebens- und liebenswerte Stadt. Mit Investitionen in moderne Infrastruktur und eine moderne Fahrzeugflotte bringen wir die die Verkehrswende voran. 

2.600 Mitarbeiter:innen sind wir schon und damit als Teil der Leipziger Gruppe einer der größten Arbeitgeber der Region. Finde auch du deinen passenden Job im #TeamLeipziger und gestalte gemeinsam mit uns die Mobilität von morgen.

Name: Rheinbahn AG
Description:
Die Rheinbahn ist weit mehr als ein Nahverkehrsunternehmen – wir sind das verbindende Element einer ganzen Region.  

Seit 1896 bringen wir Menschen, Orte und das Leben in Bewegung. Heute sorgen wir in Düsseldorf, im Kreis Mettmann und im Rhein-Kreis Neuss dafür, dass täglich über 570.000 Menschen Anschluss finden – an ihre Ziele, an andere Menschen, an das Leben selbst.
Mit über 3.700 Mitarbeitenden aus 61 Nationen zählen wir zu den größten Arbeitgebenden in der Region. Über 320 Stadt- und Straßenbahnen sowie knapp 500 Busse fahren auf 139 Linien in einem Gebiet von rund 570 Quadratkilometern. Damit steuern wir mehr als 1.700 Haltestellen an und umrunden jeden Tag symbolisch drei Mal die Erde – zuverlässig, sicher und nachhaltig. 

Was uns antreibt? Die Überzeugung, dass Verbindungen das Leben verändern. Wir schaffen Nähe in einer Welt, die immer digitaler und distanzierter wird. Wir verbinden Generationen und Hintergründe, Stadt und Land, Alltag und Abenteuer.

Die Rheinbahn macht Mobilität spürbar menschlich und gibt Raum für Gemeinschaft, Entfaltung und Erlebnisse, die bleiben. 

 Impressum: https://www.rheinbahn.de/impressum/socialmedia
 Datenschutz: https://www.rheinbahn.de/datenschutz/socialmedia

Name: North County Transit - San Diego Railroad
Description: NCTD provides multi-modal public transit services in North San Diego County. We are one of only three agencies in the nation to operate heavy rail, hybrid rail, and bus operations in addition to being designated the Railroad of Record with the FRA. Ride our COASTER Commuter Rail, SPRINTER Hybrid Rail, BREEZE Bus Service, LIFT Paratransit, as well as FLEX and NCTD+ on-demand service.

Name: TUB - Transportes Urbanos de Braga, Empresa Municipal
Description:
A missão dos Transportes Urbanos de Braga (TUB) é oferecer Soluções de Mobilidade e Conforto na Região, satisfazendo e surpreendendo expectativas dos parceiros envolvidos de modo a ser reconhecida no domínio da mobilidade urbana integrada, como elemento distintivo na sociedade em termos de identidade coletiva. 

Os TUB são herdeiros de uma larga tradição, desde o século XIX, na Mobilidade em Braga.

Name: CMW Transportes
Description:
Crescer, sem perder valores, qualidade e respeito!

A CMW Transportes é uma empresa de fretamento e turismo na região bragantina, interior do estado de São Paulo e sul de Minas Gerais.
Com quase 40 anos de experiência no mercado, a CMW possui veículos novos com as últimas tecnologias e está autorizada a transportar passageiros por todo o Brasil.

Fretamento com controle exato dos custos, livre de preocupação com itinerários e roteiros, motoristas capacitados e substituição imediata de veículo em caso de defeito.

Turismo autorizado e legalizado pelos órgãos responsáveis de transporte no Brasil, com o maior conforto para os passageiros e contratantes, diversos destinos e preços acessíveis.

Name: Go-Ahead Ireland
Description:
Go-Ahead Ireland (GAI) is a leading public transport bus operator, and part of Go-Ahead Group Ltd. GAI are responsible for running services throughout the Greater Dublin Area under contract to the National Transport Authority.

Our Outer Dublin Metropolitan Area (ODMA) and W-Route services operate from our depot in Ballymount, while our Dublin Commuter (DCOM) services, which consist of five routes, are based in Naas. Accumulated, Go-Ahead Irelands has a fleet of over 225 buses and a team of over 800+ resilient local team members. 

We are a collaborative, transparent, accountable, agile and open minded company who put the people and communities that we have proudly served since 2018 at the heart of our company. GAI connects people to places in a safe, reliable, friendly and effective manner.

GAI is dedicated to investing in the community and is the title sponsor of the Dublin GAA Leagues and Championships which puts us at the forefront of the communities we serve and demonstrates our strong commitment to the local area.

Name: DSW21
Description:
DSW21 provides local transport in Dortmund - buses and trains ensure movement. Dortmund is also one of the largest metropolises in Germany, a city that lives and makes structural change tangible. The DSW21 Group as an infrastructure company is part of this city and its development. Entrepreneurial action is required in order to provide services of the best quality every day. In addition, it is important to initiate and advance new projects to develop the Dortmund location. Lighthouse projects like the PhoenixSee are visible signs of the quality of implementation. The employees of the 21er Group are committed to this city and the location.

Imprint: https://www.bus-und-bahn.de/impressum

Name: Bikeep
Description:
Bikeep is the world’s leading provider of smart bike parking infrastructure for forward-thinking cities. Powered by a software based IoT system and a mobile app, Bikeep stations are monitored and allow users to instantly lock and unlock their bikes with just one swipe. 

Bikeep parking stations drastically reduce bike theft and support the city’s existing transportation infrastructure. 

The company is operating in over 20 countries through partners or local subsidiaries and has over a decade of infrastructure expertise in smart parking industry.

Name: SMRT Trains
Description:
Welcome to the official LinkedIn page of SMRT Trains. Stay updated with the latest news, service updates, and innovations in Singapore's premier rail network. Our mission is to provide safe, reliable, and efficient train services to enhance your daily commute. 
 
Follow us for updates, sustainability initiatives, community engagement, and stories from our dedicated team. Join us as we work together to improve the public transport experience in Singapore.

Name: MyPickup
Description:
MyPickup provides subscription based electric auto-rickshaw service for daily commutes to office-goers, school children, etc. With this idea we aim to disrupt the way people go to their workplace/school everyday.

There are 3 problems we are trying to solve with this service 
1. Cab booking time (10-12 min per day), Cab cancellations and acceptance during peak hours is a huge issue for daily commuters
2. School buses across Indian schools are under-utilized assets. Thus almost 30% of the annual education cost goes into student transportation
3.  3-wheeler ICE (Diesel/CNG/LPG) based autos which are plying in Indian cities release anywhere between ~1m to 2m tons of CO2 annually along with hazardous NO2 and PM 10

Name: STRIDES
Description:
We are STRIDES. Driving urban mobility through digitalisation, decarbonisation and demand.
 
As a business arm of SMRT Corporation Ltd, we are able to transfer our capabilities as Singapore’s pioneer public transport operator. While cities continue to grow and evolve, the need for sustainable, efficient transportation options has become more important than ever. Leveraging on over 40 years of experience operating and maintaining major public transport infrastructure at home and abroad, STRIDES provides multi-modal urban mobility solutions and services that deliver safe, reliable and comfortable journeys, and exceptional experiences.
 
At our core, we are committed to making a positive impact on the world through sustainable, forward thinking urban mobility solutions and services. Join us in our mission to create a better future for all.

Visit our website to learn more about how we can support urban mobility transformation - https://strides.com.sg

Name: Keolis Dijon Multimodalité
Description:
Keolis Dijon Multimodalité, filiale du Groupe Keolis, est en charge de l’exploitation du réseau DiviaMobilités.
Fin 2022, Dijon métropole a renouvelé sa confiance au groupe Keolis en lui attribuant la gestion des services de mobilité pour une durée de 7 ans.

La réussite de Keolis Dijon Multimodalité repose sur ses équipes et leur savoir-faire. Ce sont elles qui gèrent l'ensemble de la chaîne du voyage pour le compte de Dijon métropole : bus, tramway, vélo, mais également parking et stationnement depuis 2017.

En 2017, Keolis Dijon Mobilités compte 729 salariés, dont 494 conducteurs et conductrices de bus et tramway.

C'est grâce à leur sens du service que plus 46,1 millions de voyages ont été réalisés dans les meilleures conditions, en 2017.

Name: SimplyGo Pte. Ltd.
Description:
A wholly owned subsidiary of the Land Transport Authority (LTA), SimplyGo Pte. Ltd. provides transit ticketing and travel card-related services.

A key player in the Singapore public transport ecosystem, we act as an intermediary between commuters and stakeholders such as regulators, public transport operators and card issuers.

Our innovative initiatives simplify journeys while creating value for commuters. Through the SimplyGo app, we ensure seamless customer journeys via trusted payment solutions and ticketing services.

Name: SOU Transportes
Description:
SOU Transportes é uma empresa brasileira atuante no setor de transporte urbano municipal e transporte escolar 
nas cidades de Americana, Amparo, Atibaia, Campinas, Caraguatatuba, Cubatão, Indaiatuba, Itanhaém, Jarinu, Limeira, Mogi Guaçu, Mogi Mirim, Palmas, Paulínia, Peruíbe, Presidente Prudente, Rio Claro, Salto, São Carlos, São José Dos Campos, São Vicente, São Sebastião, Ubatuba e Valinhos.

Temos como Missão fornecer um transporte seguro, confiável e eficiente nas cidades em que operamos. Buscamos conectar pessoas, promover a mobilidade urbana sustentável e contribuir para o desenvolvimento das cidades brasileiras, revolucionando o transporte público no Brasil.

Nossa Visão é seremos reconhecida como empresa de ponta no transporte coletivo, destacando-nos pela excelência operacional, inovação contínua e compromisso com a satisfação dos usuários e o bem-estar.

Nossos Valores são:
Segurança: Priorizamos a segurança dos passageiros, motoristas e pedestres em todas as nossas operações.
Confiabilidade: Cumprimos nossos compromissos e garantimos um serviço confiável e pontual.
Sustentabilidade: Nosso compromisso com o meio ambiente se reflete em práticas sustentáveis, como a redução de emissões e o uso eficiente de recursos.
Respeito: Respeitamos a diversidade, a dignidade e os direitos de todas as pessoas, dentro e fora da empresa.
Excelência: Buscamos a excelência em tudo o que fazemos, desde a manutenção de nossa frota até o atendimento ao cliente.
Colaboração: Valorizamos o trabalho em equipe e a colaboração entre colegas, clientes e parceiros para alcançar nossos objetivos comuns.
Responsabilidade Social: Contribuímos para o desenvolvimento das comunidades em que atuamos, apoiando iniciativas sociais e promovendo a inclusão e a igualdade de oportunidades.

Name: Edinburgh Trams
Description:
Edinburgh Trams is the award winning operator of the City’s tramway. We offer fast and frequent services between Edinburgh Airport and Newhaven.

Edinburgh Trams works in partnership with Lothian Buses as part of Transport for Edinburgh - the company set up to provide integrated transport across the City.

Our vision is to be an integral part of the future success of Edinburgh and the Lothians by providing world-class, environmentally-friendly and socially-inclusive transport.

We believe that if we are true to our Values by being Trusted, Innovative, Passionate & Smart - our companies and our customers can look forward to great success.

Name: Negocios Metro de Medellín
Description:
Direccionamos los negocios no tarifarios del Metro de Medellín, a través de 3 líneas: medios de pago, consultorías y formaciones y negocios de captura de valor, para continuar construyendo modelos de relación positivos con el entorno, la sociedad y el planeta.

Somos motor de crecimiento, progreso y calidad de vida.

Name: European Parking Association (EPA aisbl)
Description:
The European Parking Association (EPA), founded in 1983, is the umbrella organisation for European parking associations. EPA national members associations (Full Members) represent the parking sector which consists of private companies and public bodies that are operating and managing on- and off-street parking structures and services. EPA Corporate Members represent the major operators and supply industry that offers all related products and services concerned with parking. 

EPA plays a leading role in the reinvention of parking as a mobility service and parking as a mobility platform, aiming to facilitate cooperation between the professional parking organisations of different European countries, providing networking opportunities and the exchange and mutual support of professional experience amongst its members.

Name: RBU Santiago
Description: Somos RBU Santiago y nos movemos contigo para crecer juntos y avanzar así en la construcción de una experiencia de cercanía, calidad y de conectividad entre nosotros como personas y con nuestros usuarios y usuarias.

Name: WiBLE Spain
Description:
WiBLE es un servicio de carsharing actualmente presente en Madrid. La empresa está participada al 50% por dos grandes empresas como son Repsol y Kia.

WiBLE nace con el objetivo, más aún, la responsabilidad, de liderar un cambio y ofrecer una alternativa al transporte urbano en la Comunidad de Madrid. Lo hace cargado de ilusión y optimismo, y con la libertad de quien se sabe innovador, en posesión de las herramientas necesarias y no le preocupa arriesgarse. Nuestra meta es llegar más allá, ofreciendo calidad y flexibilidad. Y con una firme idea: garantizar a todos los ciudadanos el acceso a un servicio óptimo, personalizado y de calidad, pero también, asequible.

Name: Arriva Sverige AB
Description:
Arriva är en av Europas ledande operatörer inom kollektivtrafiken. I Sverige hjälper vi cirka 170 miljoner resenärer varje år att komma fram till sina resmål. Med cirka 3 900 medarbetare, 900 bussar, 150 tåg och 90 spårvagnar skapar vi moderna transportlösningar där säkerheten alltid kommer i första hand. Som resenär hos Arriva ska du uppleva att vi gör allt för att din resa ska kännas trygg och ha service av hög kvalitet. Året runt – dygnet runt – fram och tillbaka.

Arriva Sverige är en del av Europas största koncern för persontrafik – Deutsche Bahn. Det gör det möjligt för oss att kombinera det mindre företagets snabba anpassningsförmåga med stabiliteten och kunskapen hos det stora moderbolaget. Vi uppfattar oss som en seriös utmanare på den svenska kollektivtrafikmarknaden med ambitionen att kontinuerligt vinna nya marknadsandelar. Det åstadkommer vi genom att alltid se möjligheterna till nya innovativa lösningar som får ännu fler människor att resa kollektivt.

Hoppas att du vill vara med på vår resa.

Name: Transppass - Transporte de Passageiros Ltda
Viação Metrópole Paulista
Description:
A Viação Metrópole Paulista é uma empresa dedicada a fornecer serviços de transporte coletivo eficientes e confiáveis na cidade de São Paulo, a maior metrópole do Brasil, para atender as necessidades de deslocamento da população.

Atuamos nos subsistemas estrutural e local de articulação regional de ônibus municipais. Nossos ônibus são caracterizados pela cor amarela na área 3 – Nordeste e pela cor bordô (vinho) na área 7 – Sudoeste da capital paulista.

Name: Wiener Lokalbahnen
Description: Die Wiener Lokalbahnen sind Betreiber der Badner Bahn, mehrerer Buslinien in Wien und von Zügen auf externer Infrastruktur durch ganz Österreich und darüber hinaus. Über Tochterfirmen wickeln wir europaweite Schienen-Gütertransporte ab und bringen Menschen mit eingeschränkter Mobilität mit rollstuhlgerechten Kleinbussen an ihr Ziel.

Name: GoTriangle
Description: GoTriangle (formerly Triangle Transit) improves our region’s quality of life by connecting people and places with reliable, safe, and easy-to-use travel choices that reduce congestion and energy use, save money, and promote sustainability, healthier lifestyles, and a more environmentally responsible community.

Name: Stuttgarter Straßenbahnen AG
Description: Für Menschen in Stuttgart mit ihren ganz individuellen Reisebedürfnissen ist die SSB als integrierter Mobilitätsdienstleister ein wesentlicher Garant für urbane Lebensqualität. Im Gegensatz zu allen anderen Mobilitätsalternativen bietet die SSB die Garantie sicher, schnell, pünktlich und entspannt anzukommen. Mit ihrem Personal, ihren Fahrzeugen und ihrer Infrastruktur ist die SSB für die Stuttgarter Bürger und Besucher das Gesicht der Mobilität in Stuttgart.

Name: Association pour le Développement des Transports Collectifs en Touraine (ADTT)
Description:
Défense des usagers et promotion des transports collectifs en Touraine. Pour une transition écologique socialement et territorialement équitable.
Association membre de la FNAUT (https://fnaut.fr) et de la SEPANT (https://sepant.fr)

Name: Haiti Metro & Infrastructure Authority
Description:
HMAI is the massive commuter rail network and task force that transforms Haiti’s transit and transport systems into a major economic hub and facilitates adoption of mass transit systems with high-speed trains, electric fleets of cars, and mass bus transit  along different transport networks, projects, and authorities. With acquisitions of land, public transport systems, and roads and highways from government agencies, HMAI is ready to expand its infrastructure portfolio. 

To do this, we hire global sustainable development consultancy firms like Arup, HNTB, Skanka, AECOM, China Railway, Egis and Rail Network for technical expertise and infrastructure development to help transform Haiti’s mass transport economy with rail networks, systems, and segments managed by our various independent agencies and economic organizations : Greater North &West Haiti Area (GNWHA ), Greater South & East Haiti Area(GSEHA), GO Haiti Transport ( GHT), Haiti TaP TAp Authority( HTTA) , Haiti Bus System Federation( HBDF), Haiti International Airways Council ( HIAC) ), Haiti Transit Authority(HTA), Haiti Rest Area Management Company(HRAMC), Haiti Toll Management System(HTMS) , Haiti Public Safety Transport Agency ( HPSTA ) and so on...

All agencies can operate with multi-year phase  the modern projects and deliver under a Progressive Design-Build-Operate-Maintain procurement model in a 10-30 year design, development, management and implementation phase. The technical expertise, development and implementation can facilitate a significant expansion and economic development due to mass transit adoption of light speed train, Bus fleet, Tap Tap fleet, Truck fleet, and Air Traffic Management. 

All projects include highways and interstates infrastructure, railway networks, bus lines management service, commercial hubs and networks, civil works, signaling...
AMT is to provide safe and reliable transport to fast-growing cities and towns in Haiti’s major metropolitan regions .

Name: Active Travel Imagination
Description: See local street with better bike lanes.

Name: CHAMA E PRONTO Transporte por Aplicativo
Description:
A CHAMA E PRONTO Transporte por Aplicativo é uma empresa de transporte por aplicativo que nasceu para transformar a mobilidade com propósito: mais justiça para motoristas e mais segurança para passageiros.

Enquanto outros aplicativos ficam com quase metade do valor das corridas, aqui o motorista recebe 82% do valor, sem taxas abusivas ou burocracia. Acreditamos que quem faz o transporte acontecer merece valorização de verdade.

Para quem viaja, oferecemos um serviço acessível, humano e confiável. Corridas seguras, atendimento de qualidade e uma experiência tranquila fazem parte do nosso compromisso com cada passageiro.

Nosso diferencial está na proximidade e transparência. A CHAMA E PRONTO conecta pessoas reais, com necessidades reais, promovendo uma mobilidade justa, responsável e feita por quem se importa.

Na CHAMA E PRONTO, cada corrida conta uma história de confiança, parceria e oportunidade.

Mobilidade justa começa aqui.

Name: Association pour le transport collectif de Laval
Description: L'Association pour le transport collectif de Laval a pour mandat de militer pour une amélioration de la desserte en transport collectif sur le territoire de la Ville de Laval

Name: Moove IT
Description:
Moove è un'azienda leader nella micro mobilità condivisa. Siamo un'azienda presente in 20 città europee.

Mettiamo a vostra disposizione: bici, scooter e monopattini, tutti elettrici.

I mezzi sono liberamente parcheggiati in città e sono a disposizione di cittadini e turisti. Per utilizzare un mezzo è necessario scaricare l’app, attivare la geolocalizzazione e prenotare il mezzo desiderato più vicino. Si può scegliere tra tariffa oraria, giornaliera o abbonamento mensile.

Name: BUGA APP
Description:
BUGA es una plataforma tecnológica de transporte bajo demanda que conecta a conductores privados con usuarios que necesitan moverse de forma segura, rápida y asequible en Guinea Ecuatorial. 

A través de una aplicación móvil intuitiva, BUGA ofrece una experiencia de viaje optimizada con tarifas claras, rastreo en tiempo real y métodos de pago flexibles.

Además, BUGA impulsa la economía local creando oportunidades tanto para conductores independientes como para propietarios de vehículos que desean rentabilizar sus recursos con total trazabilidad y control.

Nuestra comunidad BUGA Drivers cuenta con formación, asistencia técnica y acceso a estadísticas detalladas de sus ingresos, lo que permite gestionar su trabajo como verdaderos profesionales del transporte.

Con BUGA, la movilidad urbana evoluciona, se digitaliza y se vuelve más inclusiva.

- Para moverte.
- Para trabajar.
- Para crecer.

BUGA – Personas Moviendo Personas.

Name: data entry seller at Fiverr and Upwork
Description: A Data Entry Service Provider on platforms like Fiverr and Upwork is a digital artisan who specializes in transforming raw data into organized, structured, and actionable information. In the bustling online marketplace, they play a pivotal role in helping businesses and individuals make informed decisions by managing and processing data efficiently.

Notre mission à SOCIETE AIT LAMINE TRANS s.a.r.l au est simple : fournir des services de grande qualité à nos clients. Notre équipe fait tout pour répondre aux besoins spécifiques de chaque projet. Name: Centro Prove ATP
Description:
Il Centro Prove ATP opera da 38 anni nel rinnovo di veicoli refrigerati per trasporto specifico ATP.

Centro prova autorizzato dal Ministero Dei Trasporti per il rilascio dei rapporti di prova ATP e successivo rilascio dell’attestato ATP.

Name: UnoStrappo
Description:
Hai mai pensato che il tragitto quotidiano potesse essere la parte più divertente della giornata?

UnoStrappo è l’app di carpooling che trasforma il viaggio in un’esperienza unica: condividi l’auto con persone che fanno il tuo stesso percorso, dividi i costi, conosci nuova gente e contribuisci a ridurre traffico e inquinamento.
	•	Sostenibile, economico e sociale. Con UnoStrappo ogni viaggio è così piacevole che vorrai duri più a lungo!

Name: Mefline
Description:
Mefline, taşımacılık ve turizm sektöründe 10 yılı aşkın deneyimiyle, kurumlara yönelik güvenilir, planlı ve sürdürülebilir ulaşım çözümleri sunmaktadır.

Faaliyet alanlarımız; öğrenci ve personel taşımacılığı, VIP transfer, turizm taşımacılığı gibi çok yönlü taşımacılık ihtiyaçlarını kapsamakta ve bu süreçlerin her aşamasında profesyonellik, güvenlik ve kalite standartlarıyla hareket edilmektedir.

İş ortaklarımıza;
 Zamanında ve kesintisiz hizmet,
 İş sağlığı ve güvenliği odaklı operasyonlar,
 Müşteri memnuniyetini esas alan bir hizmet anlayışı,
 Sürdürülebilirlik ve maliyet verimliliği

sunarak, ulaşım süreçlerini yönetilebilir ve sorunsuz hale getiriyoruz.

Name: Safiri Express
Description:
Safiri Express is a transportation network company, transforming public transport in major cities across Africa, starting with Nairobi, Kenya. We orchestrate daily commutes for thousands of city resident’s using our Mobility Operating Platform – MOP, that keeps the public transport sector moving - from Demand Aggregation, Supply Consistency, Service Scheduling, Promotion, Matching, Notifications, Tracking, Inventory Standardization, Route Pricing, Payments, Quality of Service, Reviews and Compliance.

Our edge is that we use technology and local knowledge on business operations plus culture to build compelling transit experiences delivering value to you our commute customers, service partners and investors.

Name: Routes and Jobs
Description: Routes and Jobs, a workforce rideshare platform designed to bridge the gap between job placement and reliable transportation.

Name: Gesmovial
Description: Impulsamos una movilidad segura y eficiente. Asesoría técnica, PEVS, ISO, capacitación y cumplimiento legal. Menos riesgos, menos siniestros, más eficiencia. Transforma tu empresa con expertos en seguridad vial!

Name: Consórcio BUS+
Description: Serviços de transportes coletivo metropolitano na região metropolitana de Campinas/SP - RMC

XSELL, c’est une équipe de passionnés avec un véritable savoir-faire depuis 30 ans dans :

Name: OTV Operadora de Transporte Vivebús Chihuahua
Description:

Name: Kaplan Turizm
Description:
Personel Taşımacılığı Hizmetleri ile İş Gücünüzün Performansını Artırın

Şirketimiz, kurumsal taşımacılık sektöründe uzun yıllara dayanan deneyimi ve müşteri memnuniyeti odaklı hizmet anlayışıyla faaliyet göstermektedir. Özel olarak tasarlanmış personel taşımacılığı hizmetlerimiz, işletmelerin çalışanlarını güvenli, konforlu ve zamanında iş yerlerine ulaştırmasını hedefler. Alanında uzman ekibimiz, teknolojik altyapımız ve geniş araç filomuzla müşterilerimize yenilikçi ve güvenilir çözümler sunmaktayız.

Hizmetimizin Temel Amaçları
Personel taşımacılığı, yalnızca bir ulaşım hizmeti değil, aynı zamanda iş verimliliğini artırmayı amaçlayan stratejik bir çözüm olarak görülmelidir. Çalışanların güvenli bir şekilde iş yerlerine ulaşması, işletmelerin operasyonel süreçlerini aksatmadan sürdürmesine olanak tanır.

Hizmetimiz, şu alanlarda fark yaratmayı hedefler:

Zaman Yönetimi: Çalışanlarınız belirlenen saatlerde iş yerinde hazır bulunur.
Konfor ve Güvenlik: Modern araçlarımız, çalışanlarınıza rahat bir yolculuk sunarken, güvenlik önlemleriyle riskleri minimuma indirir.
Motivasyon Artışı: Stresli bir yolculuk yerine konforlu bir seyahat, personelinize iş günü boyunca yüksek motivasyon sağlar.
Neden Bizi Tercih Etmelisiniz?
Geniş Araç Filosu: Çeşitli ihtiyaçlara uygun minibüs, midibüs ve otobüslerden oluşan filomuz, çalışan sayınıza ve taleplerinize göre özelleştirilebilir.
Uzman Kadro: Sertifikalı ve deneyimli şoförlerimiz, trafik güvenliğini önceliklendirir ve her yolculukta profesyonel bir hizmet sunar.
Teknolojik Altyapı: Araç takip sistemlerimiz sayesinde tüm araçlarımızın konumunu ve güzergahlarını gerçek zamanlı olarak izleyebilirsiniz.
Esnek Çözümler: Farklı güzergah ve saatlerde hizmet sunarak firmanızın ihtiyaçlarına tam uyum sağlıyoruz.

Bizimle iletişime geçin ve personel taşımacılığı hizmetlerimizden faydalanmaya bugün başlayın!

Konceptet vil styrke det tværkommunale samarbejde, give mulighed for at høste synergier og besparelser i driften og øge driftssikkerheden på de enkelte færgeoverfarter samt bidrage væsentligt til Danmarks CO2 reduktion.

Konceptet leveres af Danske Standardfærger, der er udviklet af Maritime Equity Partners og OMT.

Name: SERVICIO METROPOLITANO DEL GOLFO SA DE CV
Hampercar Mobility
Description:
Hampercar Mobility develops compact and accessible vehicle platforms that enable wheelchair users and individuals with reduced mobility to enter, drive, and exit the vehicle independently, without the need for external assistance. Beyond mechanical accessibility, Hampercar aims to deliver a safe and sustainable user experience through software-based control systems, intelligent interfaces, and secure electronic infrastructures.

Throughout the vehicle development and production process, Hampercar prioritizes compliance with European regulations, functional safety, and digital system security. Our vehicles incorporate embedded software architectures, control systems, and electronic components designed in alignment with EU standards related to automotive safety and durability.

Our mission is to close the mobility gap by combining assistive technologies, user-centered design, sustainable engineering, and secure software systems. Hampercar believes that accessibility, safety, and digital trust must coexist in next-generation mobility solutions.

The company operates at the intersection of accessible mobility, automotive technologies, software-driven systems, and social impact, collaborating with public institutions, innovation programs, and mobility stakeholders to develop scalable, regulation-compliant, and future-ready vehicle solutions.

Somos un negocio familiar ubicado en Martínez con una sólida experiencia en transporte de cargas.

•	Manejo de carga: Experiencia en la carga y descarga de mercancías de manera segura y eficiente, cumpliendo con todas las normativas de seguridad.
•	Comunicación: Coordinación efectiva con clientes para garantizar una experiencia de servicio al cliente de alta calidad.
•	Documentación: Manejo de documentación relacionada con el transporte, conocimientos de normativas.
•	Resolución de problemas: Aptitud para identificar y resolver problemas de manera proactiva, asegurando la continuidad y eficiencia del proceso de transporte.
Nuestros servicios
•	Transporte interjurisdiccional: Servicios de transporte de cargas en toda el AMBA con posibilidad de realizar viajes al interior adaptados a las necesidades específicas de cada cliente.
•	Cumplimiento normativo: Aseguramos el cumplimiento con todas las normativas de seguridad y regulaciones vigentes en el transporte de mercancías.
Ventajas de colaborar con nosotros
•	Eficiencia, seguridad y puntualidad: Para nuestro enfoque en la optimización de rutas y procesos utilizamos rastreo satelital para el seguimiento y gestión de cargas, proporcionando visibilidad completa del proceso que nos permite ofrecer servicios de transporte seguros, confiables y eficientes de sus mercancías.
•	Atención personalizada: Ofrecemos un servicio al cliente dedicado a atender sus necesidades y resolver cualquier inquietud de manera rápida.

Name: Drivehome
Description:
Drivehome: Your Car, Your Safety, Anytime, Anywhere

Who We Are
Drivehome is an innovative app offering on-demand driver services. Our mission is simple yet ambitious: to make roads safer by providing practical solutions for those who cannot or prefer not to drive.

What We Do
We connect users with reliable drivers who drive their vehicles, ensuring a safe and worry-free journey home. Whether due to fatigue, social events, or long trips, Drivehome empowers users to make responsible travel choices.

Our Vision
We envision a world free of road accidents, where every driver has access to a safe alternative. Through smart technology and a network of qualified drivers, we aim to promote a culture of responsible driving.

Why Drivehome?

+ Safety: Prevents risky behaviors like driving under the influence or when fatigued.
+ Convenience: A tailored service for getting home without compromises.
+ Innovation: Advanced technology to optimize user-driver connections.
+ Community: Every Drivehome trip contributes to safer roads for all.

Join Us
Drivehome is more than an app—it’s a movement for road safety. We are looking for:

+ Users: Download the app and make a responsible choice.
+ Drivers: Join our network and help ensure safe journeys.
+ Investors: Support a project with a real social impact.
+ Partners: Collaborate with us to promote road safety.

Visit our website: www.drivehome.it
Follow us for updates and initiatives.

Drivehome: A Responsible Choice, A Safer Road.

Name: InfinX Mobility
Description:
InfinX Mobility est une entreprise innovante de mobilité Franco-Africaine qui favorise l’adoption de motos 100% électrique grâce à sa plateforme de micro-leasing flexible et son réseau de stations de recharge/swapping de batteries. Notre solution vise à réduire de près de 40% les coûts d’exploitation des professionnels de la livraison, tout en contribuant à la lutte contre le changement climatique et à la réduction de la pollution urbaine.
Face à l'augmentation des coûts d'exploitation liés aux véhicules thermiques et à la nécessité de réduire l'empreinte carbone, InfinX propose une alternative durable et économique : un logiciel de gestion de flotte, des stations de recharge de proximité et des motos électriques performantes équipées de batteries échangeables, conçues pour le contexte africain. Une approche qui vise à éliminer les contraintes liées à la recharge et à l'autonomie, facilitant ainsi la transition des utilisateurs vers une mobilité plus durable


InfinX Mobility is an innovative Franco-African mobility company driving the adoption of 100% electric motorcycles through a flexible micro-leasing platform and a growing network of battery charging and swapping stations. Our solution is designed to cut operating costs for delivery professionals by up to 40%, while actively contributing to the fight against climate change and the reduction of urban air pollution.

In response to the rising operational expenses of internal combustion vehicles and the urgent need to lower carbon emissions, InfinX offers a sustainable, cost-effective alternative. Our integrated approach combines intelligent fleet management software, locally deployed charging infrastructure, and high-performance electric motorcycles with swappable batteries—engineered specifically for the African market. This model eliminates concerns around range and charging downtime, making the transition to cleaner mobility both seamless and accessible.

Name: Bloo
Description:

Nous nous engageons à offrir à nos passagers des trajets sécurisés, confortables et abordables, tout en valorisant nos chauffeurs.

En éliminant les commissions, nous permettons à nos chauffeurs de garder 100% des revenus générés par leurs courses, favorisant ainsi une relation de collaboration juste et équitable.

 La sécurité est notre priorité absolue. Nous avons mis en place des normes strictes pour garantir des trajets fiables et sécurisés. De plus, nos véhicules sont équipés de services premium, vous offrant ainsi une expérience de transport confortable et agréable à chaque instant.

Chez Bloo, nous nous engageons à proposer des trajets au prix juste. Notre transparence tarifaire vous assure que vous payez un tarif compétitif et équitable pour chaque course. Nous croyons que la qualité du service ne devrait pas être compromise par des tarifs excessifs, c'est pourquoi nous nous efforçons de vous offrir un excellent rapport qualité-prix.

Avec Bloo, vous découvrirez une nouvelle génération de VTC, alliant innovation, fiabilité et satisfaction client.

 Rejoignez-nous dès maintenant et découvrez une expérience de transport nouvelle génération, où chaque trajet est synonyme d'excellence à un prix juste.

Name: Marconi Express
Description:
Marconi Express è la prima monorotaia in Italia a connettere la rete dell’Alta velocità ferroviaria con uno tra i primi 10 aeroporti nazionali per traffico di passeggeri. Collega infatti l’aeroporto Marconi (settimo scalo italiano con 9,4 milioni di passeggeri nel 2019) con l’Alta velocità e con il centro di Bologna grazie al terminal presso la stazione FS, centro nevralgico delle linee ferroviarie nazionali dove ogni anno transitano oltre 50 milioni di passeggeri.

Marconi Express è un sistema di trasporto di massa a guida vincolata e integralmente automatizzato, cioè senza conducente a bordo. Il tracciato scorre su una via di corsa lunga 5 km in sopraelevazione, quindi senza interferenze con il traffico stradale.

A metà tracciato è presente la stazione intermedia Lazzaretto che ospita la centrale operativa (OCC), il “cervello” del sistema da cui gli operatori controllano i veicoli. Vi sono collocate anche le rimesse e le cabine elettriche di trasformazione per alimentare le navette.

I 1.904 pannelli fotovoltaici, installati sul parapetto della passerella di sicurezza lungo la via di corsa, forniscono circa il 35% del fabbisogno energetico dell’infrastruttura. Tale produzione di energia solare equivale a una riduzione di circa 300 tonnellate di CO2 oppure a 14.000 alberi in più. La restante energia necessaria al funzionamento del sistema è attualmente reperita sul mercato da fornitori green certificati.

Marconi Express Spa è la società di scopo nata per la progettazione, la costruzione e la gestione dell’opera in project financing. La società è composta da Consorzio Integra Società Cooperativa (75%) e da TPER-Trasporto Passeggeri Emilia-Romagna (25%).

Name: Umi Go
Description:
Umi Go is building Australia’s next-generation green mobility ecosystem — a unified platform that empowers professional drivers, businesses, and everyday Australians with affordable, reliable, and sustainable transport solutions.

At the core of our model is car subscription, a smarter alternative to traditional car ownership and leasing. Umi Go provides; Rideshare-ready subscriptions for Uber, DiDi and delivery drivers, Business fleet subscriptions for companies seeking flexibility and cost efficiency, Personal-use subscriptions offering an affordable, convenient, hassle-free way to drive. 

Every subscription is all-inclusive, covering registration, CTP, insurance, maintenance, servicing, roadside assistance, and dedicated support — delivering a truly worry-free, drive-today experience.

Beyond vehicles, Umi Go integrates a full mobility ecosystem: fleet management technology, subscription billing, driver onboarding systems, repairs, charging partnerships, and platform-wide benefits — all in one seamless digital platform.

Our fleet features hybrid and electric vehicles from Toyota, BYD and other trusted brands, supporting Australia’s transition toward cleaner transport while ensuring drivers enjoy performance, safety, and value.

With a roadmap to scale beyond 10,000 vehicles across Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, and Perth, and expansions planned throughout Australia and the Asia-Pacific region, Umi Go is redefining modern mobility — making sustainable transport more accessible, more flexible, and more empowering for everyone.

Backed by over two decades of industry experience, deep operational capability, and strong industry partnerships, Umi Go is leading Australia’s transition toward smarter, cleaner, and more inclusive mobility.
