Ofrecemos herramientas sencillas y eficaces para que las flotillas de transporte controlen asignaciones y restricciones, permitiéndoles mejorar la eficiencia operativa y lograr ahorros significativos.

Contáctanos a través de nuestra página web o llamando a nuestro número telefónico 800 810 0011.

Name: Mobilix
Description:
På Mobilix förstår vi hur svensk kollektivtrafik fungerar och dess största utmaning: att få fler att resa kollektivt. Från integrering av olika biljettsystem för privata och företagsresor, optimering av rutter och busshållplatser uppkopplade med IoT till att få rätt reseinformation på rätt plats i rätt tid – vi gör det komplexa enkelt. 

Vi tror att kollektivt resande är en nyckel för att nå de miljörelaterade hållbarhetsmålen i Agenda 2030. Därför utvecklar vi smarta verktyg som effektiviserar planering, visualisering, analys och utveckling av resandet. Vår breda produktportfölj hjälper trafikutvecklare, trafikplanerare, kundtjänstmedarbetare och ledningsgrupper ta bättre beslut och skapa ett konkurrenskraftigt alternativ till ensamresande.

Name: MotoGo
Description:
MotoGo es la primera app de motos por suscripción en Venezuela.

Facilitamos la movilidad de miles de personas a través de un modelo simple: alquilar una moto lista para rodar, con seguro, mantenimiento y asistencia vial incluidos, todo gestionado desde una app.

Creemos que la movilidad no debe ser un privilegio, sino una herramienta de progreso. Por eso construimos una plataforma que une tecnología, automatización y acceso financiero para que cualquier persona pueda trabajar, emprender o moverse sin barreras.

En MotoGo estamos redefiniendo cómo se mueve el país: con innovación, propósito y un equipo que quiere transformar la movilidad urbana en Latinoamérica.

Name: ENTRASER
Description:
Entreprise leader algérien du Transport du Personnel.
Entreprise proposant des prestations de transport par autobus à travers le territoire national algérien ainsi que la location en moyennes et longues durées, de véhicules touristiques et véhicules tous-terrains, pick-ups 4x4 au entreprises.

Name: Sekka
Description: Sekka is an urban transit service, specializing in formalizing informal transport and providing first and last mile transport services for the masses.

Name: Zweckverband Regional-Stadtbahn Neckar-Alb
Description: Die Regional-Stadtbahn Neckar-Alb ist ein Schienenverkehrsprojekt, bei dem Städte und Gemeinden in der Region Neckar-Alb durch eine Zweisystem-Stadtbahn verbunden werden. Dabei werden die im Umland bestehenden Eisenbahnstrecken genutzt und ausgebaut und mit den Innenstadtbereichen über Straßenbahnstrecken verbunden, die dort die Feinerschließung sicherstellen.

Name: VanO
Description:
VanO développe une solution de mobilité quotidienne partagée - inclusive et écologique - en commune moyenne, ou zone de moyenne densité,  regroupant entre 20 et 80 000 personnes. 
Le service proposé à l’ensemble des usagers :  habitants, salariés, consommateurs, étudiants, touristes etc.., permet de se déplacer facilement sur le territoire couvert 7 jours sur 7. Une large amplitude horaire, du premier au dernier train, permet d’assurer un service de qualité pour les usagers qui effectuent quotidiennement des déplacements pendulaires (trajets domicile-travail ou domicile-formation).

Name: Hagener Straßenbahn AG
Description:
Wir sind die Hagener Straßenbahn AG (kurz: HST). Die HST sorgt als kommunales Verkehrsunternehmen mit engagierten Mitarbeitenden für einen modernen öffentlichen Nahverkehr in Hagen und Umgebung. Mit unserer Busflotte legen wir jährlich etwa zehn Millionen Kilometer zurück und bringen auf diesen Wegen rund 21 Millionen Fahrgäste an ihr Ziel. Unser Fuhrpark ist jung, komfortabel und setzt immer mehr auf Nachhaltigkeit. Seit 2007 gehören wir der HVG-Gruppe an.

Gestalten Sie den Nahverkehr in Hagen mit und kommen Sie in unser Team! Wir bieten:

• Attraktive Vergütung und Leistungen nach dem Tarifvertrag TV-N NW
• Geregelte Arbeitszeit (39 Std./Woche bei Vollzeitbeschäftigung, Teilzeit oder Aushilfstätigkeit ist möglich)
• Möglichkeiten zur individuellen Sprachförderung
• Vielseitige Angebote im Rahmen des Betrieblichen Gesundheitsmanagements
• Zusätzliche betriebliche Altersvorsorge
• Individuelle Personalentwicklungsmöglichkeiten

Wir bilden auch aus: zur Fachkraft im Fahrbetrieb, zum/zur Berufskraftfahrer*in und Kraftfahrzeugmechatroniker*in. Darüber hinaus gibt es innerhalb der HVG-Gruppe noch eine Vielzahl interessanter Ausbildungsberufe in einem attraktiven Umfeld.

Impressum: https://www.hst-hagen.de/impressum
Datenschutz: https://www.hst-hagen.de/datenschutz

Name: PRS Parkraum Service GmbH
Description: PRS kooperiert mit Städten, Gemeinden und privaten Auftraggebern in der Bereitstellung von technischen Systemen zur Überwachung der Parkzeit sowie deren Betrieb und Wartung. Der technische Service und die Kontrolle des ruhenden Verkehrs sind wesentliche Bausteine der Parkraumbewirtschaftung.

Name: mobiswag
Description:
Le spécialiste vélo pour les entreprises et collectivités.

Nous accompagnons nos clients pour intégrer le vélo comme un mode de déplacement complémentaire aux moyens traditionnels sur les petits déplacements:

- vélos de fonction : trajet domicile travail et usage personnel,
- vélos de sociétés partagés pour les collaborateurs,
- Mise à disposition de vélos pour de l'évènementiel: vélo électrique, vélo cargo et autres types de vélos
- Flotte de vélos pour hôtels, hébergement touristique et office de tourisme.
Services proposés : Vente, Location courte ou longue durée, mise à disposition et contrat d'entretien sur site.

Prestations réalisées en Auvergne Rhône Alpes. 

Nos références : Crédit Agricole Loire Haute Loire, Ecole des Mines de Saint Etienne, ENISE, Ville de l'Horme, Ville de la Ricamarie, Loire Tourisme.

Name: Auto Rickshaw Drivers' Union
Description:
Established in 1974, Auto Rickshaw Drivers Union (ARDU) supports the Driver community and educates them on their rights and responsibilities. ARDU strives to raise awareness and promote best practices amongst Drivers to provide reliable service to commuters.

ARDU is continuously working to inform drivers about their legal rights and also makes them aware of the applicable regulatory laws. This has equipped Drivers with the necessary knowledge to lead a dignified life as a responsible member of the society.

Today, autos are providing valuable service to Bengaluru citizens and helps them reach every nook and corner of the city, day and night. Autos are the extensively used mode after BMTC buses. ARDU is committed to continue to improve the services with a clear and committed customer focus. 

ARDU engages with both the State and Central Government to highlight the hardship issues of auto driver community. ARDU in its endeavour to digitally empower auto drivers recently collaborated with Juspay Technologies and successfully launched NammaYatri, the world's first open source mobilty App built on a open mobility platform using Beckn protocol. In the near future, ARDU will offer auto customers lastmile fares and multimodal fares on NammaYatri in collaboration with BMTC and BMRCL on the open mobility network.

Name: Quasar Mobility
Description: Buscamos dar soluciones de movilidad inteligentes en LATAM & UK. Venta y reparaciones de bicicletas eléctricas y scooters eléctricos.

Name: QYKBIKE MOBILITY
Description:
QYKBIKE is a micro-mobility company based out of Pune, India with our prime focus on providing cost-effective transportation solutions by renting & leasing Scooters, Bikes, Mopeds, Autorickshaws, Drones, Cars & Boats. 

At QYKBIKE, we believe that mobility is a fundamental right for commuters/ riders. The vision of QYK is to make micro-mobility accessible and affordable for everyone. We believe that access to micro-mobility can change the way people live by providing environmentally/ sustainable friendly transportation for all.

Our mission is to create a sustainable ecosystem of intra-urban micro-mobility infrastructure in India and disrupt the traditional automotive business model with a rideshare micro-mobility model and make micro-mobility affordable, accessible, and effortless for every Indian forever by believing that the best way to predict the future is to create it.

Name: Réseau Amelys - Keolis Montargis
Description: Bienvenue sur le réseau Amelys, réseau urbain de l'Agglomération Montargoise Et rives du loing, opéré par la SARL Keolis Montargis depuis plus de 40 ans !

Name: TEC Corporation
Description: Llevamos más de 27 años ofreciendo soluciones integrales para tránsito y seguridad vial en el Perú. Nuestros equipos incluyen semáforos tanto vehiculares como peatonales, controladores eléctricos de tránsito y equipos de infracción como cinemómetros y alcoholimetros. También instalamos y equipamos centros de monitoreo para el control de tránsito y seguridad ciudadana.

Name: BLOCK - Guards Your Ride
Description:
BLOCK is an urban tech startup from Budapest, Hungary founded by two young engineers and backed up by several organizations and experts. The company received $175k in its 4+ years of existence since february, 2019.

We ease urban micromobility riders' life by taking the burden of worrying off of their shoulders, whenever they lock their rather high value personal bicycle or scooter. Our solution prevents theft and speeds up the locking procedure by 3 times. 

Thanks to our novel rack design, we can achieve a sturdy 2-point locking with one simple motion. Scan the QR code, push your bike into the rack, then close the gate. That’s it! Your bicycle is now secured by the frame and the front wheel. There’s no need to carry heavy, expensive and bulky locks anymore. Why would you, if you have a smartphone in your pocket anyways! With BLOCK’s free App, there’s no more wasted time and dirty hands. One tap on the screen and your ride is in the safest hands.

Name: Link18 – Groupement AMOG de la L18 du Grand Paris Express
Description: Link18 est un groupement d’entreprises d’ingénierie et de conseil créé pour accompagner la Société du Grand Paris dans la réalisation de la ligne 18 du Grand Paris Express, qui reliera Orly à Versailles-Chantiers. Il réunit WSP (mandataire), Transamo, Algoé et GESTE Engineering, apportant en commun leur expertise en génie civil, en systèmes ferroviaires et en gestion de projet. Spécialisé en assistance à maîtrise d’ouvrage (AMO), Link18 veille à la coordination des travaux, au suivi du planning et à la qualité technique du futur métro automatique. Basé en Île-de-France, le consortium met son savoir-faire au service de la SGP jusqu’à la mise en service de l'intégralité de la ligne prévue en 2030. Sa communication s’adresse aux partenaires institutionnels et professionnels du secteur, ainsi qu’aux talents de l’ingénierie souhaitant rejoindre un projet de transport urbain d’envergure.

Name: SAHC SERVICE E.I.R.L
Description: Brindamos servicios con los altos estadares de calidad, pensando en el Bienestar de nuestros clientes.

Name: Saratthi Mobility Private Limited
Description: Saratthi Mobility Private Limited provides drivers instantly for customers that have their own car. Drivers can be booked through the Saratthi App available on iOS and Android.

Name: Western Reserve Transit Authority
Description: Western Reserve Transit Authority (WRTA) is the public transportation provider in Mahoning County, Ohio. WRTA employs over 100 team members in operations, customer service, maintenance and administration. We enhance the quality of life for the Mahoning Valley by providing innovative transportations solutions that are safe, dependable, cost-effective and customer focused, now and into the future. We are always just around your corner.

Name: Munich Telecommunication Services
Description: Established in 2008 as part of Abu Khader Group, Munich for telecom services delivers sustainable smart city solutions that are in-line with the best practices in world cities today. Our longstanding years in the “Intelligent Transportation System” and the deep understanding we have gained for the industry’s specific requirements & challenges enabled us to cover all operational cycles inside a completely incorporated ITS framework designing and executing state of the art solutions for our clients.

Name: Parking Cloud
Description: La nostra piattaforma è qui per semplificare la vita nella giungla urbana, mettendo in contatto chi ha un parcheggio privato da condividere e chi è alla ricerca del posto perfetto.

Name: Tylt Mobility
Description: TYLT Mobility is a Ev-first mobility ecosystem which provides sustainable mobility solutions to corporate companies and individuals.

Name: Delaware County Transit
Description: Delaware County Transit is a public transit agency owned and operated by the citizens of Delaware County. Funding for the Delaware County Transit comes in part from the Federal Transit Administration, Ohio Department of Transportation and SourcePoint.

Name: Viyn Mobility
Description:
Are you ready to join the revolution of sustainable transportation? The future is here, and it's electric! Say goodbye to gas prices and hello to more time with your loved ones.

At VIYN, we believe in driving change one mile at a time. With VIYN, you can experience the thrill of the open road while reducing your carbon footprint.

Our batteries are charged for success, and our commitment to sustainability is unmatched. Join the VIYN movement today and be a part of the solution to a cleaner, greener future.

Name: Moov'Hanoi
Description:
En 2022, la Région Île-de-France et la ville de Hanoï ont élaboré le programme « Moov’Hanoï », s’appuyant sur l’expertise de l’Institut Paris Région et d’Île-de-France Mobilités. Il vise à améliorer l’attractivité des transports en commun à Hanoï en apportant un appui pour développer l'intermodalité et mettre en œuvre une politique de mobilité multimodale. Le projet s’articule autour de 3 composantes principales :

    - Créer de la connaissance et des données concernant le trafic et la mobilité quotidienne des habitants de Hanoï pour développer une mobilité durable,
    - Accompagner Hanoï dans la réalisation et la mise en œuvre d’un plan de restructuration du réseau de bus publics,
    - Concevoir des principes d’aménagement des stations de transport en commun et de traitement de l’intermodalité.

Moov’Hanoï s’inscrit dans la continuité des actions de l’équipe France auprès du Comité Populaire de Hanoï en ce qui concerne la mobilité durable. La France finance, à travers l’Agence française de développement (AFD) et la DG Trésor, le projet de ligne de métro n°3, dont la coopération entre la Région Île-de-France et le Comité populaire de Hanoï est à l’origine.

Name: Mountain Line Flagstaff
Description: Mountain Line is the transit agency in northern Arizona operating fixed route bus service on nine routes, paratransit service, vanpool, and seasonal Mountain Express service to Arizona Snowbowl.

Name: Keolis Beaune Mobilités
Description: Keolis Beaune Mobilités, acteur du réseau Côte&Bus , le service transport de la communauté d'agglomération Beaune Côte et Sud

Name: UNNA Transporte
Description:
Somos la empresa a cargo de la operación de concesiones de infraestructura de transporte en el Perú. Contamos con más de 30 años de experiencia brindando soluciones de operación y mantenimiento de infraestructura vial y ferroviaria.

Gestionamos cuatro concesiones: Una concesión ferroviaria y tres concesiones viales de carreteras y autopistas.

En el ámbito ferroviario, operamos la Línea 1 del Metro de Lima, que recorre 34 kilómetros desde Villa El Salvador hasta San Juan de Lurigancho.

En el ámbito vial, operamos más de 3,700 kilómetros de las carreteras de Norvial, Survial y Canchaque a nivel nacional.

Name: Courriers Rhodaniens Lyon
Description:
Les Courriers Rhodaniens, votre partenaire de confiance en mobilité et transport en Rhône-Alpes, sur l’axe rhodanien.

Au quotidien, nous accompagnons collectivités et entreprises dans leurs besoins de déplacements, avec des solutions sur mesure : trajets locaux ou régionaux, transport de personnel, gestion de lignes régulières, dessertes locales, et même location d’autocars avec conducteur pour une flexibilité optimale.

Notre engagement ? Sécurité, confort et fiabilité pour des services de transport de haute qualité, adaptés à vos exigences.

Name: AggloBus Bourges
Description:
Bienvenue sur la page du réseau AggloBus ! 

Avec nos solutions de mobilité : bus, vélo, transport à la demande et services pour les personnes à mobilité réduite, nous facilitons vos déplacements au quotidien. 

Depuis septembre 2023, le réseau AggloBus est entièrement gratuit sur Bourges et son agglomération. Une initiative unique qui simplifie vos trajets et renforce l’accessibilité pour tous.  Ensemble, nous faisons de Bourges une ville plus connectée et durable.

Name: City Go
Description:
City Go is downtown Boise’s transportation management association and is here to help businesses, employees, and individuals with all of their transportation and parking needs. City Go is a program of Valley Regional Transit

Members get expert advice, planning, and program development aimed at promoting sustainable transportation. Members help shape the future of growth management and transportation infrastructure in Boise and the Treasure Valley through relevant programming, outreach, and advocacy. 

Whether you’re an employer who wants to provide transportation benefits to your employees or an individual looking for an easy way to get around downtown, City Go is the right place for you.

Name: Mujeres al volante
Description:
Mujeres al volante, nace en abril del 2017; inicialmente fuimos 4 valientes mujeres en brindar este servicio exclusivo para mujeres, niños y personas de la tercera edad.
Actualmente, al margen de coadyuvar en la seguridad ciudadana proporcionando tranquilidad a las familias, brinda la posibilidad a más de 43 mujeres que están abocadas a las actividades el hogar y cuidado de sus hijos, a generar ingresos en su tiempo libre sin descuidar sus hogares; y se han beneficiado también personas de edad avanzada, que ya no pueden postularse a trabajos por su brecha de edad y han encontrado en Mujeres al Volante una actividad que les permite estar activas económicamente.

Name: Vivarent Srl
Description: Vivarent propone soluzioni di noleggio auto pensate per soddisfare le esigenze di privati e aziende. Con una flotta diversificata e servizi dedicati, offriamo flessibilità, comodità e vantaggi esclusivi per viaggi di lavoro o di tempo libero. La nostra missione è garantire una mobilità intelligente e senza pensieri, con un'attenzione costante al servizio e alla qualità.

Name: ZaapEV
Description:
रै चलाऊ, धेरै बचाउ!
 ZaapEV – Freedom to Go. Power to Earn.
Ride more. Go more. Earn more.
______________
 Empowering Gig Workers Through Affordable Electric Mobility
 Too expensive to own a bike? No place to charge?

ZaapEV breaks down the barriers with ultra-low-cost electric scooters and easy battery swaps — so you can ride smart, earn more, and go anywhere you need.
______________
 Your Ride. Your Way. Starting at Just NPR 400/Day
* Up to 60 km/day range on a single charge
* Battery swap at NPR 50 for another 60 km — anytime within 24 hrs
* Total freedom — no fuel costs, no ownership stress
* Flexible daily rental – perfect for gig workers, delivery riders, and freelancers
______________
 Especially for Women and Youth
* Breaking financial barriers for women to ride
* Gain mobility, confidence, and income
* Onboarding, training, and safety gear provided
* Inclusive and supportive community of riders
______________
 Powered by Bloc Obit App
Book your scooter. Track your ride. Swap batteries. Pay securely.
 It’s all digital — it’s all easy.
______________
 Why ZaapEV?
 Zero emissions, 100% electric
 Compact battery swap pods — even in tea stalls
 High uptime with strategic station locations
 Pilot running in Kathmandu soon!
 Ready to scale to 1,000+ bikes by 2026
______________

Name: Hallmark e-Mobility Store
Description: An exclusive electric mobility store dealing with 2, 3, and 4 wheeler electric vehicles and e-mobility infrastructure for sales and delivery purposes.

Name: MoPark
Description:
MoPark Akıllı Park Sistemi, minimum insan gücü kullanarak en yakın müsait park alanlarının tespiti, bu alanlara yol tarifi, alanlarda check-in/out işlemlerinin icra edilmesi ile mevcut alanların optimum doluluk ve ulaşılabilirlik ile şehir trafiğinde sıkışıklığa neden olmadan park alanı hizmetini sağlamak için 2022 yılında kurulan bir altyapı geliştirme ve dijitalleştirme projesidir.  

Projenin yönetim ve araştırma-geliştirme aşamaları lise öğrencileri tarafından yürütülmektedir. 2022 yılının sonuna kadar aktif bir şekilde il ve ilçe belediyelerinde yer almak için çalışmalarımız devam etmektedir.

Name: Steppi
Description:
We are Steppi Valencia! Your gateway to uncovering the hidden gems of Valencia, Spain. We offer affordable Segway e-scooters  that allow you to explore this beautiful city like never before. With daily rates for just €14.99 and monthly rates starting from €34,99, our premium e-scooters make it easy to enjoy the best of Valencia.

Join us on an unforgettable journey as we reveal the secrets of Valencia, one glide at a time. Explore the best of the city with Steppi!

Name: Shalom Car
Description: Il vous est arrivé d'être bloqué, dans les transports, d'être en retard par manque de transport, de reporter un rendez vous par manque de transport, SHALOM CAR vous propose ceci, un conducteur qui va dans votre direction et disponible pour vous déposer, une possibilité de réserver votre départ pour le bureau, des moments de partages en transport, la possibilité de faire des nouvelles connaissances. et si le covoiturage était votre nouvelle facon de vous déplacer ?

Name: Tetik Tur
Description:
Tetik Tur, Personel Taşımacılığı Hizmetine 1983 yılında İleri İplik A.Ş. ile başlamıştır.Kamuoyunda “ Ören Bayan ” markasıyla tanınan İleri İplik A.Ş. faaliyetini sonlandırana kadar 20 yılı aşkın süre kurumsal çözüm ortağı olarak gördüğü Tetik Tur’ u tercih etmiştir.
80’li Yıllarda İstanbul, Sefaköy, Küçükçekmece bölgesinde, 90 larda gelişen sanayi ile paralel olarak Beylikdüzü, Hadımköy bölgesinde, 2000’li yıllarda ise tüm İstanbul’da sektöründe lider firmaların tercihi haline gelen Tetik Tur, bugün Kocaeli Dilovası’ndan Tekirdağ, Çerkezköy’e kadar 102 fabrika ve kuruma, 746 tedarikçi ve öz malı araç ile günde 16.000 üzerinde kişi taşımaktayız.

Name: Jamaica Urban Transit Company (JUTC) -  (Official)
Description:
The Jamaica Urban Transit Company, JUTC, is a household name. The wholly owned Government run public transportation company opened its doors in July 1998 providing a vital service for commuters who at that time demanded a decent and structured public transportation system within the Kingston Metropolitan Transport Region, KMTR, due to the haphazard system that existed. Since then, the Company has come a far way in not only modernizing its operation and fleet, but has also expanded its service offerings.

The JUTC is an agency of the Ministry of Transport and Mining, and is the exclusive provider of public transit services in the KMTR. The Company delivers public transport services seven days a week and in some instances up to 14 hours a day. The operations of the JUTC spread across various depots in the KMTR – Spanish Town, Portmore and Rockfort. In addition, buses are dispatched daily from several outstations to go as far as Longville in Clarendon. We possess the largest driver-pool in the English speaking Caribbean, with over 12-hundred drivers, who are experienced and courteous.
Location: , Spanish Town, St. Catherine, Jamaica W.I.

Name: Spark Access
Description: Spark Access’ mission is to drive accessibility and disability inclusion forward in the mobility industry to create belonging and community connections with people with disabilities.

Name: Städtische Verkehrsbetriebe Zwickau GmbH
Description:
Zuhause Unterwegs!

Wir, die Städtische Verkehrsbetriebe Zwickau GmbH (SVZ), ist kommunaler Dienstleister für den öffentlichen Personennahverkehr in Zwickau. Mit unseren mehr als 200 Beschäftigten erbringen wir die Beförderungsleistungen mit Straßenbahnen und Bussen für einen zuverlässigen Stadtverkehr.

Täglich befördern wir über 33.000 Fahrgäste und bringen diese sicher und pünktlich zur Arbeit, in die Schule oder zu verschiedensten Freizeitaktivitäten. Wir sorgen also dafür, dass unsere Stadt mobil bleibt und unterstützen gleichzeitig umweltschonende Mobilitätslösungen.

Aber wir können noch mehr: Arbeiten bei der Städtische Verkehrsbetriebe Zwickau GmbH bedeutet nicht nur einen sicheren und tarifgebundenen Arbeitgeber in der Region zu haben, sondern auch spannende Aufgaben zusammen in einem starken Team mit WIR-Gefühl zu meistern!

Wir bieten vielfältige Jobs - vom Fahrdienst, dem Werkstattbereich bis hin zur Verwaltung.

Name: Mateshwari Urban Transport Solutions Pvt Ltd
Description:
Mateshwari Urban Transport Solutions Pvt Ltd is a leading provider of innovative urban transportation solutions, dedicated to delivering modern, reliable, and eco-friendly services. By leveraging cutting-edge technology and green energy, we create efficient, affordable transport systems that enhance connectivity and elevate the quality of life in the communities we serve.

Our mission is to redefine urban mobility through sustainable practices and advanced technologies. We are committed to operational excellence, fostering innovation, and ensuring accessibility for all.

With a vision to lead the future of urban transportation, we are actively exploring electric vehicle (EV) bus manufacturing and renewable energy integration, including solar-powered operations and sustainable fuels. At Mateshwari Group, we strive to make mobility smarter, greener, and more inclusive, bridging communities and promoting seamless urban living for a better tomorrow.

Name: Socobuses S.A.
Description:
Socobuses S.A. Tiene a disposición  el servicio de Transporte en 31 rutas de la ciudad, dando cubrimiento a 10 de 11 comunas. Somos la empresa con mayor número de flota disponible para prestar el mejor servicio con calidad, atencion, seguridad y oportunidad. 

Nuestros vehiculos modernos cuentan con servicios y comodidades como: 

- Elevador para personas en situación de discapacidad y movilidad reducida.
- Portabicicletas con capacidad para 2 bicicletas debidamente ancladas. (Actualmente solo tenemos 10 dispositivos, en proyecto de expansión)
- Servicio de puertos USB para carga de dispositivos en cada una de las sillas.
- Iluminación y ventilación requeridas para mantener el flujo del aire circular.
- Tv. De 22” para disfrutar de las transmisiones programadas encada recorrido.
- Kit de emergencias: botiquín – extintor (Requisitos de ley)
- Ruteros electrónicos LED.

Name: GenesisMobo
Description: GenesisMobo is an innovative and forward thinking company which provides a "onestop-shop" for public transportation companies, where we offer both hardware and software solutions to meet the demanding needs of our clients. We have a combined experience of 10 years and we pride ourselves on delivering products specifically tailored to each client which stretch across Europe and we have been recognised for our services having been presented with a series of regional awards for the most innovative company.

Name: Tourify Africa
Description:
Tourify Africa is not just a travel platform; it's a blend of sustainable choices and innovative technology for eco-conscious travelers. Seamlessly catering to the needs of both leisure and business travelers.

Our commitment goes beyond offering safe and affordable travel options; we prioritize authentic local cultural experiences, making every journey memorable.

With our innovative platform, you can embark on a borderless adventure  and experience the wonders of Africa before you even set foot on your travel destination!.

Name: Tax Individual y sus Empresas Aliadas
Description: Tax Individual y sus Empresas Aliadas contribuyen a la calidad de vida de los pasajeros y conductores a través del servicio de taxis, como parte del ecosistema de movilidad de la región.

Name: Panamericana Industrias
Description:
Brindamos soluciones integrales en la logística de transporte del personal de empresas. 
Contamos con colectivos 0KM, minibus, camionetas 4x4, autos, máquinas agrícolas y viales.
Contrataciones para viajes especiales.

Name: Pee Dee Regional Transportation Authority
Description:
Pee Dee Regional Transportation Authority was officially formed in June 1974 as the first RTA in the state of South Carolina. In August 1976, PDRTA began operations serving the six county Pee Dee regions of Chesterfield, Darlington, Dillon, Florence, Marion, and Marlboro Counties. PDRTA's first customers in 1976 were a small group of people enrolled in the CETA (currently Workforce Investment) federal job training program. In 1988, PDRTA began transporting inland county residents to the Grand Strand for job opportunities. That tradition continued for over 30 years, with PDRTA being actively involved in the economic development of our region by transporting hundreds to work each day, either on our fixed route system, the Florence Transit system, or via demand-response/paratransit services. In the Spring of 2013 PDRTA was forced to end the Medicaid contract with the private broker. The costs associated with performing the service was much more than the revenue generated, and because of this PDRTA had to make many several tough decisions. The loss of Medicaid resulted in a 70% reduction in Operational and Administrative staff. PDRTA now offers fixed route service in Darlington, Florence, Lake City and Marion SC. All routes with the exception of Florence are considered Deviated Fixed Routes.

PDRTA is the oldest RTA in South Carolina. PDRTA is self-managed, allowing it to directly oversee its business with the highest degree of integrity and efficiency.

Name: Consórcio do Sistema Metropolitano BRT
Description:
O BRT (Bus Rapid Transit) é a solução inovadora que transforma a mobilidade urbana em Goiânia. Projetado para oferecer um transporte público coletivo de alta qualidade, combina rapidez, eficiência e segurança por meio de corredores exclusivos e estações modernas. O sistema Norte-Sul, com 29,6 km de extensão, conecta a cidade de ponta a ponta, integrando 136 linhas de ônibus e promovendo a acessibilidade com estações adaptadas para todos.

As estações, que recebem nomes de plantas nativas do Cerrado, refletem nosso compromisso com a biodiversidade e a preservação ambiental. Equipadas com tecnologia avançada, como painéis interativos, Wi-Fi gratuito, sistema de segurança e acessibilidade aprimorada, proporcionam uma experiência de viagem confortável e segura.

Os ônibus são projetados para o conforto do usuário, com ar-condicionado, tomadas USB e monitoramento em tempo real. Com isso, buscamos não apenas atender às necessidades de transporte da população, mas também contribuir para uma cidade mais sustentável e conectada. Venha fazer parte dessa transformação na mobilidade de Goiânia!

DING ist ein sogenannter Aufgabenträgerverbund in der Rechtsform einer GmbH. Das bedeutet, dass die öffentlichen Gesellschafter die Rahmenbedingungen für den Öffentlichen Personennahverkehr (ÖPNV) stecken, während die Verkehrsunternehmen sie operativ auf Schiene und Straße umsetzen.

Ziel von DING ist es, die Qualität des Öffentlichen Nahverkehrs in der länderübergreifenden Region zu steigern und die acht Schienenstrecken mit dem Busangebot zu vernetzen.

Name: Miejskie Przedsiębiorstwo Komunikacyjne S.A. w Krakowie
Description:
Historia krakowskiej komunikacji rozpoczęła się w 1875 roku. To wtedy na ulice miasta wyjechały konne omnibusy. Po 150 latach funkcjonowania transport miejski w Krakowie korzysta z zupełnie innych rozwiązań. Nie zmieniał się jednak cel działalności. Dla Miejskiego Przedsiębiorstwa Komunikacyjnego SA w Krakowie nadal najważniejszym zadaniem jest zapewnienie pasażerom bezpiecznej i komfortowej podróży. Dzięki licznym inwestycjom, które realizuje krakowski przewoźnik, krakowianie i turyści mają do dyspozycji nowoczesny, wygodny i ekologiczny tabor. Wszystkie autobusy kursujące w Krakowie są wyposażone w silniki spełniające co najmniej europejską normę Euro 5, w tym są również autobusy hybrydowe i elektryczne. 
MPK SA stara się także prowadzić działania edukacyjne skierowane do najmłodszych pasażerów. Dla uczniów z krakowskich szkół podstawowych w zajezdni tramwajowej MPK SA w Krakowie prowadzone są zajęcia i warsztaty w ramach Akademii Młodego Krakowianina. Projekt ma na celu edukowanie dzieci i młodzieży szkolnej w zakresie ekologii, bezpieczeństwa, a także w tematyce związanej z funkcjonowaniem miasta jako nowoczesnej metropolii. Ma też kształtować wśród najmłodszych postawy prospołeczne i proekologiczne.
Najwyższą jakość usług świadczonych przez MPK SA potwierdzają liczne certyfikaty. Magazyn Forbes w 2009 roku uznał krakowską komunikację za jedną z 10 najlepszych na świecie. W 2019 roku MPK SA otrzymało certyfikat „Miejsce przyjazne seniorom” za wprowadzone udogodnienia dla osób starszych w krakowskim taborze.

Keolis Haut-Bugey (- de 20 salariés) est une filiale du groupe Keolis. 

Keolis est un des leaders mondiaux de la mobilité partagée et le partenaire privilégié des Autorités Organisatrices de Mobilité. Ensemble, Keolis co-construit des solutions de transport en commun sûres, performantes et durables qui renforcent l'attractivité et la vitalité des territoires. 
Keolis s’appuie sur une politique d’innovation soutenue avec l’ensemble de ses partenaires et filiales pour développer de nouvelles offres de mobilité partagée innovantes et « sur-mesure ».
Dans 13 pays, les 68 000 collaborateurs du Groupe mettent tout en œuvre pour proposer une alternative crédible à la voiture individuelle et ainsi accélérer la transition écologique.

Name: ETT Empresa de Transportes Turismo Carapicuíba
Description:
Institucional | Histórico
Fundada em 1969, a ETT (Empresa de Transportes e Turismo Carapicuíba) tem a sólida marca de tradição e reconhecimento no ramo de transportes coletivos, tornando-se conceituada na região metropolitana. A partir daí, o crescimento e a rápida urbanização das cidades colaboraram fortemente para a evolução da empresa, que retribuiu com intensas melhorias de segurança na estrutura das vias e do tráfego.

Name: 2getthere
Description:
At 2getthere, we don’t just talk about the future of mobility—we’ve built it! Our systems in Rivium Rotterdam (NL) and Masdar City (UAE) have safely transported millions, backed by rigorous safety standards and global certifications. We provide high-capacity, on-demand automated transit solutions for urban mobility, that’s already in use, already trusted, and ready to scale.

Our systems operate on segregated infrastructures or dedicated lanes, ensuring safe, reliable, and efficient transportation. 

With over 30 years of experience in automated vehicle technology across demanding environments, we have evolved from Automated Guided Vehicles in warehouses to large-scale port applications and passenger transit systems.

Today, our proven solutions include Personal Rapid Transit (PRT) at Masdar City and Group Rapid Transit (GRT) at Rivium Rotterdam, transporting passengers safely and comfortably every day. These operational systems demonstrate our commitment to innovation, sustainability, and seamless mobility.

Driven by expertise and experience, 2getthere continues to shape the future of automated transit worldwide.
 
2getthere is located in Utrecht, the Netherlands. 2getthere Middle East, a joint venture with United Technical Services in the United Arab Emirates, ensure 2getthere can serve its customers locally.

Als 100%iges Tochterunternehmen der städtischen Monheimer Versorgungs- und Verkehrs-GmbH behauptet sich die Bahnen der Stadt Monheim GmbH (BSM) nicht nur erfolgreich im öffentlichen Personennahverkehr, sondern auch als Eisenbahninfrastrukturunternehmen. Das Unternehmen beschäftigt zurzeit 144 Mitarbeitende und ist Mitglied in den beiden größten Verkehrsverbünden Nordrhein-Westfalens, dem Verkehrsverbund Rhein-Ruhr (VRR) und dem Verkehrsverbund Rhein-Sieg (VRS).

Als modernes und innovatives Verkehrsunternehmen mit starkem Fokus auf den Kundenservice und großer Leidenschaft für Zukunftsideen unterhält die BSM einen Fahrzeugpark von 45 Bussen und 5 autonomen Batteriebussen – stets mit prüfendem Blick auf die neuesten Umweltansprüche. Für ihre Fahrgäste möchte die BSM ein individuelles und nachhaltiges Mobilitätserlebnis schaffen: Mit der Einführung einer autonomen Buslinie sowie des kostenlosen ÖPNVs beweist die BSM Innovationsgeist bei der Gestaltung des ÖPNV der Zukunft.

Name: Agder kollektivtrafikk
Description:
Det skal være enkelt og attraktivt å reise kollektivt. 

Agder kollektrafikk (AKT) er mobilitetsselskapet på Agder. Hvert år frakter våre busser ca 19 millioner passasjerer og kjører 19 millioner kilometer, altså ca 475 ganger rundt jorden ved ekvator.  

Vårt formål er å tilby kollektivtransport og gi informasjon til befolkningen om tilbudet og yte tjenester relatert til dette. Målsettingen vår er å tilby innbyggerne i Agder et velfungerende og kostnadseffektivt kollektivtilbud, samt utføre lovpålagte skoleskyssoppgaver på en formålstjenlig måte. Selskapet skal bidra til en miljøvennlig trafikkutvikling. 

Aksjene i AKT eies av Agder fylkeskommune (80%) og Kristiansand kommune (20%). 

Det er vi som står bak!

Webside: www.akt.no
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/agderkollektivtrafikk/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/agderkollektivtrafikk/
Twitter: https://twitter.com/agderkollektiv

Name: CoMotion Mobility Solutions
Description:
CoMotion envisions inclusive shared mobility solutions for all communities and all members of those communities.
CoMotion is committed to providing inclusive shared mobility solutions to the public, private and corporate sectors to enhance transportation options across Ireland, UK and Europe.
CoMotion are the first company in the world to launch an Inclusive Shared Mobility Hub. Our hubs offer full accessibility to shared mobility for all users, regardless of their level of mobility. We are also committed to reducing the carbon footprint of our operations at every opportunity and we work diligently to enhance the world of shared mobility.
CoMotion wanted to effect change within the MaaS sector and so we have developed STEED. The first platform of its kind developed exclusively for PRM's. STEED offers specially adapted bikes and trikes available in public & private locations and accessed through a dedicated app, just like a traditional bike share scheme. 

CoMotion also offer retail sales of a vareity of adaptive bikes and ebikes and are proud dealers for VanRaam, Wheelezee and Quadrix

Name: Qingdao Metro
Description:
Qingdao Metro started in 1987, and successively established a metro preparation office, a metro engineering office, and a metro company to promote preliminary work.

In 2009, Qingdao Metro Engineering Construction Headquarters was established to undertake the functions of organization, command, coordination and supervision of metro construction, and an office to undertake daily work.

In 2013, Qingdao Metro Group was formally established, co-deployed with Qingdao Metro Engineering Construction Headquarters Office, comprehensively performed the duties of the headquarters, and assumed the market functions of construction, operation, investment and financing, development, and the main responsibility of the enterprise.

Up to now, the total number of employees has exceeded 10,000, and the total assets have reached 150 billions. It has entered the development stage of "Big Construction, Big Operation, Big Management", maintaining a relatively strong development trend.

Name: AarBus
Description:
AarBus er ejet af det regionale trafikselskab Midttrafik og varetager al bybuskørsel i Aarhus Kommune - i alt ca. 545.000 køreplantimer om året. Vi har 650 ansatte, 204 busser heraf 118 elbusser og en omsætning på ca. 480 mio. kroner. 

Siden 2012 har AarBus været miljøcertificeret efter ISO 14001 standarden. Et af de centrale elementer i certificeringen er styring af virksomhedens miljøpåvirkning. Vores helt store miljøpåvirkning kommer fra busserne, og derfor har vi har fokus på hvilke busser, der købes, og på den daglige drift af busserne. 

Vi har altid indkøbt busser med den bedste euronorm tilgængelig på markedet. I august 2019 satte vi de første 4 eldrevne busser i drift, og senest i 2027 vil alle vores kontraktbusser være elbusser. 

AarBus satser på kvalitet i et konkurrencepræget marked og vægter åbenhed, trivsel og effektivitet højt i forhold til både passagerer og medarbejdere. Generelt er det AarBus’ personalepolitik, at medarbejderne skal sikres vilkår, så de er engagerede og ansvarlige i bestræbelserne på at levere den bedst mulige kollektive bustrafik i Aarhus ”til pengene”. 

Vi arbejder systematisk med arbejdsmiljø og trivsel, og siden 2021 har vi været arbejdsmiljøcertificeret efter standarden i ISO 45001.

Name: SIGN-AIR
Description:
The SIGN-AIR project https://www.sesar.eu/projects/sign-air) (ID:101114845), a three-year initiative supported by the SESAR Joint Undertaking, aims to revolutionise the transport sector through an innovative solution over its duration, which will address the challenges of data exchange and foster seamless mobility. Through this project the consortium will create a web platform to allow Transport Service Providers of different modes to generate and monitor data sharing agreements and smart contracts and continue the efforts made in the past project SYN+AIR, which focused on air transportation and multimodality.

Name: METROBUS S. A.
Description:
Metrobus Transporte Coletivo S/A

A METROBUS TRANSPORTE COLETIVO S/A é uma sociedade de economia mista, criada em 1997 em decorrência da cisão que ocorreu na TRANSURB. Passou a ser concessionária dos serviços de transporte coletivo na Capital do estado de Goiás em face da mencionada cisão e a consequente sub-rogação, por ela, da concessão de que a TRANSURB era titular.

Atualmente opera o principal corredor do sistema de transporte coletivo da Região Metropolitana de Goiânia, o EIXO-ANHANGUERA, com uma frota patrimonial composta por 96 ônibus, sendo 68 articulados 28 biarticulados. O Consórcio REDEMOB é o responsável pela operação, manutenção e conservação das 19 Estações de Embarque/desembarque e 05 terminais de integração instalados ao longo do corredor. (Padre Pelágio, DERGO, Praça A, Praça da Bíblia e Novo Mundo).

A força de trabalho é composta por quase 450 pessoas (Incluindo a mão de obra vinculada às prestadoras de serviços).

Name: Masabi en Español
Description: La misión de Masabi es impulsar ciudades más inteligentes y sostenibles, transformando la experiencia de usuario en el transporte público a través de sistemas de smart ticketing. Estamos liderando el cambio de los sistemas de ticketing tradicionales rígidos y desarrollados a medida, por plataformas abiertas y compartidas que ofrecen las últimas innovaciones del sector. Para ello, ofrecemos a las autoridades y a los operadores de transporte público una solución “plug and play” bajo un modelo de software como servicio, que nos permite desplegar de forma rápida eliminando el riesgo de un desarrollo fallido. Justride es un producto ya desarrollado, una plataforma abierta y modular, que ya cuenta con un ecosistema de APIs conectados a soluciones y servicios de SAE, PSP o plataformas de Movilidad como Servicio (MaaS). Ya no tendrás que definir nuevos requisitos ni acometer nuevas inversiones para evolucionar el sistema, nuestras actualizaciones diarias y nuevas funcionalidades que vamos desarrollando; están disponibles para todos nuestros clientes dentro de su contrato de licencia. La plataforma Justride, considerada como la mejor tecnología de Ticketing en 2019 y 2020, es la elegida por más de 250 autoridades y operadores de transporte público de todos los tamaños a lo largo de 4 continentes, por la que se realizan más de 10 millones de desplazamientos cada mes. Masabi cuenta con inversores de la talla de Accel-KKR, Smedvig Capital, MMC Ventures, Shell Ventures y Mastercard. Para más información, consulte la página www.masabi.com/es

Name: Thames Travel
Description:
Thames Travel is based in Didcot, Oxfordshire. The company started in 1998 with a fleet of four vehiclThames Travel is based in Didcot, Oxfordshire. The Company started in 1998 with a fleet of four vehicles and has gone from strength to strength, expanding to its position as the third-largest bus operator in Oxfordshire.

We now employ about 150 colleagues and maintain a fleet of over 60 vehicles. Our services cover the geographical area of South Oxfordshire and into Berkshire, usually carrying over 3 million passengers per year.

We do our best to make our services accessible and safe for everybody by providing low floor, easy access vehicles fitted with the latest CCTV technology, spacious wheelchair and buggy areas, and user-friendly timetable information. Our drivers are trained to the highest standards including customer service skills.

We are part of Go-Ahead Group Ltd, an international transport group and one of the UK's leading public transport providers. We place great importance on partnership, adopting a collaborative approach with local governments, local communities and strategic partners, and we are committed to providing our communities with affordable and sustainable travel.

The environment is a primary concern of Thames Travel, and we have invested in a large number of ultra low emission Euro 6 rated buses in recent years. Many of our buses have "stop-start" technology, which turns the engine off when at bus stops.

In all, Thames Travel aims to secure confidence in both customers and colleagues and make them feel that they are part of a forward-thinking, innovative company that cares for the people and environment of our region.

Publico en General con alto sentido de responsabilidad medio ambiental y a quienes aman trasladarse seguros y llegar a tiempo.

Name: Griesar Reisen GmbH
Description:
GRIESAR REISEN is a family-owned bus company based in Ebernhahn, close to Montabaur. Each day, our drivers transport several thousand customers on scheduled and school services. Friendliness, safety and sustainability are very important to us, as is state-of-the-art technology.

Thanks to our high standards of customer satisfaction, our company has developed into the largest private bus company in the Westerwald region since its founding in 1928. Learn more about us here!

Name: FASTSHIPPING SPA
Description:
Somos Fastshipping chile, una empresa que nace con la finalidad de cubrir eficazmente las necesidades del transporte privado, estafetas, envíos, transporte de carga liviana y semi-pesada.

Nuestro objetivo es ofrecer una experiencia de servicio de la mas alta calidad, que cumpla todas sus expectativas, convirtiéndonos en un socio estratégico en su transporte.

Sabemos la importancia de transportar personas y paquetes con responsabilidad, puntualidad, seguridad e higiene, por esto le ofrecemos variados convenios de servicios acorde a cada uno de sus requerimientos.

Name: NSH Nahverkehr Schleswig-Holstein GmbH
Description: Die NSH Nahverkehr Schleswig-Holstein GmbH ist die tarifverantwortliche Stelle für den SH-Tarif. Sie ist die Dachorganisation der 5 Bahn- und 25 Busunternehmen, die den SH-Tarif anwenden. In dieser Funktion ist die NSH Dienstleister insbesondere für die Themen Tarif, Vertrieb und Einnahmenaufteilung. Erfahren Sie mehr über die NSH.

Name: CoMutes
Description:
CoMutes is a subscription-based, point-to-point commute service designed for working professionals. We offer comfortable, fixed-schedule shared car rides between major residential hubs and office clusters - with doorstep pickup, fixed riders, and zero daily hassle.

 Fixed Routes
 First & Last Mile Covered
 Trusted Rider Groups
 On-Time, Every Time

Starting with the Ghaziabad ⇌ Gurgaon corridor, we help professionals reclaim 2+ hours of their day - without the stress of metros, shuttles, or expensive cabs.

This isn’t ride-hailing.
This is smart, structured mobility - built for predictability.

 Now onboarding early riders.

#CommuteSmarter with CoMutes.

Name: Moplus株式会社
Description:
人口減少に伴って公共交通網の維持が困難になる地域がある一方で、インバウンドによる移動需要の増大や、SNSなどを通じた地域の新しい魅力の発信による観光スポットの再発見が進んでいます。その中で、地域交通が担う役割も大きく変わって来ています。
Moplus株式会社は「モビリティで社会に活力をプラスする」の実現に向け、日産自動車と三菱商事の合弁会社として設立されました。交通課題を抱える自治体や地域の事業者の方々に、それぞれの地域に合わせたエリアデザインや、車両・システムを組み合わせたソリューションを提供し、まちの活性化をご支援します。

Name: Cidadela Transport
Description:
Aqui nós fazemos a diferença!
Na Cidadela Transport, acreditamos que é nossa responsabilidade contribuir para um mundo melhor. Por isso, estamos comprometidos em destinar uma parte dos nossos lucros para iniciativas ambientais. Cada viagem feita através do nosso serviço não só o leva ao seu destino, mas também ajuda a preservar e proteger o meio ambiente. Junte-se a nós nessa jornada rumo a um futuro mais sustentável.

Name: Orion Transit LLC
Description:
At Orion Transit, our mission is to provide safe, reliable, and accessible transportation services to individuals with disabilities. We strive to be the leading recruitment company for ADA compliant ParaTransit vehicle operators by partnering with transit providers who share our commitment to providing exceptional service to our clients.

We are dedicated to hiring and training qualified operators who are passionate about serving the needs of individuals with disabilities. We are committed to promoting diversity, equality, and inclusion in our workplace and in the communities we serve.

Our focus on efficiency and effectiveness enables us to deliver reliable and cost-effective solutions to our clients. We work closely with our partner companies to ensure that all of our operations are fully compliant with DOT and ADA regulations.

We believe that everyone deserves access to safe and reliable transportation services, and we are committed to making that a reality for individuals with disabilities across the country.

Name: URide Transportation
Description:
From Tinseltown to the Magical Kingdom, we offer transportation services to fit all your travel needs! We are more than an airport shuttle service — our growing fleet of vehicles is ready to take to your next adventure, including theme parks, concerts, sporting events, and more. We provide our passengers with safety, comfort, and efficiency in every ride. 

From LAX to Hollywood to Anaheim and beyond, we are willing to accommodate almost any request, all at affordable rates. Book your ride today and see why URide is the premier shuttle service in the LA area!

Name: Kecskeméti Közlekedési Központ Kft
Description:
„Kecskemét Megyei Jogú Város Önkormányzata Közgyűlésének 11/2019 (IV. 25) önkormányzati rendelete Kecskemét Megyei Jogú Város Önkormányzata közlekedésszervezési feladatainak ellátásáról" szóló rendeletében 2020. január 1-jétől kijelölte a Kecskeméti Közlekedési Központ Korlátolt Felelősségű Társaságot, Kecskemét város autóbusszal végzett helyi menetrend szerinti személyszállítási szolgáltatásával kapcsolatos közlekedésszervezési feladatainak ellátására.

A Kecskeméti Közlekedési Központ Kft. megalapítására 2019. áprilisban sor került, ezt követően megkezdte a helyi közlekedés átvételével kapcsolatos előkészítő tevékenységét. A Kecskeméti Közlekedési Központ Kft. feladata a helyi autóbusszal végzett menetrendszerinti személyszállítási szolgáltatás tervezése, szervezése és megrendelése, valamint a szolgáltatáshoz kapcsolódó kereskedelmi feladatok ellátása.

Name: Romy
Description:
Au Québec, la moyenne d'occupation dans les véhicules particulier est de 1,23. Ce sont des milliers de sièges disponibles non utilisés. Il y a bel et bien un potentiel pour améliorer l’offre de mobilité. 

Notre vision est d'intégrer les sièges disponibles des autos particulières à l'offre de transport collectif. Pour y arriver, les conducteurs n'ont pas besoin de publier leurs déplacements et les passagers accèdent aux sièges disponibles en temps réel. C'est comme "faire du pouce de façon numérique".

Name: MityCab - Manipal
Description:
MityCab is the ultimate Pre-Booking Cab solution tailored for college students traveling to airports or distant destinations. Our platform focuses on affordability, convenience, and safety, ensuring seamless long-distance journeys.

Key Features
•	Pre-Booking Only: Schedule rides in advance to avoid last-minute stress.
•	Fare Comparison: Choose the most budget-friendly option from various service providers.
•	Cost Sharing: Share rides with Friends or Match with Other Students heading the same way, splitting the fare easily.
•	Student Discounts: Special deals exclusively for verified college students.
•	Flexible Payments: Multiple payment options, including Wallets, UPI, and Cash on Arrival.

Safety and Convenience
•	Live Driver Tracking: Stay updated on your ride’s location in real-time.
•	Emergency Assistance: Quick access to a trusted contact or support team.
•	Reliable Notifications: Get reminders for upcoming trips or flight delays.
MityCab simplifies your journey, making long-distance travel affordable, stress-free, and perfectly suited to college life.

Name: TRANSCONSEG SAC
Description:
TRANSCONSEG SAC es una empresa peruana, dedicada a brindar servicios logísticos especializados de carga general Contamos con un sistema de gestión basado en el cuidado, control y vigilancia de productos y/o objetos transportados.
En TRANSCONSEG hemos desarrollado e implementado voluntariamente los Sistema de Control Operacional y Seguridad Física basados en normativas peruanas y estándares internacionales; comprometiéndonos a: 
• Cumplir los requisitos legales aplicables, así como los acuerdos y compromisos adquiridos con nuestras partes interesadas.
• Mejorar continuamente los sistemas de gestión. 
• Concientizar a nuestros colaboradores aplicando las buenas prácticas que nos brindan los sistemas de gestión. 
• Asegurar la satisfacción de nuestros clientes, ofreciendo servicios ágiles y seguros de acuerdos a sus necesidades. 
• Mantener la integridad de nuestros procesos y prevenir actividades ilícitas, corrupción y soborno que puedan afectar a nuestras partes interesadas y a la mercadería.
• Brindar la protección de la seguridad y salud de todos los miembros de la organización mediante la prevención de las lesiones, dolencias, enfermedades e incidentes relacionados con el trabajo. 
• Minimizar los riesgos para nuestros trabajadores, proveedores y clientes controlando nuestras actividades, proporcionando condiciones de trabajo seguras y saludables mediante la prevención de las lesiones, dolencias, enfermedades e incidentes relacionados con el trabajo 
• Garantizar que los trabajadores y sus representantes sean consultados y participen activamente en todos los elementos del Sistema de Gestión de la Seguridad y Salud en el Trabajo.
Nuestra empresa TRANSCONSEG SAC

Name: Yo Estacionándome
Description:
Con más de tres décadas a la vanguardia, nos hemos posicionado como líderes en soluciones de ordenamiento urbano y gestión vial. Nuestro compromiso con la innovación continua nos ha consolidado como un referente esencial en la transformación urbana.

Trayectoria Corporativa:
Desde nuestros inicios en los años noventa, hemos abogado por intervenciones urbanas significativas. Nuestra primera gran iniciativa fue la introducción de parquímetros en las colonias Juárez y Cuauhtémoc de la Ciudad de México, estableciendo un nuevo estándar en la gestión vial.


Evolución y Hitos:
-Años 90: Inauguramos un programa pionero de parquímetros en zonas clave de CDMX.
-2004: Diseñamos y administramos el Programa de Ordenamiento Vial para el Centro Histórico de CDMX, que sigue operativo hoy.
-Década actual: Hemos expandido nuestra presencia a nuevas ciudades en México y Centroamérica, adaptando y modernizando nuestros enfoques de soluciones de estacionamiento.

Name: Mateshwari Group
Description:
Mateshwari Group is a trailblazer in urban transportation, committed to delivering modern, reliable, and sustainable mobility solutions. By integrating advanced technology with green energy, we create efficient and accessible transport systems that strengthen connectivity and enhance the quality of urban life.

Our mission is to transform urban mobility through innovation and sustainability. We prioritize operational excellence, leveraging eco-friendly technologies to meet the evolving needs of our customers and stakeholders.

With a forward-looking approach, we are exploring new horizons in electric vehicle (EV) bus manufacturing and renewable energy integration, including solar-powered operations and alternative fuels. At Mateshwari Group, we are redefining transportation by making it smarter, greener, and more inclusive, empowering communities and driving progress toward a sustainable future.

Description:

Nuestra misión es mejorar la calidad de vida de la población a través de innovaciones en el diseño de redes viales, de transporte público, movilidad de vehículo privado, tecnologías para el pago de peaje, rutas alimentadores de transporte concesionado y operación de sistemas de transporte masivo.

Name: Sunshine Transport Solutions Corporation
Description:
STSC is brining solar-powered e-Mobility solutions to market. Out Personal Rapid Transit (PRT) system provides safe, quiet, private transit for up to 4 people. Travel is origin-to-destination, without any congestion and without any stops in between.
There is no waiting for the scheduled bus and no waiting for the ride share to come get you; vehicles are ready and waiting for you in the station. Just show your smart phone to the system, get in, and enjoy the ride. Vehicles provide a scenic view as they travel 20 feet above street level.
Stations are small and can be located every quarter mile if needed. This means you don't have far to go to get to a station and stations are near where you want to arrive.
The solar panels covering the system provide all the energy needed for movement plus a surplus. Some of the surplus energy is stored within the system and the remainder is provided to the local power grid.
The personal space means that you and friends travel alone, free from concerns over Covid-19 risks waiting for and sharing transit,

Name: Vaivén Teleférico
Description:
Vaivén será el primer teleférico urbano de Lima, un sistema de transporte moderno que conectará el Parque Domodossola con la Playa Redondo en un recorrido de menos de tres minutos.
Este avance en movilidad urbana fortalecerá la conexión entre el malecón y la Costa Verde, aportando eficiencia, seguridad y sostenibilidad a la ciudad.

Construido con tecnología de Doppelmayr, líder mundial en transporte por cable, Vaivén contará con dos cabinas para hasta 15 pasajeros, adaptadas para transportar bicicletas, sillas de ruedas, tablas de surf, cochecitos de bebé y mascotas.

Una experiencia única que une ciudad y mar.

Muy pronto...

Name: Pexon Team
Description:
Pexon Team je kompanija koja pruža savršenu uslugu kombi prevoza putnika do Vaše željene destinacije uz komfor i ljubaznost koju prilikom rezervacije naše osoblje ispuni toplinom, a tokom putovanja realizuje pravim doživljajem. Naše osoblje upravo to će Vam i pružiti sa zadovoljstvom, a stavom dobrog i odgovornog domaćina.

Naš slogan „Da Vam putovanje bude uživanje“, jeste deviza sa kojom započinjemo svaki radni dan u cilju da uživate dok putujete i družite se sa nama. Vaše beskrajno zadovoljstvo našom uslugom je naš prioritet i zadatak! Takođe, svi članovi našeg tima su profesionalci sa višegodišnjim iskustvom u struci, a naš glavni cilj jeste da Vam omogućimo lagodno i bezbrižno putovanje.

Posedujemo raznovrstan i kvalitetan vozni park, sa vozilima najnovije generacije. Garantujemo komfornu i bezbednu vožnju u klimatizovanim vozilima, kao obavezni deo poslovanja, a naši vozači su bez premca najbolji u svom poslu.

Naša želja jeste da sa putnicima imamo i gradimo obostrano poverenje, ali i da sklapamo nova poslovna poznanstva, takođe kroz njih dugu i ljubaznu saradnju. Većina stalnih putnika su u nama prepoznali dobar rad, kvalitet i sigurnost, dok se mi trudimo da im svako putovanje bude posebno i da izađemo u susret svim zahtevima i željama pojedinaca.

Name: U-SHIFT
Description: At U-SHIFT, we are revolutionizing the future of transportation and urban mobility! Our relentless pursuit? To bring human autonomy to the forefront of city life, leading the shift towards a groundbreaking era of ZERO. Zero congestion. Zero emissions. Zero accidents. Join us on this electrifying journey into the future, where cutting-edge technology and innovation pave the way for a world that’s cleaner, safer, and more efficient than ever before. The future is NOW, and it’s U-SHIFT!

Name: Pronto
Description:
In Africa’s ride-hailing industry, riders struggle with unpredictable fares, while drivers feel trapped by high commissions. The system is broken—but Pronto is here to fix it.

Pronto is more than an app; it’s a movement for fairness and freedom.

For riders, Pronto means transparency, affordability, and convenience. No hidden fees, no surge pricing—just fair rides, every time.

For drivers, Pronto is about respect and empowerment. With a simple, flat-fee model, they keep more of their hard-earned money while enjoying a reliable stream of riders.

With Pronto, everyone wins. Riders move freely. Drivers earn fairly.

Join the movement. Ride Free. Earn Fair.

Name: Smart Move

Visamos transformar o mercado de posse temporária de meios de transporte oferecendo soluções personalizadas com a necessidade individual do cliente como centro das decisões.

Name: Nav PT
Description:
Nav is a real-time, privacy-conscious public transport navigation app that helps build walkable, low-emission cities.

Nav is a commuter app and urban mobility platform delivering accurate arrival estimates, end-to-end journey planning, and crowding insights. Built for Melbourne and designed to scale, Nav uses advanced modelling and local insights to deliver trusted, timely information that riders can rely on. Our approach focuses on improving commuter confidence and simplifying multi-modal trips so users no longer need to switch between several apps to plan one journey.

Why Nav matters: unreliable arrival times and fragmented trip planning push people back into cars, increasing congestion and emissions. Shifting even a modest share of car trips to public transport can significantly reduce urban CO₂ and improve liveability. Nav supports this shift by restoring trust in public transport through dependable timing, a seamless user experience and non-intrusive in-app features that keep journeys simple and stress-free.

Nav is pilot-ready, with prototypes validated by more than 100 survey respondents and refinement through RMIT ReLaunch and industry feedback sessions. Our roadmap includes a two to three-month pilot, an MVP release by year-end, and expansion across Australian cities while engaging with transport partners to improve service delivery and urban planning.

Join us to make cities more walkable and sustainable. Sign up for the pilot or developer collaboration at navpt.com.au or contact Dovi at dovi@navpt.com.au

Name: Hmaps
Description:
Problem
Urban multimodal transportation is complicated:
1. Mode transfers are inefficient.
2. Current routing tools are not designed for multimodal transportation.
3. Static schedules do not reflect real-world conditions.
4. Transport authorities lack tools to analyze multimodal traffic flows.
5. Commuters experience
    1. unreliable mode transfers and line switches,
    2. poor usability and inclusion,
    3. longer wait times.

Solution - Hmaps
We simplify urban multimodal transportation through AI driven multimodal routing, where we,
1. represent transit cities as integrated multimodal transportation networks and
2. use graph neural networks to optimize multimodal routing by explicitly considering
    1. mode transfers,
    2. line switches and
    3. mode specific spatiotemporal aspects.

We design city-specific, public transport focused multimodal routing engines that optimize multimodal transportation.

Name: Stadtwirtschaft Weimar GmbH
Description:
Die Stadtwirtschaft Weimar GmbH ist eine 100-prozentige Tochter der kreisfreien Stadt Weimar mit ihren rund 66.000 Einwohnern.

Das Unternehmen ist Muttergesellschaft der Stadtwerke Weimar-Stadtversorgungs-GmbH und der ENWG Energienetze Weimar GmbH & Co. KG.

Das Kerngeschäft der Stadtwirtschaft Weimar liegt in den Bereichen öffentlicher Personennahverkehr (ÖPNV) sowie Bäder- und Sportstättenbetrieb. Im Bereich Entsorgung betreibt sie die Kompostanlage in Umpferstedt. Im ÖPNV gewährleistet die Stadtwirtschaft Weimar durch moderne und barrierefreie Fahrzeuge in einem bedarfsgerechten Liniennetz, eine zuverlässige und umweltfreundliche Mobilität. Seit Ende 2023 setzt das Unternehmen erfolgreich drei Wasserstoffbusse ein, die komplett CO2-frei unterwegs sind. Die dafür geschaffene Infrastruktur auf dem Betriebsgelände umfasst eine Wasserstofftankstelle und- werkstatt. Als Betreiberin des Freibades und der Schwimmhalle „Schwanseebad“ sowie der Asbachsporthalle gewährleistet die Stadtwirtschaft u. a. Breiten- und Vereinssport. Die Kompostanlage in Umpferstedt trägt maßgeblich zur Kreislaufwirtschaft bei, indem organische Abfälle in hochwertigen Kompost umgewandelt werden.

Name: RELOBUS Transport Polska Sp. z o. o.
Description:
RELOBUS Transport Polska Sp. z o.o. w Polsce jest operatorem z wieloletnim doświadczeniem świadczącym usługi transportowe na liniach miejskich oraz regionalnych. Spółka oferuje autobusowe przewozy pasażerskie na terenie Kujaw i Pomorza, a także świadczy usługi w komunikacji miejskiej na terenie województwa mazowieckiego. Na pokładach blisko 270 autobusów podróżuje z nami rocznie ok. 15 mln pasażerów.

W obszarze regionalnej komunikacji autobusowej, RELOBUS Transport Polska funkcjonuje w obrębie 3 oddziałów  zlokalizowanych w Toruniu, Chełmnie i Tczewie. Przewoźnik uruchamia przewozy pasażerskie na 20 liniach regionalnych i świadczy usługi w przewozach szkolnych oraz pracowniczych. RELOBUS Transport Polska jest również zaufanym partnerem w komunikacji miejskiej realizując kontrakty dla miasta Warszawy na 28 liniach miejskich oraz dla miasta Ciechocinek w ramach zeroemisyjnej Komunikacji Miejskiej Ciechocinek. Świadczy również usługi w zakresie wynajmu autokarów. Oferuje ponadto liczne usługi około przewozowe takie jak sprzedaż paliwa, stacje diagnostyczne, sprzedaż nieruchomości.

Fundamentem działania przewoźnika jest jakość i efektywność świadczonych usług, bezpieczeństwo klientów i pracowników oraz uczestniczenie w życiu społeczności. To co wyróżnia spółkę to wysoka jakość oferowana podróżnym oraz zaangażowanie na każdej płaszczyźnie realizacji usługi przewozowej. Od początku swojego funkcjonowania, RELOBUS Transport Polska podejmuje też ponadstandardowe działania mające na celu promowanie transportu zbiorowego.

Celem przewoźnika na najbliższe lata jest dostarczanie kompleksowych usług transportowych i bycie partnerem przewozowym pierwszego wyboru w Polsce.

Name: Beven
Description:
Tu aimes sortir pour aller voir tes amis ? Aller au cinéma ? Au théâtre ? Boire un verre ? Aller en discothèque ? Mais les déplacements ont toujours été ton principal frein ? 

Ce projet est pour toi ! Nous avons pour objectif d'inciter les jeunes à profiter de leur vie et leur permettre de découvrir de nouvelles activités. Pour cela, nous souhaitons faciliter les sorties en rendant les déplacements rassurants et amusants. 

La solution ? Créer une application mobile de mise en relations basée sur une communauté de confiance. Ainsi, nos utilisateurs se retrouveront et partageront leurs différents trajets en transports en commun, taxis et à pied. 

Une mise en situation ? Tu retrouves tes amis dans un bar à Châtelet-Les-Halles. Après une bonne soirée, tu dois rentrer mais tu ne souhaites pas rentrer seul.e jusqu'à Evry. Tu te connectes donc sur l'application pour trouver une ou plusieur.e.s personnes pour rentrer avec toi. Super, Juliette et Paul rentrent aussi à côté d'Evry. Vous discutez donc, vous retrouvez et rentrez ensemble ! 

Ainsi, nous remplirons trois objectifs : 
1) Rendre chacun plus à l'aise et confiant dans les transports 
2) Permettre à tous de réaliser des économies sur ses sorties 
3) Remettre l'humain au cœur des transports

Name: Zero Emyt
Description:
Zero Emyt is addressing the disproportionate carbon emissions from medium and heavy-duty vehicles, which constitute only 5% of road transport but contribute to 25% of emissions. The challenge is that new EV production alone isn't sufficient due to factors such as high costs, range anxiety, limited charging infrastructure, and battery degradation.

Through strategic partnerships, Zero Emyt is innovatively 'upcycling' existing diesel vehicles into electric alternatives using battery swapping and retrofit kits. This 2 stage process involves converting drive trains to EV and hybrid systems and redesigning interiors for enhanced comfort and safety, especially in traffic congestion.

In congested megacities, Zero Emyt aims to deploy fleets of EVs and hybrids. This initiative is intended to tackle the prevalent smog and congestion, aiming to reduce fuel and maintenance costs and increase commuter productivity. By harnessing collaborative efforts, Zero Emyt's strategy seeks to offer a cost-effective and environmentally friendly commuting alternative, thus significantly improving urban air quality.

This strategic approach not only provides a practical solution to urban transport challenges but also represents a significant step towards sustainable urban mobility. Zero Emyt's vision is to create a cleaner, more efficient urban transport system, contributing to the overall improvement of the urban environment and quality of life for its inhabitants.

Name: IMPACTS Mobility
Description:
IMPACTS - short for: Inclusive Mobility: Public and Collaborative Trusted Spaces - is a project investigating a bottom-up solution to build supportive communities in public spaces and especially urban mobility.

Even if public transport is statistically safe, existing low security perception, increased gender transgressions, limited reporting mechanisms and global challenges such as Covid-19 create a reduced perception of safety and distrust. Thus, citizens use less mass transport, traffic and emissions do not reduce, while the future urban environment is restrained from citizen feedback and co-development. We connect passengers in ad-hoc communities to create supportive spaces, enable passengers to report issues, create trust using rating mechanisms, and encourage behavior change through stimulating analytics. Cities and transport providers in return receive real-time insights regarding passenger perceptions and exploit new feedback channels. Pilots in Istanbul and Dugopolje aim to collect evidence that bottom-up community-based innovation in existing critical urban mobility infrastructure can have a dramatic impact on how we move in our cities.

Follow us for more information and results of our tests to build stronger communities to support each other!

- Efficient scheduling: Designing timetables, vehicle assignments, and operational plans tailored to local and international needs.
- Data-driven planning: Using advanced tools like HASTUS to model and refine transport networks, ensuring cost-effective and passenger-focused solutions.
- Close collaboration: Working hand-in-hand with local teams to align solutions with operational realities and strategic goals.
- Tender preparation: Supporting clients in developing competitive bids for bus, tram, and BRT projects.

Our mission: To empower transport operators and authorities with practical, innovative, and sustainable solutions—driving efficiency, punctuality, and service quality worldwide.

Name: Cuneo Bike Festival
Description:

Il Cuneo Bike Festival, organizzato all'ufficio Mobilità del Comune di Cuneo, è solo la punta dell'iceberg di un lavoro lungo 365 giorni su temi quali mobilità sostenibile, sicurezza stradale, la pianificazione di città in cui cui tutti i diversi utenti della strada possano viaggiare insieme in sicurezza. E ancora, la valorizzazione del territorio, dell'uso della bicicletta nel quotidiano, con iniziative quali il Bike to school e il Bike to work, e l'inclusione, affinché sempre più persone possano provare l'effetto del vento in faccia. 

Dal 2024 il festival si svolge nel cuore di Cuneo, in piazza Galimberti. Nel 2025 il festival per la prima volta ha avviato una manifestazione di interesse per la ricerca di sponsor. Risultato? Sessanta tra sponsor e partner hanno contribuito alla quinta edizione del festival, che si è svolta dal 18 al 22 settembre 2025. Ogni mese, il Cuneo Bike Festival promuove un evento off - racconti di viaggio a pedali, pedalate, appuntamenti in collaborazione con le altre manifestazioni cuneesi.

Effecting such a big systems change is a big ask. So we are hard at work trying to build the needed coalitions and partnerships, which we believe will get us across the line.

We believe that the solutions we want to implement will go a long way in helping city systems in their efforts toward meaningful climate action, social cohesion as well as financial sustainability.

Name: opt IN transport
Description:
opt.in consultancy is a family business established by Mateusz Buchwald to follow his passion for passenger transport planning.
We are based in Poland but we are capable of supporting local authorities and passenger transport operators worldwide.
opt.in offers specialist services to the public transport industry; we combine our scheduling know-how with the knowledge and understanding of scheduling software solutions. We cooperate with experienced, versatile, analytical and responsible transport planners and consultants and we always consider issues of the environment, efficiency and safety while focused on developing transport strategies and providing solutions that encompass the needs of our clients. The work is provided as one-off projects or as long or short-term consultancy contracts (but we are also open to offering ad-hoc basis consultancy). We can also temporarily join the teams in commercial or operational departments in any capacity that may be required to provide extra support at busier times.
opt.in helps organizations, local authorities and operators to optimize resources while finding solutions that provide passenger-friendly timetables to increase ridership and driver-friendly schedules to retain the best driving force and attract new (and young) generation to join the public transport industry.
Our background is in the bus industry but we have taken part in projects for the tram, coach, railway and rail replacement but also for the road haulage operations.
We always take the comprehensive approach and analyze the impacts on ridership, operations, staff retention and the environment. We are data-driven, but we apply best practices both developed in-house and well-known within the industry. Our approach is to work closely with our clients to ensure the maximization of return on their investment.

Name: Réseau ATHENA
Description:
Réseau ATHÉNA : La technologie accessible au service de notre liberté de mouvement.

Sa fondatrice Anna Margot Le Doussal, diplômée en Design, Ingénierie de l'Innovation et Management. Son parcours hybride m'a menée à un constat simple : nous avons le droit de nous déplacer sans peur, mais les outils manquent.

C'est pour cela qu'elle a créé Réseau ATHÉNA.

Plus qu'un projet, c'est une stratégie globale pour répondre immédiatement à l'insécurité dans les transports :
 Une approche pragmatique : Nous réutilisons les navettes inutilisées le soir pour créer un maillage nocturne sécurisé là où il n'existe plus.
 Des dispositifs concrets : Je conçois et développe des outils embarqués (boutons d'alerte, systèmes de rassurance) simples, tangibles et accessibles à tous, pour augmenter réellement la sécurité perçue à bord.

ATHÉNA n'est pas une "haute technologie" complexe, c'est la technologie d'intérêt général.
C'est une solution conçue initialement pour répondre à l'urgence de la sécurité des femmes, mais qui, par essence, protège toutes et tous.

Parce que la liberté de mouvement dans l'espace public ne devrait jamais être un courage, mais un acquis.

Nosso compromisso vai além de simplesmente fornecer um veículo. Estamos sempre em busca de oportunidades para melhorar nossos serviços e garantir que o motorista parceiro tenha as ferramentas necessárias para obter sucesso em sua jornada como motorista de aplicativo. Compartilhamos informações valiosas sobre tendências, regulamentações e estratégias de negócios, para mantê-lo atualizado e ajudá-lo a se destacar no mercado.

Acreditamos que o sucesso de nossos clientes é o nosso sucesso. Estamos comprometidos em oferecer um serviço excepcional, veículos confiáveis e suporte abrangente para ajudar os motoristas parceiros a maximizarem seus ganhos e alcançarem seus objetivos profissionais.

Name: River Valley Transit
Description:
River Valley Transit (RVT) is a transit agency operated by the Estuary Transit District. RVT provides a variety of public transportation resources and serves 16 municipalities throughout Middlesex County and parts of New London County. Transportation options include traditional buses, trolleys, shuttles, taxis and paratransit services. Most services are open to the general public with no age or disability restrictions.

Our innovative mobility solutions are a model of efficiency and economy, offering reliable, punctual, and accessible transit solutions for riders throughout our communities. With an extensive network of routes and connection points, RVT is convenient, comprehensive and cost-effective!

RVT’s professional and courteous bus drivers ensure every ride is safe and comfortable while adhering to sustainable and eco-friendly practices. As a unified transit system, RVT streamlines new and existing routes to improve efficiency, offers fare options and provides discounts for passengers.

RVT was formed through a merger on July 1, 2022, which resulted in a strategic union of Middletown Area Transit (MAT) and 9-Town Transit (9TT). Leveraging each transit district’s staff, resources and capabilities, RVT continues identifying new and exciting transportation options to enhance and improve your experience.
