Name: LiveBus: The Transit Operations System
Description:
LiveBus is a real-time transit operations and passenger information system designed to make urban bus transport more reliable, transparent, and accessible.

In many Indian cities, bus commuters face uncertainty due to delays, lack of real-time information, and poor communication during disruptions. This disproportionately affects daily wage workers, students, and low-income populations who rely heavily on public transport. At the same time, transport authorities and operators lack live operational visibility, making it difficult to manage fleets efficiently or improve service quality.

LiveBus addresses this gap by providing accurate, real-time bus tracking and ETA predictions for passengers, along with an operational dashboard for transport authorities and operators. The platform aggregates live fleet data and translates it into actionable insights—helping riders plan their journeys better while enabling operators to monitor delays, improve punctuality, and optimize routes.

Unlike generic navigation apps that depend largely on static schedules, LiveBus is built specifically for city bus systems and complex urban environments. It focuses on ground-level realities such as traffic variability, operational disruptions, and the needs of public agencies.

Our goal is to increase trust in public transport, improve operational efficiency for cities, and encourage greater adoption of buses as a sustainable and inclusive mode of mobility. LiveBus aims to support cities in delivering better transit outcomes while improving everyday mobility for millions of commuters.

Name: Corredor ABD - Next Mobilidade
Description:
O Corredor ABD é um sistema de transporte que conecta a região da Grande São Paulo, ligando as zonas Sul e Leste às cidades de São Bernardo, Santo André, Mauá e Diadema. Responsável pela administração, limpeza, comunicação e manutenção dos nove terminais Metropolitanos, tornou-se referência em transporte limpo por investir na inovação tecnológica da frota, promovendo a diversificação e descarbonização das fontes de energia. A frota do Corredor Verde é composta por tecnologia elétrica, elétrica-híbrida e veículos movidos a biodiesel, visando máxima redução de gás carbônico – CO² na atmosfera. Os veículos contam com tomadas internas, poltronas anatômicas, piso baixo para acessibilidade, ar condicionado e wi-fi proporcionando maior conforto aos 140 mil passageiros que utilizam o sistema diariamente. 
Em sintonia com a Convenção do Clima da ONU e AGENDA 2030, considerando as emergências climáticas surgiu o Corredor Verde Sustentável de Transporte Metropolitano, visando promover transporte público eficiente e com qualidade, norteado pelos princípios de sustentabilidade: sob uma perspectiva humana, com mais inclusão social, redução das desigualdades e pela mitigação dos impactos ambientais, buscando a efetividade do desenvolvimento sustentável. 
Hoje em todo seu percurso, o Corredor Verde conta com mais de 11 mil manacás-da-serra, árvore nativa da região, tornado menos árida a paisagem de quem usa o serviço, a Next Mobilidade mostra que cada usuário é importante e tornar a viagem agradável é meta fundamental. 
A cada ano, a empresa tem ampliado suas ações ambientais, que vão do descarte adequado de baterias ao reuso de água, passando pela reciclagem de lâmpadas e óleo. 
Parte considerável dessas ações são conduzidas com o propósito de transformar vidas e dignificar pessoas. A empresa mantém um setor de Qualidade de Vida, com profissionais de saúde promovendo bem estar dos cerca de 1100 colaboradores.
Location: São Bernardo do Campo, São Paulo

Name: Verkehrsbetriebe Karlsruhe GmbH
Description:
Die Verkehrsbetriebe Karlsruhe GmbH (VBK) bieten den Menschen in der Fächerstadt ein leistungsstarkes und umweltfreundliches Mobilitätsangebot. Mit ihren Bussen und Trambahnen erbringen sie eine Leistung von jährlich mehr als zwölf Millionen Wagenkilometern und befördern so rund 63 Millionen Fahrgäste im Jahr. Die VBK zählen mit mehr als 1.500 Mitarbeiter*innen zu den größten Arbeitgebern in Karlsruhe. 

Das Schienennetz der VBK ist ein zentraler Knotenpunkt des „Karlsruher Modells“. Die Stadtbahnen der Albtal-Verkehrs-Gesellschaft (AVG) verkehren dabei bis in den Innenstadtbereich der Fächerstadt und übernehmen so Transportleistungen im Trambahnbereich. Mit der AVG findet eine enge und bewährte Zusammenarbeit statt. So kümmern sich die VBK in deren Werkstätten auch um Wartungs- und Instandhaltungsarbeiten an der Stadtbahnflotte.
Zudem betreiben die VBK mit der Schlossgarten- und der Turmbergbahn zwei beliebte Freizeitbahnen für die Naherholung im Stadtgebiet und gehören als eines von 30 Verkehrsunternehmen dem Karlsruher Verkehrsverbund (KVV) an.

Name: Go-Ahead Australia & New Zealand
Description:
Based in Melbourne, Go-Ahead Australia and New Zealand is the regional subsidiary of leading international public transport company, The Go-Ahead Group. We are exploring rail opportunities in Australia and New Zealand, where we can introduce Go-Ahead’s knowledge of operating large and complex rail networks. 

Go-Ahead is the lead operator for billions of rail journeys each year for customers in the UK and Nordic markets. In London, we proudly operate the world-famous Elizabeth line with our partners, Tokyo Metro and Sumitomo Corporation. This service, owned by Transport for London, continues to reshape the UK’s capital - and deliver a new level of quality in rail services. In addition we operate the UK’s largest set of operating companies in Govia Thameslink Railway. Combined, we are responsible for more than 35% of passenger rail services in the UK.

Go-Ahead is also expanding its rail operations in the Nordics, where it already runs services in Norway; in November 2025, we commenced operation of Stockholm's Metro network, with our partners ComfortDelGro. This network represents the largest public transport contract in continental Europe, serving 350 million passengers annually.

Name: JTMT - Jerusalem Transportation
Description:
• Jerusalem Transportation Master Plan Team (JTMT) has been shaping transportation in Jerusalem and the metro area since 1967, serving as a strategic arm of the Jerusalem Municipality, Israel’s Ministry of Transport (MOT), and Ministry of Finance (MOF).

• As a one-stop shop for metropolitan transport, JTMT oversees the initiation, planning, construction, and operation of a world-class transportation network - including the LRT network, future metro lines, bus systems, transit hubs, bike lane networks, and public transit lines - while advancing transit-oriented development (TOD) to enhance mobility, connectivity, and quality of life across Jerusalem and its metropolitan area.

• Jerusalem is Israel’s first region to operate a Light Rail Train (LRT) system, now evolving into the country’s first fully integrated LRT network. Unlike any other region, JTMT uniquely consolidates all transportation activities, overseeing current and future public transit and road infrastructure.

• Beyond public transport, JTMT leads holistic urban planning, integrating road construction, terminal and parking development, pedestrian and cycling infrastructure, and seamless Light Rail Train (LRT) connectivity. Through innovative solutions - elevators, escalators, and urban transportation enhancements - we ensure efficient, accessible, and sustainable transport for all.

• Our team comprises leading experts in transportation engineering, civil engineering, urban planning, and academia, specializing in transportation and transit-oriented development (TOD) to shape Jerusalem’s future and beyond.

Trober is a ridesharing platform that allows you to book and pay for convenient, safe, comfortable, and timely bus rides by connecting commuters traveling the same route with independent bus service providers.

At Trober, we are building smart public transport systems for smarter cities. This will ultimately improve commuters' productivity, and reduce road congestion and pollution.

Ride with us and let's redefine your journey!

Description:
MŪSŲ STRATEGINIS TIKSLAS

Užtikrinti Lietuvos gyventojams patogų susisiekimą viešuoju transportu, teikti kokybiškas keleivių vežimo paslaugas ir skatinti gyventojus naudotis viešuoju transportu, vadovaujantis įmonės vertybėmis:

Keleivių vežimo saugumas
Kokybiškų ir nenutrūkstamų paslaugų teikimas
Rūpinimasis aplinka, skatinant aplinkai palankaus viešojo transporto plėtrą Lietuvoje.

MŪSŲ MISIJA

Teikti saugias, patogias ir įvairioms keleivių grupėms prieinamas viešojo transporto paslaugas šiose veiklos srityse: reguliaraus ir nereguliaraus keleivių vežimo paslaugos Lietuvoje bei autobusų nuomos paslaugos.

MŪSŲ VIZIJA

Gerinti ir skatinti gyventojų judėjimą viešuoju transportu.

SAUGUMAS

Keleivių, darbuotojų ir kitų eismo dalyvių saugumas mums yra svarbiausias prioritetas. Mūsų autobusų vairuotojai yra aukštos kvalifikacijos, patyrę ir išmokyti elgtis įvairiose netikėtose situacijose kelyje.

RŪPINIMASIS APLINKA

Mes esame už „žaliąjį viešąjį transportą“, todėl mūsų autobusų parkas atitinka „Euro 5“ ir „Euro 6“ išmetamųjų teršalų standartus. Ateinančiais metais toliau investuosime, kad palaipsniui visiškai pereitume prie elektrinių autobusų.

Our mission is to continue to provide a sustain source of income for drivers across Africa.

Name: Stride
Description:
Stride Technology is an Australian technology company developing connected, sustainable transport solutions. We design and operate shared mobility systems — including E-Scooters and E-Bikes — powered by data, safety, and smart infrastructure.

Our platform integrates AI-based vision systems, real-time data sharing, and predictive maintenance, helping cities reduce congestion and emissions while improving accessibility.

With a focus on local innovation, Stride builds transport technology that connects communities and supports Australia’s transition to a smarter, greener mobility future.

Name: KEOLIS VAL D'YERRES VAL DE SEINE
Description:
Keolis assure l’exploitation et la maintenance de réseaux de transport urbains, périurbains et interurbains pour le compte de plus de 300 Autorités Organisatrices de Mobilité dans 13 pays. Leader du métro automatique et du tramway, notre Groupe maîtrise une dizaine de modes de transport, du train au vélo, des bus aux navettes maritimes et fluviales. Transport à la demande, transport sanitaire, auto-partage, covoiturage, parcs de stationnement, nous sommes présents sur l’ensemble de la chaîne de mobilité et favorisons la complémentarité entre les différents modes. Nous intégrons sans cesse de nouvelles solutions comme le véhicule autonome grâce auquel nous avons déjà transporté plus de 211 000 passagers à fin 2021. 

Bienvenue sur la page dédiée à Keolis Val d'Yerres Val de Seine ! Cette filiale exploite le territoire depuis août 2022 suite au gain de la DSP20. Le territoire de Val d’Yerres Val de Seine organise principalement la desserte en bus :
  - de la communauté d’agglomération Val d’Yerres Val de Seine : Brunoy, Boussy-Saint-Antoine, Crosne, Draveil, Epinay-sous-Sénart, Montgeron, Quincy-sous-Sénart, Vigneux-sur-Seine et Yerres
   - et de plusieurs communes limitrophes : Mandres-les-Roses, Périgny, Varennes-Jarcy et Villecresnes.

Ce territoire compte 60 lignes régulières qui assurent des dessertes intra ou intercommunales, et permettent de rejoindre :
  - plus de 10 gares et stations du réseau RER et Tramway
  - de nombreux lieux d’intérêt tels que les centres commerciaux Valdoly, Val d’Yerres 2, Belle Epine, Evry 2 et les pôles d’emplois d’Evry-Courcouronnes et Orly-Rungis
  - l’Université d’Evry à Evry-Courcouronnes, le lycée Rosa Parks à Montgeron, le lycée Talma à Brunoy et de nombreux collèges et lycées du secteur.

Description: La Régie des Transports de Martinique (R.T.M.) est un Etablissement Public Industriel et Commercial (E.P.I.C.) créé en Août 2020, qui a pour mission d’exploiter les 2 lignes du T.C.S.P (Transport en Commun en Site Propre) de Martinique et d’assurer des missions transversales sur le Réseau Centre et depuis 2022 sur le Réseau Nord.

Name: Kiliride
Description: Get ready, world - Kiliride is coming soon!  Our team has been working tirelessly to bring you the ultimate ride-hailing experience, complete with all the features you know and love. Stay tuned for updates on our official launch date - we can't wait to take you for a ride!.

Name: Transdev Bassin Annecien
Description:
Transdev Bassin Annécien est un acteur clé de la mobilité en Haute-Savoie, offrant des services de transport public fiables et durables pour faciliter les déplacements dans la région. 

Notre équipe s'engage à connecter les habitants, renforcer le développement local et accompagner la transition vers des solutions de transport écoresponsables. 

Rejoignez-nous pour contribuer à un avenir plus vert et dynamique !

Name: Zarząd Transportu Metropolitalnego
Description:
Organizujemy komunikację miejską, łącząc najważniejsze ośrodki zlokalizowane na obszarze 56 miast i gmin. Codziennie na terenie Śląska i Zagłębia kursuje ponad 1500 autobusów, tramwajów i trolejbusów pod szyldem ZTM. Autobusy ponad 450 linii obsługują 7 tys. przystanków, pokonując ponad 100 milionów kilometrów rocznie.

Tak duże przedsiębiorstwo nie byłoby w stanie dynamicznie się rozwijać, gdyby nie najcenniejsza dla każdego pracodawcy wartość - pracownicy. Zatrudniamy około 300 pracujących z pasją i poświęceniem pracowników. Dodatkowo operatorzy, którym zlecamy prace przewozowe, zatrudniają tysiące pracowników. To dzięki tym wszystkim osobom każdego dnia mieszkańcy Śląska i Zagłębia mają dostęp do przyjaznego środowisku transportu publicznego.

Name: Chartr
Description: We help transit companies with efficiency and get more riders. We help riders use transit by providing the accurate information and perfect journey planning.

Name: Dopravní podnik Ostrava
Description:
Dopravní podnik Ostrava a.s. provozuje městskou hromadnou dopravu v Ostravě. Zakladatelem společnosti, která je současným představitelem více než stodvacetileté tradice veřejné dopravy v našem regionu, je statutární město Ostrava.

Jsme a budeme společností, která se orientuje na potřeby našich zákazníků. Cestující a splňování jejich přepravních potřeb jsou důvodem naší existence.

Chceme být nejmodernějším městským dopravním podnikem v zemi.

Principy, kterými se řídíme:
- Vztah k zákazníkům 
plnění potřeb zákazníků (cestujících), otevřená komunikace a měření jejich spokojenosti
- Vztah ke společnosti 
efektivita, pokročilé plánování, zavádění nejmodernějších technologií
- Vztah k zaměstnancům 
motivace a péče o stávající zaměstnance, nábor a obnova kvalitními zaměstnanci, vytváření vhodného pracovního prostředí, ochrana zdraví, otevřená a přátelská komunikace
- Vztah k partnerům a dodavatelům 
budování vzájemně výhodných vztahů
- Vztah k životnímu prostředí 
maximální ekologizace a minimalizace dopadů naší činnosti na životní prostředí

Name: Better Atlanta Transit
Description: Better Atlanta Transit is a coalition of transit advocates, urban planners, business owners and community activists who support equitable and sustainable transportation for all Atlantans. We inform, organize, and mobilize the Atlanta community to influence decision makers and create a world-class transit system.

Description:
Fiageo Groupe Delbos
Société autocariste indépendante exploitant en Nouvelle-Aquitaine.

Name: Soler i Sauret, S.A.
Description:
[CAT] Els anys que separan la fundació l'any 1925 de Soler i Sauret de l'actualitat, ens han servit per adquirir una experiència i un coneixement, tant de la zona com del transport col·lectiu, que només es pot assolir quan el que t'avala és el temps. Així, sabem que en el entorn en què ens movem, en el transport col·lecitu de persones no només és important comptar amb uns bons recursos tècnics, sinó que tant o més important és tenir recursos humans d'alta qualitat.

[ESP] Los años que separan la fundación en el año 1925 de Soler i Sauret de la actualidad, nos han servido para adquirir una experiencia y un conocimiento, tanto de la zona como del transporte colectivo, que solo se puede alcanzar cuando se tiene el aval del tiempo. Con ello, sabemos que el entorno en el que nos movemos, el transporte colectivo de personas no solo es importante disponer de buenos recursos técnicos, sino también es igual o más importante disponer de recursos humanos a la altura de la calidad.
Location: Sant Felíu de Llobregat, Cataluña / Catalunya

Name: Expresso Campibus
Description: A Expresso Campibus é uma empresa de transporte coletivo municipal que atua em Campinas desde 2006. Atualmente, a empresa conta com uma frota de 132 veículos, atendendo a 28 linhas, que representam 17% de todo o atendimento de transporte coletivo na região de Campinas.

Name: Gemini Project
Description:
GEMINI - Greening European Mobility through Cascading Innovation Initiatives - is a project funded by the European Union under the Horizon Europe Program, involving a Consortium of 43 partners led by the Urban Electric Mobility Initiative (UEMI),.GEMINI aims at accelerating the progress towards climate neutrality through the demonstration and uptake of new shared mobility services, active transport modes, and micromobility and their integration with public transport in new generation Mobility as a Service (Maas).
GEMINI will develop and test sustainable business models for New Mobility Services (NMS), creating Mobility Living Labs (MLLs) in 8 mission cities (Amsterdam, Copenhagen, Helsinki, Ljubljana, Munich, Paris, Porto and Turin), engaging local communities in the co-creation, development and adoption of promising innovative mobility solutions with significant impact, accounting for user acceptance, sustainability and financial viability.

Name: Asabela
Description: Atuando no segmento de transporte rodoviário de pessoal, a ASABELA, está em constante evolução para melhor atendê-los. Nossa frota é composta por veículos de grande e pequeno porte como ônibus, micro-ônibus e vans, todos devidamente cadastrados nos órgãos fiscalizadores do ramo (ANTT, AGERBA e Embratur) e aptos a prestar de forma segura e confortável um serviço de excelência a preços bastante competitivos.

Name: Exodus  Mobility
Description: By the year 2050, Exodus aims to transition 100% of mass public transport in Africa to locally sourced and renewable energy resources.

Name: PWTransit Canada Ltd.
Description:
Dedicated to being the transportation provider of choice across Canada.

PWTransit, a division of Calgary-based Pacific Western Transportation, is a full-service bus transportation company, with operations located in British Columbia, Alberta and Ontario. 

With over five decades of operating experience, PWTransit manages fixed-route and paratransit systems on behalf of municipalities and provincial operating authorities. Our employees operate a variety of transit vehicles travelling almost 11 million kilometres annually. Our commitment to safety and customer service excellence includes providing up-to-date vehicles, quality maintenance facilities, and the development of highly-qualified personnel.

The foundation of Pacific Westerns' philosophy and commitment to providing exceptional customer service lies in our belief that we are an integral part of the hospitality and service industry and not simply a provider of bus transportation. Our approach to the recruitment and training of our staff, and the delivery of our service was established by Pacific Western Transportation founder R.B. Colborne.

Name: Strasbourg Mobilités
Description:
Opérateur de mobilités actives depuis plus de 10 ans, Strasbourg Mobilités exploite et développe le service de vélo partagé Vélhop pour le compte de l’Eurométropole de Strasbourg qui comprend plus de 6 500 vélos en location longue durée et libre-service.
Chaque année, Strasbourg Mobilités assure plus de 50 000 locations et propose sur l’agglomération strasbourgeoise une solution de mobilité efficiente et durable. En 2022, ce sont plus de 2,189 millions de journées de location qui ont été assurées par le service Vélhop. Strasbourg Mobilités a remporté au printemps 2023 le nouveau contrat de délégation de service public pour l’exploitation du service Vélhop jusqu’en 2030.  

Strasbourg Mobilités exploite également les VéloParcs, parkings à vélos sécurisés à proximité immédiate de la Gare de Strasbourg, et porte le PassMobilité, abonnement multimodal qui intègre l'ensemble des solutions de mobilité de l'EMS (bus, tram, TER, Vélhop et Citiz).

Name: Transit Link Pte Ltd
Description:
Transit Link Pte Ltd was incorporated on 16 November 1987 and became a subsidiary of the Land Transport Authority on 30 April 2010.

Today, TransitLink plays an important role in Singapore’s Public Transport system as the Transit Acquirer which provides integrated services and solutions to the authorities (such as the Public Transport Council and the Land Transport Authority), the Public Transport Operators (SBS Transit, SMRT, Tower Transit and Go-Ahead), the Card Managers (EZ-Link and NETS) and of course, all our valued customers.

As a service company, we process transit transactions and apportion revenue to the Public Transport Operators, provide card sales, refunds and replacements and top-ups of stored value smartcards for our customers.

By delivering outstanding customer service while supporting the national vision of Singapore’s public transport, we journey towards a vision and mission that encapsulates that very purpose.

Name: WLC Rental
Description:
WLC Rentals oferă servicii de închiriere auto pe termen scurt și mediu, adaptate nevoilor tale personale sau profesionale. Indiferent dacă ai nevoie de o mașină pentru câteva zile, o lună sau mai mult, îți punem la dispoziție o flotă modernă, prețuri transparente și o experiență fără complicații.

Facem parte din ecosistemul We Love Cars Romania— un grup integrat de branduri din domeniul mobilității, leasingului și serviciilor auto — iar obiectivul nostru este să îți oferim mobilitate ușoară, rapidă și fără stres.

Serviciile noastre:
- Închirieri auto pe termen scurt și mediu
- Soluții corporate & flote pentru companii
- Asistență completă pe perioada închirierii
- Flexibilitate la preluare, predare și kilometraj
- 12 puncte de livrare în România

Fără birocrație. Fără surprize. Doar drum deschis.

Description:

Våre dyktige rådgivere «oser» jernbane, og har en genuin interesse for jernbanebransjen, kollektivtrafikk og miljøet.

Name: Drivers Concierge Services
Description:
Drivers Concierge | Lüks Şoförlü Hizmetlerinizin Güvencesi

İstanbul merkezli Drivers Concierge, müşterilerimizin kendi araçlarında ya da firmamıza ait prestijli araçlarla özel şoförlü ulaşım ihtiyaçlarına profesyonel çözümler sunar. Kurumsal ya da bireysel tüm müşterilerimiz için; güvenli, konforlu ve şeffaf bir hizmet deneyimi sunmayı ilke edinmiş durumdayız.

 Hizmetlerimiz:
• Kendi aracınızla özel şoför kiralama
• Mercedes Vito ile VIP araç + şoför hizmeti
• Araç muayenesi için teslim alma ve götürme
• Servis - bakım süreçlerinde araç takibi ve yönlendirme
• Günlük, haftalık ya da aylık şoför kiralama
• Özel etkinlik, toplantı ve seyahatler için esnek çözümler

 Neden Drivers?
• İK ve operasyon yükü olmadan profesyonel şoför desteği
• Yerine şoför garantisi (izin, hastalık gibi durumlarda ikame)
• Faturalı hizmet ile gider avantajı
• Aylık faturalandırma kolaylığı
• Gizlilik, dakiklik ve temsil yeteneği yüksek personel kadrosu

Sürüş sadece bir ulaşım aracı değil, aynı zamanda bir deneyimdir. Biz, bu deneyimi sizin adınıza en iyi şekilde yönetiyoruz.

 Bize ulaşın, ulaşım anlayışınızı birlikte değiştirelim.

Name: Groupe Mooland
Description:
Fondé en 1958 par Osmann Mooland (1933–2018), Mooland est le leader du transport de voyageurs à La Réunion, avec une flotte de 500 autobus et autocars et plus de 800 collaborateurs.

Partenaire des collectivités, nous assurons chaque jour des services de transport urbain, interurbain et scolaire, ainsi que des prestations touristiques et sur mesure (associations, CSE, clubs sportifs, mariages…).

Contactez-nous pour vos besoins de transport ou vos projets de mobilité.

Name: Wiener Lokalbahnen Verkehrsdienste
Description: Die Wiener Lokalbahnen Verkehrsdienste sind Experten in der Beförderung von Menschen mit eingeschränkter Mobilität. Langjährige Erfahrung und persönliche Betreuung zeichnen uns aus.

Name: FieldTech Rolling Stock Solutions
Description: New born of a group of railway maintenance and service companies operating in the Middle East, North Africa, and Europe, we pride ourselves at FIELDTECH Services, on delivering above-and-beyond services to exceed our valued customers priorities.

Name: Quantum Mobility
Description:
Driving the Future of Mobility

Quantum Mobility is a next-generation Mobility-as-a-Service (MaaS) platform redefining how people move. Our intelligent carsharing solution integrates seamlessly into residential communities, luxury hotels, and workplaces, delivering an exclusive, on-demand amenity. Vehicles are positioned on-site in dedicated parking spaces and can be reserved, unlocked, and driven instantly through the Quantum Mobility app.

Experience the future of transportation - Carsharing as an Amenity.

Name: Moove Cars USA
Description: At Moove Cars, we specialize in providing top-tier fleet solutions for passenger transportation in urban areas. As industry leaders in Europe, we are proud to set the benchmark for excellence, and we are now expanding our presence in the United States to bring our expertise to new markets.

Name: Kattegatkomitéen
Description:
Kattegatkomitéen blev stiftet i 2008 og er en sammenslutning af politikere og interessenter fra det private erhvervsliv, videninstitutioner og organisationer fra hele Danmark, der alle arbejder for at fremme visionen om en fast forbindelse via Kattegat mellem Jylland og Sjælland til hurtigtog og biler. 

Kattegatkomitéen arbejder for at synliggøre, udbrede og videreudvikle visionen om et nyt, sammenhængende Danmark og påvirke landets beslutningstagere til at igangsætte tilbundsgående undersøgelser af en fast Kattegatforbindelse, så der i Folketinget snarest muligt kan træffes en principbeslutning om forbindelsen. 

I Kattegatkomitéens arbejde for en fast Kattegatforbindelse søger Kattegatkomitéen i dialog med andre organisationer, herunder også kritikere af projektet, at sikre et bredt og nuanceret beslutningsgrundlag, som kan ligge til grund for Folketingets stillingtagen til projektet. 

Kattegatkomitéen tager som udgangspunkt ikke stilling til den konkrete linjeføring for en fast Kattegatforbindelse, eller hvordan projektet skal konstrueres.

Name: BluMob Concessionária de Transporte Urbano de Blumenau SPE LTDA
Description:
A BluMob é a empresa concessionária de transporte coletivo da cidade de Blumenau e
iniciou suas atividades no município em 1º de julho de 2017 quando assinou seu contrato para a prestação do serviço de transporte urbano.

Name: Fonds de dotation du Grand Paris Express
Description:
Plus qu'un réseau de transport, le Grand Paris Express va redessiner la ville.

Pour renforcer son rôle urbain, social et environnemental, il porte la culture et la création en son cœur. Le Grand Paris Express c’est aussi une grande commande artistique pour le XXIe siècle : plus de 500 œuvres à l'horizon 2031 !

Pour chacune des gares du nouveau métro, un artiste et un architecte œuvrent en tandem. Des artistes mondialement reconnus — Sophie Calle, JR, Daniel Buren, Pistoletto etc. — côtoient ainsi une nouvelle génération d’artistes — Prune Nourry, Noémie Goudal, Hicham Berrada, Duy Anh Nhan Duc, etc. — avec des projets se déclinant sur l’ensemble du spectre des formes contemporaines.

Name: B2-Ride by Pikyrent
Description:
B2-Ride by Pikyrent è la soluzione tecnologica completa per lo sharing multiveicolo semplice, sicuro ed efficiente.

Distribuita e utilizzata da Pikyrent — operatore attivo dal 2022 a Bari, Torino e Milano — B2-Ride nasce per unire tecnologia e sostenibilità, aiutando aziende, PA e operatori a creare la propria soluzione di mobilità condivisa.

Siamo più di una piattaforma: siamo anche operatori. Per questo ogni funzionalità, integrazione o aggiornamento è pensato per rispondere alle reali esigenze di chi gestisce flotte elettriche o avvia servizi di sharing. Lo facciamo con un approccio collaborativo e concreto, perché conosciamo il settore… da dentro.

Con B2-Ride, pensiamo e costruiamo insieme il futuro della mobilità sostenibile.

Name: Bogotá Móvil SAS
Description: Movilizamos vidas con responsabilidad. Somos un operador del Sistema TransMilenio S.A.

Name: Waypoint
Description: Waypoint Transit is an automated transportation planning consultant that generates technical studies and reports for municipal agencies. With Waypoint, cities can generate higher-quality reports faster, and at lower cost, reducing timelines from years to months.

Name: MetroLink Tulsa
Description:
The Metropolitan Tulsa Transit Authority (MetroLink Tulsa) was formed in August 1968 by the City of Tulsa. MetroLink Tulsa is a public trust.

Today MetroLink Tulsa services 199 square miles of Tulsa and surrounding areas such as Jenks, Sand Springs, and Broken Arrow. We operate Fixed Route and Paratransit bus services, and MetroLink Tulsa administration is overseen by a seven-member Board of Trustees.

There are five priority areas to pursue MetroLink Tulsa’s mission and vision. They include:

1. Growing funding sources
2. MetroLink Tulsa recognized as a vital economic development player
3. Empowering employees
4. MetroLink Tulsa as an enviable workplace
5. Improve customer experience

Name: MOBILITÉ SUD
Description:
À compter du 1er août 2024, MOBILITÉ SUD devient le nouvel opérateur responsable de la gestion et de l’exploitation des services de transports urbains et interurbains pour les 12 communes du sud de la Martinique. 

MOBILITÉ SUD succède à Unité Sud Transport, qui a assuré l'amélioration des services de transport du sud depuis le 1er janvier 2016, la gestion et l’exploitation des services de transports urbains et scolaires pour les 12 communes du sud. Après huit ans de service, UNITE SUD TRANSPORT, laisse place à MOBILITÉ SUD.

Name: Verkehrsbetriebe Biel / Transports publics biennois
Description:
Mit den Verkehrsbetrieben Biel erreichen täglich gegen 50‘000 Fahrgäste ihr Ziel: umweltfreundlich, sicher und pünktlich. Die VB betreiben in der Stadt und Agglomeration ein Dutzend Trolley- und Autobuslinien sowie die beiden Standseilbahnen nach Leubringen und Magglingen. Derzeit verfügen wir über die modernste Busflotte der Schweiz. Als selbständiges, dynamischen und innovationsfreudiges Unternehmen der Stadt Biel sind wir für rund 200 Mitarbeitende ein attraktiver Arbeitgeber. 

Biel ist die zehntgrösste Stadt der Schweiz – eine lebendige Stadt. Am Jurasüdfuss unmittelbar am Bielersee gelegen, lockt Biel mit reichlich Kultur, unzähligen Gelegenheiten sportlich aktiv zu sein sowie wundervollen Freizeitangeboten. Und wie die Stadt selbst, sind auch ihre Verkehrsbetriebe zweisprachig. Soyez bienvenus à Bienne!

Name: Maxi Mobility
Description: Maxi is an enabler of innovative mobility with zero environmental impact that supports taxi drivers in the shift to electric vehicles by providing an all-inclusive package of services. Maxi is a Benefit company and an innovative start-up. MAXI's Mission is to enable the transition towards sustainable mobility in metropolitan areas, revolutionizing the taxi sector by adopting high-end electric vehicles. MAXI's Vision is to become a global reference point for sustainable urban mobility, encouraging the adoption of electric vehicles in all major metropolises around the world.

Name: VAG Freiburg - Freiburger Verkehrs AG
Description: Die Freiburger Verkehrs AG ist das städtische Nahverkehrsunternehmen in Freiburg im Breisgau. Unsere Straßenbahnen, Busse und Frelos halten Freiburg in Bewegung. Mit unserer Arbeit machen wir die Welt jeden Tag ein Stück besser. Deshalb nehmen wir es in die Hand und gestalten die regionale Verkehrswende. Deshalb bleiben wir immer in Bewegung für eine lebenswerte Stadt.

Name: CityCharging
Description:
CityCharging is een ChargePoint Operator (CPO) en is gespecialiseerd in het plaatsen en beheren van openbare laadpalen. Wij werken hiervoor samen met steeds meer Nederlandse gemeenten. In de gemeenten waarmee wij samenwerken kunnen e-rijders gratis een openbare laadpaal aanvragen. 

Wij bouwen aan een netwerk van laadpalen door Nederland. Hiermee bieden we huidige en toekomstige e-rijders de mogelijkheid om een bijdrage te leveren aan stillere en schonere mobiliteit.

Name: HBSS Canada
Description: HBSS Canada was founded in 2023 by a team of experienced transportation professionals. We are committed to providing innovative and cost-effective transportation solutions that help our clients improve the efficiency and effectiveness of their operations.

Name: Swapy
Description:
Somos Swapy, tu socio estratégico en la transformación hacia una movilidad eléctrica eficiente y sostenible. 

Nuestras motos son la solución ideal para el servicio de última milla. La recarga se convierte en un proceso rápido y sin contratiempos; un simple cambio de batería en nuestras estaciones Swapy y los conductores están listos para seguir adelante.

Este enfoque no solo mejora la productividad de tu flota, sino que también refuerza el compromiso con el medio ambiente, reduciendo costos operativos y la huella de carbono.

Unite a Swapy y sé parte de la revolución de la movilidad eléctrica.

Name: e-Ride Chile
Description:
e-Ride Chile: Liderando la Movilidad Sostenible y Eficiente
En e-Ride Chile, estamos revolucionando el transporte chileno hacia un futuro más limpio. Nuestra misión es descarbonizar y reducir contaminantes, ofreciendo soluciones de movilidad eléctrica accesibles y eficientes. Aspiramos a ser el referente en electromovilidad, impulsando un cambio cultural positivo.

Fundados por Víctor Ríos S. (15+ años en transformación energética) y Michael Farías O. (experto en logística), nos enfocamos en:

Optimización Operativa: Máxima eficiencia en cada viaje.
Descarbonización y Transición Energética: Actor clave en la reducción de emisiones.
Gestión Tecnológica: Servicios de vanguardia con plataforma robusta.
Nuestra propuesta de valor es clara:

Movilidad Consciente: Transporte 100% eléctrico que reduce emisiones.
Transparencia Ecológica: Certificados de reducción de CO2, cuantificando tu impacto.
Confort Premium: Reservas sencillas y flota moderna con conductores profesionales.
Socios Estratégicos: Apoyamos a empresas y hoteles en sus objetivos ESG.
Contamos con conductores expertos y una flota 100% oficial y regulada, garantizando seguridad y fiabilidad. Ofrecemos traslados ejecutivos y particulares cero emisiones, además de alianzas estratégicas para empresas y hoteles.

Nos diferenciamos por nuestro profundo saber hacer, el compromiso medible con la sostenibilidad, soluciones integrales, y tecnología confiable. Estamos firmemente alineados con la Ley de Eficiencia Energética 21.305, promoviendo la electromovilidad y la reducción de emisiones en Chile.

En e-Ride Chile, cada viaje es un paso hacia un futuro más verde. Únete a la revolución sostenible.

Name: Via Ouro Coletivos
Description:
Nascida em 2004, a Via Ouro Coletivos é a operadora do transporte coletivo na cidade de Nova Lima, na Região Metropolitana de Belo Horizonte (MG).

Contamos com cerca de 150 funcionários, distribuídos nas áreas administrativa, manutenção e operacional. Estes nos ajudam a atender os clientes com segurança, respeito e pontualidade.

Name: ETV S.A.
Description: Somos la empresa Boliviana líder en servicios integrales de logística de valores, entidad financiera de servicios complementarios que opera en el país desde el año 2010.

Name: Go South West
Description:
Go South West, part of the Go-Ahead Group incorporates two brands - Plymouth Citybus, and Go Cornwall Bus.
We run a local bus service in tune with the local market, from students to pensioners, local residents to exploring tourists.
Go South West offers commercial, tendered and contracted bus services across Plymouth, West Devon and Cornwall, as well as the servicing, repair and refurbishment of cars, commercial vehicles, buses and coaches. 
In simple terms, we want to help people reach their destination – whether that’s supporting the community, providing careers and training, or simply taking people from A to B - with every journey taken care of. 

We are part of the Go-Ahead Group Ltd, an international transport group and one of the UK’s leading public transport providers.

Name: Taxi Monterrico
Description: Somos Monterrico App, una empresa peruana con 28 años de excelencia en el transporte, brindando soluciones eficientes y confiables para satisfacer las necesidades de nuestros clientes

Name: Keolis Arras
Description: Keolis Arras, opérateur du réseau de mobilité Artis (bus, navettes, modes doux)

Name: Elecktromob private limited
Description: Elecktromob is a growing EV rental service startup, providing eco-friendly e-bikes, e-scooters, and charging solutions for daily commuters, students, and delivery riders. Our mission is to promote green mobility and reduce traffic and pollution in Indian cities.

Name: Mobilité Urbaine Innovante et Intelligente
Description:
"La Mobilité Urbaine Réinventée : Connectez-vous à l'Innovation Intelligente et Explorez l'Avenir des Déplacements en Ville !"

Bienvenue sur la page LinkedIn de "Mobilité Urbaine Innovante et Intelligente". Notre mission est de redéfinir la façon dont nous nous déplaçons en ville grâce à des solutions intelligentes et innovantes. Rejoignez notre communauté dynamique et découvrez les dernières avancées technologiques, les tendances émergentes et les idées novatrices qui façonnent la mobilité urbaine de demain.

Ensemble, nous sommes à la pointe de l'innovation en intégrant des technologies de pointe telles que le SAEIV (Système d'Aide à l'Exploitation et d'Information Voyageurs) et les systèmes ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) pour créer des systèmes de transport collectif plus efficaces, connectés et intelligents.

Partagez vos connaissances, vos expériences et vos idées inspirantes pour façonner un avenir où la mobilité urbaine est intelligente, durable et accessible à tous. Rejoignez-nous dès maintenant et connectez-vous à l'avenir des déplacements en ville. Ensemble, construisons une mobilité urbaine plus innovante, plus intelligente et plus humaine !

https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VbBM6IfHVvTTxGoSZa1U

Name: Keolis Vélizy Vallée de la Bièvre
Description:
Keolis assure l’exploitation et la maintenance de réseaux de transport urbains, périurbains et interurbains pour le compte de plus de 300 Autorités Organisatrices de Mobilité dans 13 pays. Leader du métro automatique et du tramway, notre Groupe maîtrise une dizaine de modes de transport, du train au vélo, des bus aux navettes maritimes et fluviales. Transport à la demande, transport sanitaire, auto-partage, covoiturage, parcs de stationnement, nous sommes présents sur l’ensemble de la chaîne de mobilité et favorisons la complémentarité entre les différents modes. Nous intégrons sans cesse de nouvelles solutions comme le véhicule autonome grâce auquel nous avons déjà transporté plus de 211 000 passagers à fin 2021. 

Bienvenue sur la page dédiée à Keolis Vélizy Vallée de la Bièvre ! Cette filiale exploite le territoire de Vélizy Vallées pour le compte d'Ile-de-France Mobilités depuis le 1er août 2022 . 
Le territoire de Vélizy Vallées organise principalement la desserte en bus  de l’est et du sud-est de la communauté d’agglomération Versailles Grand Parc : Bièvres, Buc, Châteaufort, Jouy-en-Josas, les Loges-en-Josas, Toussus-le-Noble, Vélizy-Villacoublay et Viroflay
et de plusieurs communes limitrophes : Magny-les-Hameaux, Saclay et Saint-Rémy-lès-Chevreuse. 

Ce territoire compte 33 lignes régulières qui assurent des dessertes intra ou intercommunales, et permettent de rejoindre : plus de 20 gares et stations du réseau TRAIN/RER MÉTRO TRAMWAY; de nombreux lieux d’intérêt tels que le centre-ville de Versailles et les pôles d’emplois de Buc et les Loges-en-Josas et Vélizy-Villacoublay; le Campus HEC à Jouy-en-Josas, le lycée Franco-allemand à Buc et de nombreux collèges et lycées du secteur

Name: Loopway
Description: In today’s world traffic and pollution has become a concern in the metropolitan cities. People are too busy making a living that they forget to make a life. LOOPWAY’s main moto is to reduce the transportation time and make this process automated. Autonomous Vehicle, Electric vehicle, Micro Tunnels and Integration are the pillars of LOOPWAY. Our objective is to create a highly developed underground expressway designed for rapid intra city travel. We are working for THE URBAN MOBILITY REVOLUTION.

Name: Yuja
Description:
Yuja is a modern and sustainable urban rides platform for affordable and efficient last-mile mobility. 

~~~ The Yuja Stack ~~~

-> Yuja Driver app: Productivity app for drivers to find rides faster and earn better
 [[ https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.yuja.driver ]]

-> Yuja Rider app: Find nearby street-hail rides easily and take affordable rides at standard fares
 [[ https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.yuja.rider ]]

-> Yuja Citystream: Comprehensive stack for paratransit and last-mile mobility fleet management and monitoring
 [[ admin.yujarides.com ]]

-> Yuja TripMapper: City-scale transit data collection and analytics platform
 [[ tripmapper.yujarides.com ]]

-> Yuja Unnati: Paratransit data collection and analytics platform
 [[ https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.yuja.autounnati ]]

-> Shared Mobility Platform: Low-cost shared rides, high-throughput passenger ops and vehicle ops


~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~


Supported by PDEU-IIC, iHub, IIEC IIT-GN, NSRCEL IIM-B. An innovation-focused team, building an industry-leading paratransit stack equipped powered by proprietary technology and patents.

We also work with cities, transport authorities, and transport operators for enabling service integrations as well as custom solutions. To learn more about how the Yuja platform can help your city become better connected, reach out to us today.

Because, connection is all we need.

Team Yuja

Name: Brakar
Description:
Brakar er ansvarlig for kollektivtrafikken i Buskerud og er eid av Buskerud Fylkeskommune.

Brakar er ansvarlig for utvikling, drift og samordning av kollektiv persontransport og skoleskyss. Seksjonen skal videre gi informasjon til befolkningen om tilbudet og yte tjenester relatert til dette. 

Brakar er opprettet med sikte på å effektivisere og utvikle kollektivtrafikken i Buskerud. En viktig målsetting for seksjonen er å øke antall kollektivreisende. Brakar skal primært ikke selv utføre rutetrafikk, men kjøpe tjenester fra eksterne transportører.

Brakar betjener en region på 14 900 km2 som omfatter 21 kommuner og om lag 255 000 innbyggere. Om lag 350 busser kjører 12 millioner rutekilometer pr år, i tillegg kommer ekspressbussene.

Det foretas ca. 11 millioner reiser årlig med det lokale busstilbudet i fylket. I tillegg til dette kommer reisende med ekspressbusser og tog

Name: HADAG Seetouristik und Fährdienst AG
Description: Welcome to Hamburg’s harbour and HADAG, which has been operating a scheduled boat service in and around Hamburg's docks since 1888. Nowadays HADAG is responsible for all ferry traffic in Hamburg’s harbour in co-operation with the HVV Transport Alliance - a great opportunity to obtain a close-up impression of activities in the docks.

Name: Pikyrent
Description:
Pikyrent è una start-up innovativa nata con l'obiettivo di sviluppare progetti eco-sostenibili nell'ambito della smart mobility. 

Attraverso un servizio di sharing mobility fruibile tramite app, Pikyrent mette a servizio della città una flotta di microcar e scooter full electric, in modalità free floating. 

La missione di Pikyrent è contribuire ad avviare un processo di cambiamento della mobilità cittadina, lavorando ad un modello di micromobilità condivisa semplice ma anche sicuro.

Vivi la città come ti pare!
#PickaPiky

Name: KEOLIS CONSEIL ET PROJETS
Description: KEOLIS CONSEIL ET PROJETS est une filiale du groupe KEOLIS qui accompagne exploitants et autorités organisatrices dans l'optimisation de leurs systèmes de transport.

Name: Mobipar
Description: Mobipar si distingue dal 1993 nella gestione dei servizi di sosta regolamentata e mobilità sostenibile, offrendo soluzioni innovative per migliorare l'efficienza dei servizi urbani. La nostra missione è migliorare la qualità della vita nelle città, integrando la gestione dei parcheggi con sistemi di mobilità sostenibile. Attraverso l'uso di tecnologie avanzate e la nostra app dedicata, ottimizziamo la sosta e riduciamo l'inquinamento, contribuendo a un ambiente urbano più pulito e vivibile.

Name: Cadde Park - EsPark
Description: Cadde üzeri parklanmalar için geliştirilmiş Android tabanlı ve E-Arşiv entegreli, Kemaradan Plaka Okuma ve Temassız Kredi Kartı özelliği olan özel ve gelişmiş bir otomasyon sistemidir. Ayrıca Kullanıcı Konumlarını anlık Haritadan takip edebilirsiniz.

Name: Diplomat Rent A Car
Description:
Diplomat Rent A Car was established in 2004 under the leadership of Mr. Abdulrahman bin Mohi Al-Bassami, one of the pioneers of the transportation sector in Saudi Arabia. The company started with a fleet of 50 vehicles and has grown to more than 1,700 vehicles with branches covering key regions across the Kingdom. We provide daily, weekly and monthly car rentals, mobile maintenance services, GCC travel authorizations, and tailored rental solutions for individual customers, corporate clients, government entities, VIPs and businesswomen. Diplomats operates a unified digital system that connects all branches to enable smart operational management, with a continuous commitment to fleet renewal and staff development.
Our mission is to deliver premium car rental services with high professional standards that ensure customer comfort and trust. Our vision is to be the first choice in car rental through well-planned expansion and operational efficiency. As part of our social responsibility, we support charities, participate in community events, and invest in training and employing Saudi national talent.

Name: Estevan Morel Taxi
Description:
Entreprise de taxi
Transport de personnes

Name: Pars Mobility
Description:
Pars Mobility, şehir yaşamını daha pratik ve çevreci hale getirmek için yola çıkan bir scooter kiralama şirketidir. Şehirlerdeki trafik yoğunluğunu azaltmayı ve karbon ayak izini küçültmeyi hedefleyen firmamız, güvenilir ve çevre dostu elektrikli scooterlarıyla kullanıcılarına benzersiz bir mobilite deneyimi sunar.

Müşterilerimize kolaylık ve konfor sağlamak için modern ve bakımlı scooterlarımızı şehrin dört bir yanına dağıtmaktayız. Pars Mobility olarak, şehir içi ulaşımı daha çevreci ve ekonomik bir hale getirirken, aynı zamanda kullanıcılarımıza özgürlük ve bağımsızlık sunmayı amaçlıyoruz.

Tek tıkla erişilebilen kullanıcı dostu uygulamamız aracılığıyla scooterları kiralama, kullanma ve geri teslim etme işlemleri son derece kolay ve hızlıdır. Ayrıca, 7/24 müşteri desteği ekibimizle herhangi bir sorun yaşadığınızda yanınızdayız.

Pars Mobility, şehirdeki hareketliliği artırmak, trafik sıkışıklığını azaltmak ve çevreye duyarlı bir yaşam tarzını teşvik etmek için çalışıyor. Bizimle birlikte, şehirlerimizi daha temiz, daha yaşanabilir ve daha sürdürülebilir hale getirmek için adımlar atabilirsiniz.

Name: Scoo Mobilidade Brasil
Description: Startup pioneira em micromobilidade elétrica no Brasil.

Name: VE CAR
Description: VE CAR est une structure spécialisée dans la gestion au quotidien de vos moyens de transport (taxis, bus et voitures personnelles) ainsi que dans l'achat et vente de véhicules de tous genres.

Name: Drop
Description: Drop is a fleet operator of electric powered eco-friendly rickshaws that harness technology to connect riders to drivers for first & last mile / short distance commuting

Name: iTaxi
Description: Bienvenido a iTaxi. La forma más segura, rápida y accesible de moverte en la ciudad. Nuestra plataforma conecta a usuarios con conductores de confianza, ofreciendo un servicio eficiente, con tarifas justas y sin sorpresas. Descarga la APP y disfruta de una nueva experiencia de movilidad. !Tu viaje comienza aquí!

Name: After 6 Tours
Description: After 6 Tours was established in 2022, with the idea to bring a quality party rental service to the Birmingham area. Our passion for excellence is what drove us from the beginning, and it continues to push us each day. At After 6 Tours, we believe that offering the best rentals, even the most basic ride, can make a big difference in the lives of our customers. We strive to be the best in the industry; come see what we are all about. Get in touch with us today to feel the After 6 Tours experience.

Name: Come Back Home
Description: Come Back Home è un start-up innovativa che nasce dall'esigenza di assicurare un trasporto notturno sicuro e affidabile e per collegarti con i punti più strategici della città, vicini agli eventi che ami di più. Arriva senza stress, goditi la serata e torna a casa in sicurezza.

Name: GRUAS ANTONIO MORENO E HIJO SL
Description: GRUAS ANTONIO MORENO E HIJO SL es una compañía de asistencia en carretera ubicada en Vélez Málaga

Name: Rappid
Description: We're an instant messenger delivering packages right across the city. We deliver for professional services, organisations, food stores and pharmacy's.

Name: Remisse Go - Vamos

Progettiamo e realizziamo infrastrutture per aziende, centri commerciali, enti pubblici e spazi urbani, con l’obiettivo di rendere più accessibile e ordinata la mobilità dolce. Offriamo diverse soluzioni:
	•	Portabici dal design distintivo come La Ruota, La Spirale e Tondo
	•	Parcheggi per monopattini disponibili nei modelli Basic e Plus
	•	Isole per e-bike con punti di ricarica integrati
	•	Totem pubblicitari digitali, perfetti per valorizzare gli spazi con informazioni o promozioni

Scegliere Microparking significa investire in soluzioni pensate per il futuro della mobilità, migliorando l’esperienza degli utenti e contribuendo concretamente alla sostenibilità urbana.

Vuoi rendere il tuo spazio più ordinato, innovativo e funzionale? Contattaci per una consulenza personalizzata e scopri come possiamo aiutarti a trasformare la mobilità nel tuo ambiente.

Description:

Basée à Dakar, Dievo Fleet poursuit son expansion vers Mbour, avec pour ambition de révolutionner la mobilité urbaine et interurbaine au Sénégal en alliant innovation, performance et satisfaction client.

With over 350 bus stops and 12 different bus routes serving the City of Nashua, you can rely on NTS to get you where you need to go. Additionally, NTS connects with other regional service providers such as Boston Express and the Manchester Transit Authority (MTA).

Name: Dash
Description:
Considering that the number of cars in Cluj has tripled to 250,000 in the past decade, with only 15% having parking spaces, and people spending 50 hours stuck in traffic each year, we realized the need for a new mode of transportation - meet Dash, an efficient and safe way of traveling from point A to point B, without worrying about traffic or parking space.

We offer a fleet of e-bikes that will be conveniently located throughout the city without requiring specific docking stations. Any bike can be unlocked with a simple click from our mobile app or by bringing your phone close to the center of the handlebar. Each bike will have a stable basket in front, allowing you to carry your belongings during your ride. You will be able to charge your phone wirelessly by placing it in a case on the handlebars while providing real-time navigation and indications, such as if you're still within a green zone.

Are you a student, employee, delivery person, or simply someone who wants to use Dash regularly? We thought of you! We'll offer special subscriptions that allow for more frequent use of Dash at lower costs. We'll also provide options for group rides with friends, referral codes, and various bonuses to enhance your experience.

Name: Intelligent Transport Society of Korea(ITS Korea)
Description:
Since the introduction of ITS in Korea in 1990, the industry has witnessed remarkable growth over the past 30 years. This growth has led to the nationwide expansion and maturation of ITS, and we have now entered an advanced stage of development. 
With the recent adoption of cutting-edge mobility technologies such as Autonomous Driving, Digital Twin, 5G, UAM, and AI, ITS has emerged as a sector 
with immense future growth potential. 
ITS Korea is committed to leading the advancement of ITS in Korea. We are dedicated to addressing traffic challenges and environmental issues through carbon neutrality, and we work tirelessly to build an industrial ecosystem that brings together government, industry, academia, and research institutions.
Under the slogan "Smart Move, Better Life," ITS Korea has established itself as the leading ITS organization in Korea. We are actively engaged in various fields, including Standardization, Performance Evaluation, ITS Certification, Research and Development, International Business, Global Cooperation, and Project Consulting.
Through our continuous efforts, in collaboration with government agencies, we have successfully secured the hosting of two significant global ITS events: the 2025 Suwon ITS Asia-Pacific Forum and the 2026 Gangneung ITS World Congress. These events will further elevate Korea’s status in the global ITS arena, and we are committed to expanding the export of advanced Korean ITS technologies and leading the establishment of global technology standards.
We warmly invite you to join us at these upcoming ITS events in Korea in 2025 and 2026. 
ITS Korea looks forward to sharing the latest advancements in ITS and cutting-edge mobility technologies with you.

Escolher a JC Turismo é optar por um parceiro de confiança, que se empenha diariamente em garantir a excelência em cada destino. Estamos comprometidos em oferecer um atendimento impecável, tornando cada viagem uma experiência única e especial.

Convidamos você a descobrir por que a JC Turismo é a escolha preferida de tantos clientes satisfeitos. Confie na nossa experiência e dedicação para transformar sua próxima viagem executiva em uma experiência excepcional.

Nos missions contribuent pour les Opérateurs de Transports (Collectivités, Exploitants…) d’améliorer la qualité produite délivrée à la clientèle et de les accompagner pour certains d’entre eux, dans une démarche de certification NF Services.

Name: ScootSpace
Description:
We are ScootSpace, an urban mobility infrastructure startup on a mission to make micromobility the next big thing - safely, efficiently, and most importantly, at scale. With cities worldwide embracing e-scooters, the lack of safe, organized, and scalable infrastructure has become a critical barrier — leading to unregulated parking, indoor bans, fire risks, and sidewalk clutter. We saw the gap, and we’re here to solve it.

Our modular, solar-powered, and fire-safe stations are more than parking—they’re a platform for transformation. Designed with a dual-layer layout to optimize space, our infrastructure integrates seamlessly into universities, workplaces, transit hubs, and tourist areas, solving first- and last-mile challenges where it matters most.

We empower private riders, often overlooked in current systems, with secure, convenient charging and parking solutions—so they can ride freely without risking theft, damage, or fire danger. At the same time, we strengthen shared e-scooter (SES) systems by offering designated docking spaces that reduce operational chaos and help cities enforce compliance.

ScootSpace isn’t just a product—it’s a commitment to smarter, safer, and more sustainable micromobility. We believe the future of transportation starts with infrastructure that’s clean, connected, and built for scale. Let’s create cities where e-scooters elevate urban life—not complicate it.

Name: CicloTo
Description:
Il progetto CicloTO è stato selezionato dalla Città di Torino e finanziato dalla Bloomberg Philanthropies nell’ambito del programma Youth Climate Action Fund.

CicloTO promuove la mobilità dolce a Torino  partendo dall’esperienza quotidiana di chi attraversa la città ogni giorno, con l’obiettivo di contribuire concretamente alla sostenibilità ambientale urbana.

Attraverso strumenti digitali e un approccio di citizen science, raccoglie dati qualitativi e percezioni soggettive legate all’uso delle infrastrutture ciclabili e ciclopedonali, in particolare nei quartieri Aurora, Barriera di Milano e Vanchiglietta.

I dati raccolti serviranno a:

mappare punti di forza e criticità delle reti pedonali e ciclabili

sviluppare una web app interattiva

costruire una mappa partecipata della mobilità dolce a Torino

CicloTO mette al centro le voci dei cittadini, restituendo una fotografia reale e condivisa della mobilità urbana, utile per migliorare le politiche, le infrastrutture e le abitudini quotidiane.

22 Subsidiaries

POMA Egypt is a proud branch of POMA France, bringing our global leadership in cable transportation directly to the Egyptian market. We are committed to delivering the same level of innovation, quality, and sustainable solutions that POMA is renowned for worldwide.

We are dedicated to continuing POMA's legacy of excellence, adapting our expertise to meet Egypt's unique needs, and contributing to the development of modern, sustainable transport solutions across the nation.

Name: Citylink Shuttle (Kuwait)
Description:
"Citylink Shuttle" is Kuwait’s first premium and affordable transportation service catering to the quick transportation needs for customers. As a service launched by City Group Co. KSCP, this service is launched to create a better, sustainable and efficient mode of transportation which is demand responsive to the customer load factor in real-time.

It is quick, efficient, and an affordable way of travel to Kuwait’s major areas. This service runs as per customers flexibility. The core objective of “Citylink Shuttle” is to implement Demand Responsive Transport (“DRT”) service that provides optimised and safe transportation by matching transport demand with intelligent system based supply, thereby making it more efficient in busy urban areas. This technology of point-to-point transport puts Kuwait on the map of other western cities such as in Europe & US that have adopted the mobility and technology for smart cities, while improving the quality of life for residents and locals.

Demand Responsive Transport (“DRT”) is a form of transport methodology wherein the system allows the vehicles to alter their routes automatically, using advanced machine learning and AI technologies, based on travel demand in a particular area/time without using fixed routes or timetabled journeys. Citylink Shuttle buses typically pick-up and drop-off passengers at specific stops according to the passengers’ travel needs. The technology ensures that the pickup and drop-off locations are within walking distances from the passengers and also provide an estimated travel time. It aims to address several requirements by promoting optimized public transportation and supplements the public transportation in unaccessible areas.

“Citylink Shuttle” is a premium economy bus service, that provides with passengers with comfortable seating, safe drive and professional drivers.

MAINZIGARTIG MOBIL
Rund 900 Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter machen an jedem Werktag 180.000 Kundinnen und Kunden mobil. Ob Bus, Straßenbahn, Bike- oder Carsharing: Mit jährlich über 56 Millionen Fahrgästen sind wir der Mobilitätsdienstleister Nr. 1 für die Landeshauptstadt Mainz und ihre Menschen – und das bereits seit 1883.

IMMER IN BEWEGUNG
Wie Mainz selbst sind auch wir stets im Wandel: Was einst mit der Pferdebahn begann und später eine eigene Omnibuslinie hervorbrachte, mündet noch heute in dem Anspruch an einen leistungsfähigen, wirtschaftlichen Nahverkehr und damit an eine maximal mobile Stadt. Als kommunales Unternehmen und Tochter der Unternehmensgruppe Mainzer Stadtwerke AG arbeiten wir täglich am Ausbau unseres Straßenbahnnetzes, an alternativen Antriebstechnologien für unsere Busflotte sowie an umweltfreundlichen und intelligenten Mobilitätsangeboten – ob aus eigenem Antrieb oder in Kooperationen.

Name: trolley:motion
Description:
trolley:motion is the leading European trolleybus interest group. It constitutes part of a wide trolleybus community and has well established contacts to relevant ebus actors such as trolleybus cities, industrial manufacturers and transport operators. Due to the wide network of public and private ebus stakeholders and its self-sustaining and independent organizational framework as a non-profit interest group, the involvement of trolley:motion offers great potential for the successful knowledge transfer of project results and general output. trolley:motion will play a valuable role in terms of European and global dissemination, also beyond the actual lifetime of the project. Presently, trolley:motion is establishing an open-access trolleybus library and the European Trolleybus Knowledge Centre, which includes ebus information resources as well.
Through these and other activities, Trolley:motion will contribute to the communication and dissemination of the project results. This will include newsletters (more 5000 contacts worldwide) and messages on internet fora, reports in technical magazines, workshops and round table talks, media contacts and press releases, activities at international fairs, stimulation of decision-making processes and the provision of support to decision makers.
The industry members of trolley:motion (Carosserie HESS AG, Dialogika, Traktionssysteme Austria, TÜV Süd, Kummler+Matter AG, Kruch Railway Innovaitons, Furrer+ Frey AG, Pre power Developer, Rupprecht Consult) will participate in project events or workshops and contribute their industry know-how about clean vehicles, thus enabling detailed discussions and direct exchanges with project partners.

Deniz yolu tercih eden yolcular için Bursa – İstanbul arasında hizmet veren BUDO ile (Bursa Deniz Otobüsü) 2013 yılından itibaren kaliteden ödün vermeden hizmetimizi devam ettirmekteyiz. Bursa Terminal ile İstanbul Sabiha Gökçen ve İstanbul Havalimanı arasında şehirlerarası taşımacılık yapan BBBUS markamız ise 2017 yılından itibaren havalimanlarına transit olarak hizmet vermekte.
 
Şehir içinde BursaRay HRS, Terminal Tramvay hattı, İpekböceği Tramvay Hattı, Nostaljik Tramvay gibi raylı sistem ve tekerlekli taşımacılıkta Otobüs İşletmesi, Otobüs Terminalleri ile hizmetlerimizi geliştirerek sürdürmekteyiz. Bu hizmetlerimizin bakımı ve işletmesi ile ilgilenirken Bursa’mızın bilet sisteminde de bütünleşik bir düzen oluşturduk. Yolcularımızın ve şehir trafiğinin değişen ihtiyaçlarına yönelik imkanları arttırmak için ulaşım araçlarının iyileştirilmesi, ulaşımın her geçen gün daha emniyetli ve konforlu olması için kendimizi geliştiriyoruz. Otopark İşletmemiz’le Bursa’nın hemen her noktasında tecrübeli personelimizle günde ortalama 20 bin araca hizmet vermekteyiz. Bu hizmetlerin yanı sıra 2020 yılından itibaren işletmesini sürdürdüğümüz ve yenilenen Güzelyalı Yat Limanı’mızda tekne barınma ve bakım hizmeti sunmaktayız.

Name: San Joaquin Regional Transit District
Description: San Joaquin Regional Transit District (RTD) is the regional transit provider for San Joaquin County.  RTD’s mission is to provide a safe, reliable, and efficient transportation system for the region.  RTD provides 4.5 million trips annually.  RTD’s services include Commuter routes to the Bay Area and Sacramento, Stockton Metropolitan Area fixed routes including three Bus Rapid Transit routes, the Hopper deviated fixed-route, and Dial-A-Ride.  RTD has three transit stations in Stockton: the Downtown Transit Center (DTC); the Mall Transfer Station (MTS); the Hammer Transfer Station (HTS), and the Union Transfer Station (UTS).  RTD’s administrative offices are located at the DTC.  In 2019, RTD opened the Union Transfer Station, a centralized facility that serves south county residents to connect from east to west.

Name: Washington Metrorail Safety Commission (WMSC)
Description:
The Washington Metrorail Safety Commission (WMSC) is the designated State Safety Oversight Agency (SSOA) for the Washington Metropolitan Area Transit Authority (WMATA) Metrorail system. The WMSC is legally and financially independent of WMATA. The WMSC serves as the safety regulatory authority for the WMATA Metrorail system.

The WMSC’s rail transit experts implement the WMSC’s program and focus on verification of WMATA’s compliance with its mandated safety plans to ensure that WMATA provides safe operations and transportation service. The WMSC oversees the safety of WMATA Metrorail through functions including the triennial safety audit program, inspections, safety event investigations, emergency management activities, oversight of Metrorail safety certification, and oversight of Metrorail corrective active plans.

The WMSC’s State Safety Oversight (SSO) program was certified by the Federal Transit Administration on March 18, 2019.

Name: São Judas Tadeu Transportes
Description:
A história da São Judas começa em 1956, quando seu Zeca montou a Empresa de Transportes Rodoviários São Judas Tadeu, operando inicialmente na linha Cabo, Ponte dos Carvalhos, Pontezinha, até Prazeres, no município vizinho de Jaboatão dos Guararapes. Posteriormente a São Judas Tadeu passou a operar sua linha de ônibus até o Recife. Foi a primeira empresa a fazer tal percurso.

Em 1952 ele comprou seu primeiro ônibus e, em 1956, fundou a Auto viação São Judas Tadeu, com dois sócios, e começou a ser chamado também de "seu Zeca da São Judas", com uma frota de dois veículos que faziam apenas uma viagem por dia ao Recife.

Dona atualmente de uma frota de 126 ônibus, a São Judas Tadeu é uma das poucas empresas do sistema de transporte de ônibus da Região Metropolitana do Recife a manter um forte vínculo com a comunidade onde nasceu e continua a atuar. É conhecida como a empresa de transporte coletivo do Cabo de Santo Agostinho. 

Em 2011 a São Judas Tadeu foi incorporada pela Empresa Pedrosa, outro tradicional operador de transporte urbano em Pernambuco, o que contribuiu para o crescimento e renovação da frota, tornando-se uma empresa ainda mais sólida e comprometida com a mobilidade urbana das comunidades onde atua.

Description:
The mission of DART First State and the Delaware Transit Corporation, an operating division of the Delaware Department of Transportation, is to design and provide the highest quality public transportation services that satisfy the needs of the customer and the community.

Name: Viação Passaredo
Description:
Sobre a Viação Passaredo

Fundada em 1978 em São José dos Campos (SP), a Viação Passaredo é referência nacional no transporte rodoviário de passageiros, com forte atuação nos segmentos de fretamento contínuo e eventual. Com mais de quatro décadas de experiência, oferecemos soluções de mobilidade seguras, eficientes e personalizadas, conectando pessoas e empresas em diferentes regiões do Brasil.

Nosso crescimento acompanha o desenvolvimento regional. Iniciamos com foco no fretamento no Vale do Paraíba, expandimos para a capital paulista em 1986 e, posteriormente, para Ribeirão Preto (SP) em 1991, fortalecendo nossa presença no interior do estado.

Ao longo dos anos, mantivemos nosso compromisso com a inovação, investindo continuamente em tecnologia, segurança e qualidade no atendimento. Valorizamos a excelência operacional e a experiência do cliente, com uma frota moderna e equipe altamente capacitada.

Nossa identidade visual, marcada pelo verde bandeira, representa nosso orgulho em sermos uma empresa genuinamente brasileira, comprometida com o desenvolvimento sustentável e o progresso do país.

Na Viação Passaredo, acreditamos que mobilidade é mais do que transporte — é conexão, é eficiência e é futuro. Seguimos avançando para oferecer cada vez mais soluções inteligentes para um Brasil em movimento.

Name: TransEd LRT
Description:
Stage one of the Valley Line connects Mill Woods to downtown Edmonton with about 13.1 km of light rail transit (LRT). This stage includes 11 stops, an elevated station incorporating a transit centre and Park & Ride, and a transfer point to other LRT lines at Churchill Square.

The Valley Line Southeast is different from the high-floor LRT system on Edmonton's other lines. The Valley Line Southeast features new, low-floor, urban-styled trains that provide more pedestrian-friendly access with street level stops. In residential and commercial areas, embedded tracks are integrated with the established design and traffic flow of the area.

Pre-construction work began in March 2016 and stage one of the City of Edmonton’s Valley Line LRT became operational in November 2023.

Name: AtB AS
Description:
AtB er Trøndelags mobilitetsselskap og tilbyr et framtidsrettet og bærekraftig mobilitetstilbud for hele fylket. Med det følger et stort ansvar.

Vi skal gi mennesker muligheter til å skape sine liv og sin historie.

For seg, for sine og for samfunnet, uavhengig av alder, helse, økonomi og bosted. For kunden er det det som ligger i enden av reisen som er målet. Det er her, på arbeidsplassen, skolen, teateret eller i skiløypa at mulighetene og historiene skapes. AtB skal tilby bærekraftige mobilitetsløsninger som gjør dette mulig. 

Vi skal gjøre det enklere å klare seg uten egen bil – alltid for noen, oftere for mange 

AtBs viktigste oppgave er å legge til rette for smidige, sømløse reiser tilpasset ulike behov og reisemønster. Det betyr å hver dag sikre god drift og tilpasning av det etablerte kollektivtilbudet i Trøndelag, med buss, trikk, hurtigbåt, ferge og skoleskyss. 

Til syvende og sist handler det om å gi befolkningen et tilgjengelig og velfungerende kollektivtilbud som både bidrar til bedre miljø og bedre by- og distriktsutvikling i takt med endringene i samfunnet. Sammen skal vi bidra til å oppnå fylkeskommunens mål om mer klima- og miljøvennlige transportløsninger, vi skal binde Trøndelag sammen og stimulere til regional bo- og næringsutvikling. 

AtB er et aksjeselskap som i sin helhet eies av Trøndelag fylkeskommune.

Name: NÖVOG
Description:
Wir sind die NÖVOG. Wir sind der größte Mobilitätsanbieter für Alltag und Freizeit und die zentrale Mobilitätskompetenzstelle des Landes Niederösterreich. Mit unseren sechs Bahnen und zwei Seilbahnen, unseren regionalen Busangeboten und bedarfsgerechten Mobilitätskonzepten für Gemeinden stellen wir in ganz Niederösterreich ein dichtes öffentliches und touristisches Mobilitätsnetz für unsere Kundinnen und Kunden bereit. Als Tochtergesellschaft des Landes Niederösterreich sind wir ein starker und verlässlicher Partner in den Regionen. Wir sind überall dort, wo Niederösterreich am schönsten ist.

Mobilität neu denken ist nur gemeinsam möglich – als Team. Mit 450 Kolleginnen und Kollegen arbeiten wir täglich mit viel Herzblut an neuen Lösungen und den Angeboten von morgen. Um unsere Fahrgäste immer wieder aufs Neue begeistern zu können, wollen wir uns stetig weiterentwickeln und sind laufend auf der Suche nach begeisterten Mitarbeitenden, die die blau-gelbe Erfolgsgeschichte der NÖVOG zukünftig mitschreiben wollen. 

Das, was uns als NÖVOG Gruppe besonders und einzigartig macht, ist die Unternehmenskultur, die wir leben. Zutrauen und Vertrauen sowie Respekt und Wertschätzung sind unsere Grundwerte. Unsere Mitarbeitenden sind zentraler Erfolgsfaktor unserer Unternehmensgruppe. Durch die Vielfältigkeit unserer Bahnen, Seilbahnen, Regionalbuslinien und bedarfsgesteuerten Verkehre ergibt sich bei uns im Unternehmen eine Vielzahl von Positionen. Auch Quereinsteigende sind herzlich willkommen!

Gesuchte Qualifikationen
Neben positionsspezifischen fachlichen Anforderungen, legen wir besonderen Wert auf folgende persönliche Eigenschaften:
• Verantwortungsbewusstsein
• Engagement
• Vielseitigkeit
• Flexibilität
• Offenheit

Name: PowerShelter: E-Mobility Battery Charging Lockers
Description:
Let's make riding an e-bike the easy choice.

E-bike riders face an impossible choice: risk fires by charging indoors, or risk theft by leaving bikes and batteries outside. PowerShelter solves both problems with fire-safe charging lockers that protect batteries while they charge. Cities get safer streets, property owners reduce fire risks, and riders finally have the charging infrastructure they need to ditch their cars.

As fans of sustainable transportation, we believe that e-bikes are here to play a pivotal role in reducing carbon emissions and creating cleaner cities - all while helping people live happier & healthier lives.

From Amsterdam, the bike capital of the world

Name: Plymouth Citybus
Description:
Plymouth Citybus, part of the Go-Ahead Group runs the largest bus operation in Plymouth City and surrounding communities. 

Plymouth Citybus was formed in 1986 to take over the operations of Plymouth City Council Passenger Transport Department.  However, its origins can be traced right back to 1892 when its predecessors introduced horse trams to the Plymouth, Stonehouse and Devonport areas.

Today Plymouth Citybus is at the heart of the local community; it is a patron of Plymouth Chamber of Commerce and is represented in many local forums affecting life in the city.

The company operates a modern fleet, and provides the local service for Plymouth customers. We employ around 550 staff and carry over 18 million passengers a year.

We are part of the Go-Ahead Group Ltd, an international transport group and one of the UK’s leading public transport providers.

Name: VBK I AVG I KVV - wir bewegen alle

Unsere Zusammenarbeit begründet sich im "Karlsruher Modell". Dank diesem Konzept können wir eine gute Anbindung ins Karlsruher Umland schaffen und ersparen unseren Fahrgästen lästiges Umsteigen. Ermöglicht wird das durch die Nutzung von sogenannten Zwei-System-Fahrzeuge. Diese speziellen Fahrzeuge sind in der Lage sowohl unter den Fahrleitungen der Straßenbahn in der Stadt (750 Volt Gleichstromspannung), als auch unter den Fahrleitungen der Bahnstrecken außerhalb der Stadt (15 Kilovolt Wechselstrom) zu fahren. Anstatt dass unsere Fahrgäste die Bahn wechseln müssen, wechselt einfach die Bahn während der Fahrt ihr System.

Name: CapaBus
Description:
Quality association of 25 bus companies from Germany. The aim is the joint training of bus drivers in Europe.

Europe's drive for tomorrow - above all, well-trained and motivated drivers in public transport. Whether rail or road: it won't be possible without the man or woman in the front left for a long time. The lack of qualified and motivated drivers is the bottleneck that all future concepts have to overcome.

The availability of sufficient drivers has long been a key competitive factor.

Especially in medium-sized companies, the search for personnel is increasingly reaching economic limits, especially after Corona. In the worst case, there is a threat of exit from the market or displacement to less lucrative subcontractor positions.

Eliminating this risk is the task of medium-sized companies themselves, and no help is to be expected. With CapaBus we solve this task together. Recruitment, training and integration as a complete package. Cheaper and more successful than individual companies could. 

Companies with high personnel requirements can use CAPA to plan their personnel planning in the long term and safely.

Name: RushOwl India
Description:
RushOwl is transforming staff transportation in India. 

Long, stressful commutes cost businesses time and money! Traditional public transit can be frustrating and inflexible while traffic makes driving unpredictable. This leads to tardiness, inaccessibility, and higher turnover rates for corporations.

RushOwl targets these issues, offering a new era of urban mobility that fits India's specific needs. Our responsive shuttle service uses proprietary AI-powered software to optimise routes, avoid congestion and increase passenger capacity, resulting in happier commuters and more productive teams. 

RushOwl makes every part of a city accessible. Offices located out of the way from residential areas or public transport don’t have to worry anymore. We pool together workers in a given organisation to share rides that match their schedules, removing the stress of rigid transportation and the high costs for offices associated with parking, fuel reimbursements, and commuter fatigue. 

Now you can say goodbye to congestion, lengthy commutes, and lack of reliable transport. 

At RushOwl, we're forging a path for a safer, more sustainable mass transit solution across India. Will you join us?

AEROFUGIA is a technology company specializing in Advanced Air Mobility (AAM). As a subsidiary company of Geely Technology Group, AEROFUGIA focuses on future air mobility, which with vertical take-off and landing, green energy propulsion, and intelligent driving.

Adhering to the mission of "Creating reliable, sustainable and comfortable Advanced Air Mobility," AEROFUGIA has consistently driven innovation in eVTOL technologies encompassing R&D, manufacturing, operation, maintenance, and service since its establishment, and we are dedicated to delivering sustainability AAM solutions worldwide.

The AE200 series are all-electric, six-seat piloted eVTOL designed specifically for urban air mobility. Featuring a flexible cabin layout, it offers key advantages in safety, cost-efficiency, passenger comfort, and environmental friendliness. It is well-suited for a variety of low-altitude applications, including aerial tourism, urban commuting, and emergency response.

Name: Urban Transit Solutions Pty Ltd
Description:
Urban Transit Solutions is the Asia-Pacific leader in transport planning, urban integration, and transit scheduling. Since 2004, we’ve partnered with governments, operators, and private clients to deliver innovative, efficient, and customer-focused public transport solutions across all modes.
Our reputation is built on real-world expertise and a hands-on approach. With over 250 projects in eight countries, we combine global best practices with local insights to design services that are cost-effective, reliable, and seamlessly integrated.

Our core capabilities include:
••• Public transport network design & scheduling for optimal efficiency
••• Urban planning & integration to connect communities
••• Operations planning, contracting & bid support
••• Transport policy & strategic planning
••• Custom-built transport information systems for data-driven decisions

We are passionate about creating high-quality, sustainable transit solutions that enhance the passenger experience while improving operational performance. From bus and rail scheduling to multi-modal network optimisation, we work alongside clients at every stage of the project lifecycle to ensure smooth implementation and measurable results.
Navigating the future of public transport.
Connect with us to explore how we can transform your network.
