saarvv.de/impressum/

Job-Ticket
Mit dem JobTicket genießen fest angestellte Mitarbeiterinnen bzw. Mitarbeiter eines Unternehmens oder einer Behörde alle Vorteile einer Jahreskarte und sind in Job und Freizeit besonders günstig mobil. Dieses Abonnement ist ausschließlich über den Arbeitgeber zu beziehen. Die Mindestabnahmemenge beträgt 3 Job-Tickets.
Der saarVV gewährt den Arbeitgebern bis zu 30 % Rabatt auf das Job-Ticket! Wenn ein Arbeitgeber mindestens 25 % Zuschuss zahlt, gewähren die Verkehrsunternehmen einen Rabatt von 5 %. Name: Ferro-Cités
Description:
Le transport ferroviaire, c’est un peu le super-héros de la décarbonation. Trains, tramways, métros : ils avancent (sur des rails bien sûr), silencieusement, pour sauver la planète, tout en évitant les congestions autoroutières. Et ils ne le font pas à moitié. Les chiffres sont clairs : en 2023, le rail a transport. 108 milliards de passagers-kilomètres. C’est 6 % de plus qu’en 2022. Et chaque jour, 3 millions de Français montent à bord d’un train pour aller travailler, faire leurs courses ou simplement admirer le paysage. Qui dit mieux ?


Mais ce n’est pas tout ! Depuis 2018, le rail a un nouveau défi : l’ouverture à la concurrence des TER. Autrement dit, la SNCF n’est plus la seule à jouer sur les rails régionaux. L’idée ? Faire monter la pression pour offrir un service digne d’un cinq étoiles. Innovation, qualité, nouvelles offres… Tout cela pour que les usagers en aient pour leur argent (ou leur abonnement, au choix). Et parlons des SERM, ces fameux Services Express Régionaux Métropolitains. Dont le principe louable est de r.concilier les périphéries avec les centres-villes, en mode "rapide, efficace et sans embouteillage". A ce jour, 15 métropoles, dont Bordeaux, Lille, Lyon, Toulouse, et Strasbourg… sont prêtes. C’est là qu’intervient Ferro-Cités. Le journal sur tout ce qui roule sur rails. Des trains longue distance aux TER, des TET en passant par les tramways et métros qui prennent le relais en ville…

Ce nouveau périodique relatera tout sur le rail en France et ailleurs. Et comme ce ne sont pas les projets qui manquent, nous aurons de quoi vous informer, vous inspirer et, parfois, vous surprendre. Ferro-Cités, mettra en lumière les grandes transformations du rail, ses défis, ses ambitions, mais aussi ses héros du quotidien : ceux qui le conduisent, le r.inventent et lui donnent un avenir. Parce que oui, le rail bouge, et nous serons là. pour raconter son avenir…

If you do not want to share your scooter with anyone you can rent it for long term and control it simply via the Antees mobile app.

Battery
A ride can last up to 70 km, so go for a ride and enjoy everything Prague has to offer! And even if you run out of the fuel (electricity : ) ) simply jum to another scooter or charge it in the neares public charging station for free for 80 % in just 30min.

Safety
Wearing a helmet is key. Then all you have to do is to follow all safety rules during your ride.

Hygiene
What you can also find in the trunk are disposable hair nets, which you put on underneath the helmet for extra protection and cleanliness.

Want to know more? Read more at www.antees.cz

Name: Rabat Region Mobility
Description: Rabat Region Mobility (RRM), formerly Société du Tramway de Rabat-Salé (STRS), is a local development company responsible for the planning, coordination and delivery of mobility projects within the Rabat–Salé–Témara conurbation. RRM acts as project owner for major public transport infrastructure. In this capacity, it has delivered 27 km of tramway lines, from design through commissioning, and is currently leading the development of new Bus Rapid Transit (BHNS) networks, aimed at strengthening and expanding the public transport offer across the conurbation. Network operations are entrusted to specialised operators under delegation contracts. RRM ensures contract oversight, performance monitoring and overall system coherence, in close coordination with supervisory authorities, to guarantee service continuity and quality. In addition to transport infrastructure, RRM is also responsible for the management of underground car parks, the management of the vehicle impound facility, and other mobility- and parking-related facilities, contributing to an integrated and balanced approach to urban mobility and public space management. Committed to continuous modernisation, Rabat Region Mobility develops digital tools, passenger information systems and user support solutions designed to facilitate everyday travel and improve the clarity and accessibility of mobility services across the territory.

Name: HER WAY
Description:
Grâce à l’application HER WAY, les femmes qui le souhaitent pourront voyager plus sereinement et uniquement avec d’autres femmes.
Notre entreprise de covoiturage exclusivement féminin apporte une valeur ajoutée significative en créant une alternative sécurisée, pratique et abordable pour les femmes en quête de déplacements fiables. En proposant un service de covoiturage exclusivement réservé aux femmes, nous répondons aux préoccupations fréquemment exprimées quant à la sécurité des femmes lorsqu'elles utilisent les transports en commun ou les taxis. De plus, notre objectif est de développer une communauté solidaire de femmes encourageant le partage de trajets et la création de liens sociaux.

Par ailleurs, notre entreprise s'inscrit dans la demande croissante de services de covoiturage durables et économiques. En encourageant les femmes à partager leurs trajets, nous contribuons à réduire le nombre de véhicules sur la route, avec des impacts positifs sur l'environnement.

En outre, nous nous distinguons de la concurrence en mettant l'accent sur la qualité de nos services. Notre flotte est composée de véhicules propres, confortables et bien entretenus, garantissant une expérience de voyage agréable. Nous offrons des services personnalisés tels que le choix de la musique, des boissons gratuites et des espaces de rangement généreux pour les bagages, pour offrir une expérience exceptionnelle à nos précieuses passagères.

Name: Smart Metro World
Description:
Time is time.

The old phrase "time is money" no longer captures the true value of time. Nowadays, time spent doing what you like with those you love outweighs time lost commuting, regardless of comfort. Although activities like reading or listening to music on the subway can be enjoyable, they don't fully compensate for the time spent. Wouldn't you prefer to reach your destination faster and focus on what you really want to do?

We offer advanced services and consulting across key industrial sectors, employing cutting-edge, transformative methods and technologies never applied before. Our experienced professionals and strategic partners provide industry-leading solutions designed to address both current and future industry requirements with high precision and impressive results, whether dealing with system retrofitting or building from scratch.

Smart metro saves up to 50% time, money and resources for cities. Efficient time savings through advanced technology not only streamlines commutes but also elevates the overall quality of life for millions. By reducing travel time, commuters experience enhanced daily productivity and well-being, leading to a more balanced and fulfilling life.

Description:
MACRO-SYSTEM is a Polish private company operating on the domestic and international IT markets since 1984. It specializes in designing, manufacturing, implementing and maintaining dedicated IT systems in respect of both hardware and dedicated software.

They are a result of the company’s own research and development activities as well as more than 30 years of experience in the execution of projects addressing the needs of various clients expecting products at the highest world class level. The company quickly responds to changing technological conditions, which is enabled by, among others, employing qualified specialists having multifaceted competences in the fields of: mechanics, electronics, low and high level software, client-server applications, web applications, telecommunications, maintenance and operator services, modern design and ergonomics, project management.

Detém uma frota patrimonial de 510 veículos e garagem com estrutura completa, para atender as especificações determinadas pelos órgãos gestores, sendo Prefeitura de São Paulo e SPTrans. Name: OC Transpo
Description:
OC Transpo moves people in Canada’s national capital, and we are proud to be your choice to get there.  With a population of over one million residents and covering an area of more than 2,790 square kilometres, Ottawa is one of the largest cities in Canada. We provide transit services throughout Ottawa as well as service to parts of Gatineau, Québec. 
 
While public transit has operated in Ottawa for over 150 years, OC Transpo was established in 1973. Today, OC Transpo is made up of 3,000 employees who support over 90 million customer trips per year. OC Transpo’s fleet is made up of 855 fully accessible conventional buses, 80 minibuses providing door-to-door service and Alstom’s Citadis Spirit and Coradia Lint trains. For the future, OC Transpo is focused on reducing its carbon with a goal of a 100% zero-emission bus fleet by 2036.  
 
We continue to grow, with construction underway to further expand our light rail system, and extensions opening in the coming years that will transform our city.

Name: Grupo Panama Car Rental
Description:
PANAMA CAR RENTAL S.A Started operations in may of 2002, under the leadership of brothers Jorge Juan and Ricardo de la Guardia.  Back then the company had 14 employees, a fleet of 120 units and 25 vehicles for sale.

Today PANAMA CAR RENTAL S.A. has a workforce of over 170 employees and a fleet that surpasses 2,000-unit mark.

What started, as a small family venture, has become one of the leading businesses in the car rental industry with 11 branches across the republic of Panama thanks to their visionaries and founders Jorge de la Guardia and Maruja de la Guardia.

PANAMA CAR RENTAL, S.A. is currently a corporate group comprised by:

DOLLAR RENT A CAR:  An international franchise dedicated to car rental services

AUTOMARKET: Company dedicated to buying and selling used vehicles as well as consignments.

Name: Keolis Besançon Mobilités
Description: Keolis Besançon Mobilités est une filiale du groupe Keolis, leader du transport public de voyageurs en France, qui exploite le réseau bus et tramway Ginko pour le compte de son Autorité Organisatrice en assurant quotidiennement sa mission de service public et en garantissant la sécurité, la fiabilité, la ponctualité, le confort et l’information voyageurs. L’entreprise compte 480 salariés répartis sur 2 sites.

Name: Verkehrsgesellschaft Frankfurt am Main (VGF)
Description:
Wir, die Verkehrsgesellschaft Frankfurt am Main, kurz VGF, sind das Frankfurter Verkehrsunternehmen und der Verkehrsdienstleister der Stadt. Tagtäglich sorgen wir gemeinsam mit unseren mehr als 2850 Mitarbeitenden dafür, dass Frankfurt in Bewegung bleibt, und arbeiten an der mobilen Zukunft unserer Stadt. 

Als Arbeitgeberin kümmern wir uns mit dir um deine Zukunft. Dabei stehen wir als Unternehmen für Offenheit, Toleranz und Gleichberechtigung und unterstützen dich mit vielfältigen Benefits. 

Werde ein Teil von uns – mit einem Job, der zu dir passt.

Weitere Infos zu deinem Einstieg bei uns findest du unter https://www.vgf-ffm.de/de/karriere

Name: Dresdner Verkehrsbetriebe AG
Description:
Wir bewegen Dresden - mit Straßenbahnen, Bussen, Bergbahnen und Fähren. Werktags sind über eine halbe Million Fahrgäste mit uns unterwegs. Als Mobilitätsdienstleister bieten wir Bürgern und Gästen der Landeshauptstadt Dresden einen schnellen, sicheren und pünktlichen ÖPNV. Mit unserer Verkehrsleistung tragen wir dazu bei, die Straßen vom Autoverkehr zu entlasten, das Klima zu schonen und Dresden lebenswert zu erhalten. Unsere Kunden schätzen das dichte Netz, kurze Taktzeiten, die modernen Fahrzeuge, barrierefreien Haltestellen und umfassenden Informationen. Die Mobilitätswende gestalten wir auch mit zusätzlichen Angeboten wie Bike- und CarSharing.


Unsere Datenschutzhinweise: dvb.de/datenschutz-som

Stay engaged, stay informed, and join us in setting the safety gold standard for the land transport industry.

Name: Transvolt Mobility
Description:
Transvolt Mobility Private Limited or Transvolt has been carefully planned and established to be a leading pan-India shared electric mobility player with a focus on assisting the state and the community in its endeavour to achieve the “ZERO EMMISSION” transportation sector.

In Transvolt, Safety and Sustainability come first alongside a determined outlook for business growth and value creation for the stakeholders. 

The strong push for electrification in the Mass Transportation Segment by Govt. of India and all the States in India, encourages us bring-in best-in-class policies, technologies, and finance to ensure the development of a sustainable business dedicated to reaching out to the nook and corners of the country.

Name: Spokane Transit
Description:
Spokane Transit is a great place to work. Delivering high-quality public transit requires a broad spectrum of skills and talents. From driving and servicing vehicles to route planning; budgeting to purchasing; customer service to computer programming, career opportunities abound at Spokane Transit.

Spokane Transit provides public transportation for the areas of Spokane, Spokane Valley, Airway Heights, Cheney, Medical Lake, Millwood, Liberty Lake, and unincorporated areas of Spokane County, WA. Bus service, Paratransit, and Rideshare are the three modes of transportation we provide.

Spokane Transit is an Equal Opportunity Employer.  All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment and will not be discriminated against on the basis of disability, ethnicity/race, national origin, religion, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation or veteran status. 

Social media policy can be found here: https://spokanetransit.com/social

Description:
Metro Tasmania Pty Ltd is a state-owned company established in February 1998, with our history as the MTT dating back to 1954.

We operate bus services in Hobart, Launceston and Burnie and are the largest passenger transport company in Tasmania.

Name: Metro de Sevilla s.c.j.a.-s.a.
Description:
Metro de Sevilla, sociedad concesionaria de la Junta de Andalucía S.A. se creó en 2003 para la redacción del proyecto, ejecución de obras y explotación comercial de la Línea 1 interurbana del Metro de Sevilla.
Globalvia, líder mundial en la gestión de infraestructuras de transporte, especializada en autopistas y ferrocarriles en numerosos países en Europa y América, es la principal accionista de Metro de Sevilla con un 88,23% de participación. La Junta de Andalucía es el segundo accionista de la Concesionaria con 11,77% siendo además, la Administración Concedente del Contrato de Concesión. 
La concesión de la línea 1 de Metro de Sevilla se incorpora a la cartera de Globalvia en 2014 apostando por una estrategia sostenible basada en la inversión responsable, la gestión de calidad, la protección al medio ambiente, la eficiencia energética, la seguridad y salud en el trabajo, el cumplimiento normativo y el compromiso con la sociedad. La compañía, constituida en 2007, gestiona 27 proyectos en siete países: España, EEUU, Irlanda, Portugal, Costa Rica y Chile. Un equipo de 2.000 profesionales comprometidos para mejorar la calidad de vida y el desarrollo de la sociedad respetando los más altos estándares y guiándose por sus valores: Compromiso, Excelencia, Soluciones y Pasión.

Name: Central Florida Regional Transportation Authority (LYNX)
Description:
Central Florida Regional Transportation Authority (LYNX) provides public transportation services for Orange, Seminole and Osceola counties. Daily fixed-route bus service provides more than 60,000 passenger trips each weekday spanning an area of approximately 2,500 square miles with a resident population of more than 2.3 million. Small portions of Lake and Polk counties are served as well.
 
Other LYNX services include LYMMO, a free downtown Orlando circulator; a commuter assistance Vanpool program; ACCESS LYNX paratransit Service; and NeighborLink twelve flex service routes.

Name: Buses Vule S.A.
Description: Buses Vule es reconocida como un eje central del sistema de transporte de Santiago, Red, aportando con una operación de 1.440 buses a través de los servicios E-H-I-300, que en su conjunto realizan  más de 20 millones de viajes cada mes, por 28 comunas de la Región Metropolitana. Tenemos más de 4.000 trabajadores comprometidos a entregar un servicio seguro, moderno y de calidad a nuestros usuarios.

Name: Zity by Mobilize
Description:
We are a carsharing company belonging to Mobilize, the Renault Group brand dedicated to new mobility. Actually we have presence in Madrid, Lyon and Milano with more than 730K registered users. Since our founding in 2017 we have worked tirelessly to transform mobility in cities, offering clean, efficient and accessible transport solutions.

As one of the first electric carsharing companies in Europe, we have stood out for providing a unique, zero-emission mobility experience. With a fleet of 1,875 100% electric vehicles, we have managed to significantly reduce the carbon footprint in the cities where we operate, reaching +15 million tonnes avoided to the atmosphere. 

Our intuitive and easy-to-use mobile app allows users to rent a vehicle quickly and easily. Join us and be part of the change towards a cleaner and more sustainable mobility!

As pioneers in mobility, much of our work is to challenge conventional wisdom and our team has a particular pedigree in developing new innovations.

Name: RedeMob Consórcio
Description:
O RedeMob Consórcio é uma entidade privada, técnica e operacional, referência no Brasil, atuante no serviço de transporte público coletivo na região metropolitana de Goiânia, que faz a operação de 23 terminais de ônibus, 47 estações, 8 pontos de apoio; gere um dos sistemas de bilhetagem eletrônica mais novos do Brasil (Sitpass); gere mais de 7 mil pontos de ônibus; faz o controle das viagens e horários, por meio da primeira Central de Controle Operacional de ônibus implantada no Brasil; presta informações aos usuários do serviço de transporte coletivo, usando de tecnologias avançadas, sendo o primeiro a implantar informação em tempo real no serviço de transporte coletivo no Brasil; Possui o programa 8S; Comissão de Ética e Disciplina; Compliance e o Programa Valor em Servir como forma de promover engajamento aos mais de 950 profissionais diretos. A governança é formada pelo Conselho de Administração, Auditoria Independente, Conselho Fiscal, Diretoria Executiva e Diretoria de Transportes, regado a inúmeros contr

Histórico:
Trata-se do primeiro consórcio operacional privado no segmento de transporte coletivo em operação no Brasil. O RedeMob Consórcio foi pensado e implantado, desde de 2009, tendo como base a NBR IS0 9001 e possui o sistema de gestão da qualidade certificado há mais de uma década. O RedeMob Consórcio é formado por todas as concessionárias atuantes na Rede Metropolitana de Transporte Coletivo.

Missão:
Desenvolver soluções e serviços, que promovam o transporte público de qualidade, para satisfação dos clientes e perenidade do negócio.

Visão:
Tornar o transporte público + valorizado pela população como solução para a mobilidade na região metropolitana de Goiânia.

Valores:
RESPEITO
Cuidado com as pessoas em nosso caminho

RESILIÊNCIA 
Transformação de problemas em soluções

INTEGRIDADE
Decisões justas e transparentes norteiam nossas ações

COMPETITIVIDADE
Qualidade e produtividade focadas no mercado.

COMPROMETIMENTO
Satisfação em conquistar resultados

Description:
(in) former, sensibiliser, accompagner, animer et innover, telles sont les missions de l'Agence Écomobilité, pour mettre en mouvement les changements de comportements en termes de mobilité.
Depuis 2001, l’Agence Écomobilité met en œuvre, expérimente, accompagne et sensibilise aux problématiques de mobilité durable à l’échelle des 2 Savoie. En 2019, elle devient une Société Publique Locale, pour travailler encore plus étroitement avec ces collectivités actionnaires.
Au fil des années, nous avons acquis une forte expérience en matière de conseil en mobilité. Par le biais de diagnostics, de formations, d’animations, d’outils pédagogiques… nous accompagnons les territoires et structures sur les enjeux de la mobilité en tenant compte du contexte local. En créant un climat de médiation favorisant la mobilisation et l’implication de tous, nous mettons en place un éventail de mesures propices au changement de comportement.

#AgenceEcomobilite

Want a station at your location, advertise on our bikes, or offer your team a modern mobility solution? Contact us to explore the possibilities!

Name: Go North West
Description: Hello from your friendly team at Go North West! We run buses all across Greater Manchester. Part of The Go-Ahead Group.

Name: guppy.es
Description:
guppy es un proyecto cuyo objetivo es fomentar e impulsar una movilidad sostenible integral: eficiente, inteligente, completa y versátil.

Nos inspira la creación de una comunidad con una filosofía común: la ola guppy. Forman parte de la ola guppy empresas e instituciones colaboradoras, equipo de soporte y mantenimiento, y todas aquellas personas y entidades que se incorporen al movimiento para implantar guppy en nuevas áreas geográficas. 

Somos un proyecto en expansión y te invitamos a formar parte de él. Súbete a la ola guppy!

Nuestro proyecto de carsharing es pionero en Asturias y Cantabria, y estamos trabajando en ampliar nuestra presencia en Galicia, León, País Vasco, Madrid… y todas aquellas ciudades que se quieran incorporar al innovador modelo de movilidad sostenible y ecológico que ya se está imponiendo en toda Europa.

¿En qué consiste exactamente el servicio de guppy.es? Se trata de una flota de vehículos 100% eléctricos para su alquiler, con un sistema de tarificación muy característico ajustado al kilometraje, es decir, por km recorridos y no por tiempo, como en otros casos, lo que resulta especialmente interesante en las ciudades. El servicio se completa con plazas de aparcamiento en exclusiva monitorizadas en tiempo real, gestión integral a través de una app móvil, tarifas para empresas, bonos ahorro, sistema de pago compartido y mucho más.
Location: Gijón, Oviedo y Avilés, Asturias, Principado de

Name: JUDU (SĮ Susisiekimo paslaugos)
Description:
JUDU – tai judumo paslaugų Vilniuje prekės ženklas, gimęs po Vilniaus miesto savivaldybės įmonės „Susisiekimo paslaugos“ vardu. JUDU siekia, kad kiekvienam vilniečiui ar sostinės svečiui judėti po miestą būtų paprasta – kad ir kokį keliavimo būdą jis pasirinktų: pėsčiomis, dviračiu, viešuoju transportu, automobiliu. Įmonėje dirbantys žmonės – „Judumo ambasadoriai“, ne tik prisidedantys prie Darnaus judumo mieste įgyvendinimo, sklandesnio keliavimo, bet ir patys puoselėjantys JUD‘umo filosofiją. 

---

Municipal Enterprise (ME) "Susisiekimo paslaugos" is an enterprise that organizes transportation in Vilnius, and belongs to the Vilnius City Municipality. The company organizes the work of the public transport and ticket distribution system, administers the local toll and parking lots, maintains and operates a centralized traffic management system, and ensures the development of bicycles. All services of the company are used daily by hundreds of thousands of guests and residents of Vilnius, traveling by car, bicycle or public transport.

Name: Gran Américas Usme
Description: Gran Américas Usme nació en enero de 2020, como una alternativa para la prestación del servicio público de transporte de pasajeros para la unidad funcional 14 – Usme III. No solo enfocados en la prestación de este servicio sino que también a través de actividades de gestión y responsabilidad social.

Name: Charlotte Area Transit System
Description: Charlotte Area Transit System

Name: Brighton & Hove Buses and Metrobus
Description:
Brighton & Hove Buses, Metrobus , Spirit of Sussex Coaches and Eastbourne Sightseeing are all part of Brighton & Hove Bus And Coach Company Limited, part of Go-Ahead Group Ltd, an international transport group and one of the UK's leading public transport providers. We place great importance on partnership, adopting a collaborative approach with local governments, local communities and strategic partners, and we are committed to providing our communities with affordable and sustainable travel.

We operate local bus services across Brighton and Hove, Kent, Surrey and Sussex. We also operate a fleet of coaches for private hire, corporate hire and wedding hire.

Name: Ecovelo, le vélo en libre service
Description:
Ecovelo est opérateur de mobilité en libre-service.

Notre objectif, rendre le transport public à vélo aussi accessible que possible avec des tarifs équivalents à ceux des transports en communs traditionnels et une expérience utilisateur fluide et interopérable. 

Pour l'atteindre, nous délivrons des solutions clé-en-main de vélos à assistance électrique en libre-service (VAELS) pour les territoires et les Autorités Organisatrices de la Mobilité, du cadrage du projet à la mise en service et gestion de l'exploitation.

Nos forces, notre technologie embarquée permettant de délivrer un service fiable et vraiment inclusif, un équipement français à la robustesse inégalée spécialement conçu pour le libre-service et minimisant le génie civil, une méthodologie éprouvée sur plus de 30 territoires dans toute la France que nous continuons à accompagner quotidiennement.

Implanter un service Ecovelo, c'est aussi asseoir sa volonté de développer un service qui contribue au maillage économique local au delà du service rendu à l'usager, en privilégiant les acteurs locaux spécialistes du vélo tels que les chantiers d'insertion et les vélocistes pour la maintenance.

Pour en savoir plus, n'hésitez pas à vous rendre sur notre site internet ou nous contacter via https://ecovelo.com/nous-contacter/

Name: Kolumbus AS
Description:
By facilitating green mobility, Kolumbus will make Rogaland a better place to live. We will inspire people to cycle, walk and travel by public transport whenever they can, and use their car only when they have to. Choosing Kolumbus should be easy and give your environmental consciousness a great boost. 

To achieve that, we have to take responsibility for the whole journey, from door to door. Bus, boat, local train and city bike are our core services. But we will also ensure seamless integration with cycling and walking, and we will facilitate good transitions between our offer and other green mobility offers. 

Consideration of the customers is paramount for how we develop our services. We must understand the customers' wishes, needs, barriers and travel patterns, and we will use this insight to develop an offer that makes it easy to leave the car behind. Our foundation is the consideration of the environment, sustainability and social responsibility. 

This is how Kolumbus is making a sustainable contribution to the zero-growth goal. 

During the work week, approximately 110,000 daily journeys are made with Kolumbus. 

The actual transport by bus and boat is carried out by operating companies under contract for Kolumbus. We have approximately 450 buses, 10 speedboats and 3 ferries at our disposal.

Name: Luxtram S.A.
Description:
Luxtram est une société anonyme à capitaux publics qui assure la conception, la réalisation et l’exploitation du tramway sur le territoire de la Ville de Luxembourg et de ses communes avoisinantes. Elle est également responsable de la gestion et de la maintenance de l'infrastructure et des rames de tramway. Elle est chargée de l'étude, des adjudications de marchés, des travaux de construction et de l'acquisition du matériel roulant. 

Acteur clé d’une nouvelle mobilité, Luxtram emploie aujourd’hui 200 salariés et transporte plus de 115.000 voyageurs par jour.

Name: BENTELER Mobility
Description:
BENTELER Mobility's all-in-one Transportation-as-a-Service platform delivers all required services to implement and operate autonomous mobility - from vehicle acquisition, asset financing, maintenance and repair, fleet operation, and many more.
Acting as the orchestrator of the entire ecosystem, BENTELER Mobility integrates partner services and serves as the single point of contact for customers, ensuring seamless coordination and efficient service delivery.

Name: Albayrak Pakistan
Description:
Currently serving in waste management, transportation and construction sectors under different developmental projects of Pakistan, Albayrak Group started its journey back in 1952 from Turkey with construction works.
Albayrak Group of Companies is now serving in various main sectors around the world including construction, industry, logistics, media, services, energy and tourism with 20 companies.
With professionalism as its hallmark, Albayrak aims to merge international standards with local values, thus bringing inclusive solutions to the diverse world by strengthening communities and enabling individual dreams.

Name: MuvMi
Description: Mobilize cities with more affordable, cleaner, and safer solution.  Our solution is an on-demand microtransit that is half the price of other ride-hailing through sharing.  We use electric vehicles designed specifically for sharing (design-patented), as well as dynamic-route sharing that helps reducing operating cost by 30%.  We have served 4,000,000+ passengers with 350+ EVs and this is just the beginning.  We are shaping the future of mobility, so join us to scale the impact!

Name: Semove
Description:
A Semove – Federação das Empresas de Mobilidade do Estado do Rio de Janeiro – visa ao aprimoramento do sistema de transporte público por ônibus e à prestação de serviços aos operadores do setor – 10 sindicatos de empresas de ônibus e mais de 180 empresas a eles filiadas. 
Facilitar o acesso dos passageiros ao seu transporte, aumentar o nível de informações sobre as opções de viagens e trazer inovações que melhorem sua experiência de mobilidade são alguns de nossos objetivos. 
Tudo isso feito de forma aberta, otimista, inovadora e transparente.

Name: Transportes CentrOriente
Description:
Servicio de transporte corporativo de pasajeros en taxis ejecutivos (radiotaxis), van, minibuses y buses además de mensajería y carga menor.

En Transportes CentrOriente, además de transportar de forma segura y a tiempo a los pasajeros de tu empresa, te ayudaremos a usar de forma eficiente los móviles: mejorando las tasas de ocupación y realizando rutas óptimas de desplazamiento, gracias a un potente software que hemos desarrollado, lo que te permitirá ahorrar tiempo y dinero para tu empresa. 

En Transportes CentrOriente somos... la evolución del transporte!

Name: Broward County Transit (BCT)
Description:
“Connecting people to life”
Welcome to the official LinkedIn page of Broward County Transit (BCT). BCT provides fixed route bus, express, community shuttles and paratransit – door-to-door – services in Broward County. 

Our mission is to provide safe and reliable transportation solutions that link people, connect communities, support employment, and contribute to the overall economic growth of our region.

Our fixed route service is the easiest and most affordable and economical way to travel throughout Broward County and our express bus service provides free commuter park and ride locations and travels along the major interstate highways to Miami on weekdays during morning and afternoon peak travel hours. 

We provide links to Miami-Dade and Palm Beach counties transit systems, and to Tri-Rail (commuter rail service). Fixed routes provide connections to our community’s multimodal transportation network, as well as system-wide connections at four transfer terminals: Broward Central Terminal (downtown Fort Lauderdale), West Regional Terminal (Plantation), Lauderhill Transit Center (Lauderhill) and Northeast Transit Center (Pompano Beach).

We started a new green era with our Electric Buses!  

For career information and to see what positions are available, visit https://bit.ly/BCTjobs

Sign up for Transit Flash, our eNewsletter, to receive service updates and rider news. 

Follow us!
Instagram: @browardtransit
Facebook: @BrowardCountyTransit 
YouTube: @BrowardCountyTransit
Twitter: @BrowardTransit

Name: Xplor
Description: At Xplor, our mission spans across the globe, aiming to make transportation intelligent, efficient, accessible, and sustainable for everyone. Our vision is centered on enhancing public transportation accessibility, promoting widespread usage, and mitigating urban congestion while minimizing the carbon footprint. To realize this vision, we are creating a revolutionary Multi-Modal Mobility as a Service (MAAS) platform. This platform unifies various public transportation modes and their service providers, thereby establishing the world's largest transit data repository. Through our integrated solution, we strive to optimize public transportation, attract a broader audience, and actively contribute to the decongestion of cities. Xplor takes pride in being the pioneer, offering the first fully-fledged iMAAS platform dedicated to uniting diverse modes of public transportation services.

Name: Transports publics VMCV SA
Description:
Nous sommes les Transports publics VMCV (Vevey - Montreux - Chillon - Villeneuve), principal acteur de la mobilité urbaine dans la Riviera vaudoise. Notre réseau comprend 1 ligne de trolleybus et 14 lignes de bus (10 lignes urbaines et 4 lignes régionales) qui s'étendent sur plus de 155 km au total.

Nos clients sont au cœur de nos préoccupations et constituent notre raison d’être. À l’écoute de leurs besoins, nous nous efforçons de proposer une offre attractive et complémentaire au trafic motorisé individuel grâce à des infrastructures modernes et des moyens performants.

Nous employons plus de 250 collaboratrices et collaborateurs, représentant environ 40 métiers différents. Notre personnel est notre principal atout.

Entreprise formatrice, nous donnons également l’opportunité d’acquérir de nouvelles compétences. Chaque année, nous proposons cinq places d’apprentissage, permettant aux jeunes de la région de se former dans un cadre dynamique et adapté.

En tant qu’employeur, nous mettons à disposition de nombreux avantages pour notre personnel au quotidien.

Vous avez le sens du service et aimez le contact avec la clientèle ainsi que les partenaires ?

Ensemble, construisons une qualité de service toujours en évolution.

Name: Fleeta
Description:
Inspiré par le terme « fleet » (flotte), Fleeta symbolise la gestion fluide et efficace des solutions de déplacement. 

Fleeta incarne l’ère de la mobilité vélo, avec plus de produits, plus de services, pensée pour répondre aux besoins des entreprises, des collectivités, des usagers et des opérateurs touristiques.

Name: Metro Warszawskie Sp. z o.o.
Description: Metro Warszawskie Sp. z o.o. jest dynamicznie rozwijającym się przedsiębiorstwem, dysponującym wieloletnim doświadczeniem w zakresie przewozów pasażerskich, zarządzania, organizacji i realizacji budowy. Metro Warszawskie Sp. z o.o., jako podmiot prawa handlowego, którego właścicielem jest Miasto Stołeczne Warszawa, świadczy usługi przewozów pasażerskich koleją podziemną w Warszawie. Jednocześnie, jako inwestor zastępczy na zlecenie m.st. Warszawy przygotowuje i nadzoruje całość procesu inwestycyjnego przy rozbudowie stołecznego metra – największej inwestycji komunikacyjnej w stolicy i jedynej w Polsce. Swoim pracownikom oferuje ciekawą i pełną wyzwań pracę w nowocześnie zarządzanej firmie.

Name: Foothill Transit
Description:
Foothill Transit provides community-oriented, environmentally friendly bus service throughout southern California's San Gabriel and Pomona Valleys, including express bus routes to Pasadena and Downtown Los Angeles. Thanks for joining us!

Our mission is to be the premier public transit provider committed to safety, courtesy, quality, responsiveness, efficiency, and innovation.

Name: Línea 1 del Metro de Lima
Description:
Línea 1 es el primer servicio de transporte masivo de pasajeros que recorre, en su tramo 1, por estaciones de: Villa el Salvador, Villa María del Triunfo, San Juan de Miraflores, Santiago de Surco, San Borja, La Victoria, El Cercado de Lima, El Augstino y San Juan de Lurigancho.

Damos vida a la infraestructura que conecta y da bienestar a tu vida, creando juntos nuevas oportunidades, desarrollo sostenible y cultura ciudadana.

Name: NStCM - TPN
Description:
NStCM & TPN – Le lien vivant entre la montagne, le lac et la région
Depuis 1916, le Chemin de fer Nyon – St-Cergue – La Cure (NStCM) relie les rives du Léman aux hauteurs du Jura vaudois sur une ligne emblématique de 27 km.
 Le train, symbole de toute une région, circule aujourd’hui avec une cadence au quart d’heure entre Nyon et Genolier, des rames modernes, et une connexion directe avec les CFF. Il accompagne chaque jour écoliers, étudiants, pendulaires et visiteurs — notamment lors du Paléo Festival — et donne accès à une foule d’activités de loisirs en pleine nature.

Les Transports publics de la région nyonnaise (TPN) complètent ce maillage avec un réseau de 10 lignes (urbaines et régionales), desservant Nyon et Prangins ainsi que les communes du district.
 Ils permettent de rejoindre facilement la gare, l’école, le travail, les musées ou les rives du lac en toute sérénité. 

 Deux lignes transfrontalières renforcent les connexions avec les zones voisines françaises, favorisant une mobilité fluide en reliant Divonne-les-Bains et Gex.

 Ensemble, TPN & NStCM transportent plus de 6 millions de voyageurs par an, jouant un rôle-clé dans la vie quotidienne et le développement économique et durable de la région.

 Notre mission
Offrir une mobilité fluide, durable et accessible à toutes et tous, au service de la qualité de vie locale, du vivre-ensemble et de l’attractivité du territoire.

 Suivez-nous pour découvrir nos projets, notre quotidien en coulisses et nos opportunités de carrière.

Name: Aarhus Letbane I/S
Description:
Aarhus Light Rail became Denmark’s first light rail system in 2017. Then as now, our goal remains the same: to transport passengers easily and comfortably from A to B.

With the light rail, we bring city and countryside closer together in East Jutland. Reliable and efficient, it helps connect people with nature, culture, work, and education — whenever we travel out and return home again.

And this is not just an empty claim. Today, the light rail is a natural part of everyday life for many. Every day, more than 20,000 passengers’ step onto platforms across East Jutland to travel with us.

It’s about reducing traffic congestion and minimising the global footprint we leave behind. Driven by electricity. Driven by collective solutions. Driven by the belief in a more sustainable future and, above all: driven by the needs of East Jutlanders for experiences and opportunities — and for a world that is better connected every single day.

Name: Cykleo
Description:
Créée en 2007 au sein du Groupe Keolis, Cykleo est née d’une conviction : le vélo doit être une solution de mobilité à part entière 

Depuis près de 20 ans, nous accompagnons donc les collectivités et les entreprises dans le développement de leurs services vélo, en imaginant, déployant et opérant des solutions fiables, robustes et durables pour tous les usagers.

Vélo en libre-service, location longue durée, stationnement et animation, nous proposons l'ensemble des services vélo afin d’assurer une qualité de service homogène sur tout le territoire et de proposer des solutions sur-mesure, adaptées aux besoins de chaque projet.

Name: Berthelet
Description:
Berthelet, un esprit d’entreprise pour relever les défis de demain !

L’entreprise BERTHELET, acteur de mobilité et de services au quotidien depuis 75 ans, est la 6ème entreprise de transport de voyageurs au niveau national. L’entreprise assure son développement et son indépendance à travers l’innovation et l’excellence en s’appuyant sur de fortes valeurs humaines.

Chaque jour à travers l’ensemble de activités, BERTHELET transporte près de 30 000 personnes, soit l’équivalent à l’année de la population de la région Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes. BERTHELET est également fortement engagée dans la transition énergétique et offre de nombreuses solutions de transports innovantes : bus électriques, au GAZ bioGNV ou encore des navettes autonomes.

Membre fondateur du réseau de transport de voyageur RÉUNIR, elle est aussi membre du pôle de compétitivité CARA et actionnaire du laboratoire de la mobilité urbaine durable et des équipements de la route TRANSPOLIS.

Name: Ferrocarrils Generalitat Valenciana
Description:
Ferrocarrils de la Generalitat Valenciana (FGV) gestiona los servicios de transporte de Metrovalencia y el TRAM de Alicante.
* Metrovalencia engloba la red de metro y tranvía que da cobertura a la ciudad de Valencia,  a su área metropolitana y  zonas de influencia. Cuenta con 133 estaciones distribuidas a lo largo de 146 kilómetros.
* TRAM Metropolitano de Alicante cuya red  da servicio a la ciudad de Alicante, su área metropolitana y el eje de la Costa Blanca hasta Denia cinco líneas en servicio, con sus 71 estaciones distribuidas a lo largo de los 13 municipios por lo que circula TRAM de Alicante.

Name: Ontario Public Transit Association
Description: Trade Association representing the public transit industry in Ontario

Name: Bleeper
Description:
Bleeper is Ireland’s first station-less bike sharing scheme and currently has over 750 bikes operating throughout Dublin.

Our bikes are equipped with a smart lock fixed above the back wheel of the bike. This smart lock controls usage of the bike by communicating with our custom built app, which can be downloaded from both the Apple and Google App Stores. 

As the smart lock is permanently on the bike the bikes can be unlocked, used and then parked anywhere that traditional parking is permitted.

Bleeper bikes do not require custom-built docking bays.

For more information please check out our website! 

#Bleeper

Name: Weeve
Description:
At Weeve, we’re reshaping the way people and businesses experience mobility.

We aspire to become the leader in smart mobility by setting the standard for simple access to cars — powered by technology, elegant service, and meaningful environmental and social impact.
Our vision is of a world where owning a car is no longer necessary to fully enjoy it — a world where driving becomes a simple, shared, and sustainable service.

Our mission is to simplify access to sustainable mobility through smart vehicle management services, tailored for businesses and professionals.
Through a seamless tech platform and human-centered approach, we’re transforming the driving experience: simpler, greener, and more fluid.

 What we offer:

All-included car subscriptions for rideshare drivers (Uber, Lyft, and more)

Turnkey car-sharing systems for commercial buildings and communities

Effortless replacement and courtesy vehicle programs

Fleet management solutions for organizations of all sizes

 Whether you’re a property manager, a fleet operator, or a professional driver — Weeve makes access to vehicles easier, smarter, and cleaner.

 Learn more at weeve.ca or connect with us here on LinkedIn.

Name: Münchner VerkehrsVerbund
Description: Seit 1996 ist der MVV als Aufgabenträgerverbund organisiert. Im Auftrag ihrer Gesellschafter leistet die MVV GmbH einen wichtigen Beitrag für die Ausgestaltung des öffentlichen Personennahverkehrs im Großraum München. Die Verbundgesellschaft ist in vier Fachbereiche organisiert. Hinzu kommt das Consulting.

Name: Skyss
Description: Skyss is owned by Hordaland county authority. Skyss' purpose is to plan, purchase and market public transport services. Contracts for the operation of bus routes and the Bergen light-rail system (Bybanen) are awarded to traffic companies via tender competitions. Skyss is responsible for planning itineraries, developing ticket systems, information and marketing.

Name: Conecta Mobility
Description: "Somos la empresa de transporte urbano que te mueve con propósito, conectando tu camino con la ciudad.”

Name: Oxford Bus Company
Description: Oxford Bus Company operate local bus and coach services in and around Oxfordshire. We are part of Go-Ahead Group Ltd, an international transport group and one of the UK's leading public transport providers. We place great importance on partnership, adopting a collaborative approach with local governments, local communities and strategic partners, and we are committed to providing our communities with affordable and sustainable travel.

Name: TTC Soluções em mobilidade
Description:
Há mais de 30 anos a TTC desenvolve soluções em mobilidade urbana e regional com os mais altos padrões de qualidade.

Fundada por técnicos pioneiros do setor no Brasil, a TTC conta com profissionais atuantes nas áreas de Engenharia, Arquitetura e Urbanismo e know how de trabalhos realizados em entidades e órgãos de projeção nacional e internacional, tanto do setor público como privado.

A TTC Engenharia possuí as mais modernas ferramentas e tecnologias para a realização, cada vez mais sustentável, dos projetos de nossos clientes. E, além disso, estamos sempre à frente no mercado, conectados com as principais tendências e lançamentos em equipamentos e soluções. Isso porque nosso objetivo é estar sempre aperfeiçoando e atualizando nossos colaboradores, numa contínua valorização do elemento humano de seu corpo técnico.

Name: ATM Group - France
Description:
Le groupe ATM est un opérateur européen de transports publics. Historiquement implanté à Milan, le groupe est présent en Europe, à Copenhague au Danemark et à Thessalonique en Grèce. 

Le groupe ATM en Europe, ce sont 11 000 collaborateurs mobilisés pour permettre à près de 3 millions de personnes de se déplacer chaque jour.  Fort de son expertise européenne, le groupe crée en 2024 son bureau ATM FRANCE pour apporter sa contribution au développement du réseau de transports publics francilien, l’un des réseaux les plus riches et denses au monde.

ATM FRANCE s’engage à offrir aux Français des services de transports publics fiables, sécurisés, durables et accessibles.

Plus d’informations sur notre site.

Name: Sindiônibus
Description:
O Sindicato das Empresas de Transporte de Passageiros do Estado do Ceará (Sindiônibus) foi constituído pelos empresários das empresas de ônibus de Fortaleza e Região Metropolitana para fins de estudo, coordenação, proteção e representação dos interesses da classe econômica na área de transporte coletivo.

A nossa missão é representar o setor de transporte coletivo urbano e metropolitano de Fortaleza, contribuindo para o desenvolvimento das empresas associadas e da sociedade e para a preservação do meio ambiente.

Name: Taxina Mobility Pvt Ltd
Description:
At Taxina, we're building more than a ride-hailing app — we’re creating a fairer, people-first mobility ecosystem where both drivers and passengers matter.

 For Drivers:
We believe that those who drive the city forward deserve more. That’s why Taxina runs on a zero-commission model, allowing drivers to keep 100% of their earnings. Through a simple Daily/Monthly subscription, they gain full access to our platform — no hidden charges. It's a franchise-style opportunity that puts control back into their hands.

 For Passengers:
We offer affordable, transparent fares, without the usual surge pricing. When you ride with Taxina, you're not just booking a cab — you're supporting a system that treats drivers fairly and keeps the focus on reliable, respectful service.

 Where We Operate:
Currently active in Chennai, Salem, Tiruppur, Erode, and Coimbatore, and soon to be all over TN.

Name: Almosafer Taxi | تكسي المسافر
Description: تكسي المسافر للنقل  من والى مطار بغداد الدولي

Name: Hail Electric Mobility
Description:
Where luxury meets sustainability!
Experience zero cancellation & no surge in price.

Name: glide.io
Description:
We are part of Mobilize, a Renault Group brand reinventing mobility for individuals and professionals worldwide. 

Since 2015, our digital carsharing and fleet management solution has been powered by our own innovative technology and platform.

By helping people and businesses optimize their mobility,  we’re rethinking and transforming the automotive industry – 
actively reducing carbon emissions one shared car at a time.

Name: AUTOGIRL
Description:
Autogirl is a mobility startup company that aims to make mobility easy and efficient in Nigeria. We aim to make access to quality mobility services main stream.

Our offerings are:
Vehicles Sales
Vehicles Rentals
Maintainance and Diagnosis

Name: Connecting Stockholm
Description: Connecting Stockholm är ett lokalt bolag som är skräddarsytt för att driva Stockholms tunnelbana. Bolaget har bildats via ett samarbete mellan två internationella kollektivtrafikkoncerner – brittiska Go-Ahead och singaporianska ComfortDelGro. I Connecting Stockholm förenas lokal expertis med global kunskap och inspiration från de två ägarbolagen. Den 2 november 2025 tar Connecting Stockholm från MTR över driften av tunnelbanan inklusive fordonsunderhåll och kundmiljö.

Name: Rápido Araguaia
Description: Rápido Araguaia is an executive office company based out of 260 R. Pres. Juscelino Kubitscheck - Jardim Pres., Goiânia, Brazil.

Name: ULTIMO project
Description:
The EU-project ULTIMO seeks to set the foundations and deploy the very first economically viable large scale, on-demand and user-oriented AV public transportation services.

By taking a holistic approach to AV deployment that considers all elements in a cross-sector business environment, ULTIMO wants to truly unlock the integration of AVs into cities with on-demand and door-to-door services that will allow for more sustainable, accessible and inclusive mobility.

With Deutsche Bahn at the helm, ULTIMO joins 23 partners from eight European countries for a period of four years.

Name: GVBus - Sindicato das Empresas de Transporte Metropolitano da Grande Vitória
Description:
O Sindicato das Empresas de Transporte Metropolitano da Grande Vitória (GVBus) representa as 10 empresas operadoras do Sistema Transcol: Praia Sol, Vereda, Serramar, Serrana, Expresso Santa Paula, Santa Zita, Nova, Grande Vitória, Unimar e Satélite.

O GVBus também representa dois consórcios integrantes do transporte metropolitano: os consórcios Atlântico Sul e Sudoeste, responsáveis pela operação do Sistema Transcol.

Essas empresas empregam cerca de 7,1 mil pessoas de forma direta, entre motoristas, fiscais, mecânicos e funcionários administrativos, que fazem todos os dias um trabalho contínuo para atender aos cidadãos.

No total, são transportados cerca de 14,6 milhões de passageiros/mês, sendo percorrido 113,2 milhões de quilômetros/mês.

Name: Fondation Modus
Description:
Le 21e siècle sera marqué par le défi imposé par le changement climatique. En Suisse, le secteur des transports représente aujourd’hui 31% des émissions contre 24% dans le monde. La mobilité constitue donc 30% du problème mais également 30% de la solution. La Fondation Modus a pour vocation de participer à relever le défi de la décarbonation en soutenant les acteurs de Genève pour atteindre l’objectif 0 carbone à l’horizon 2050.

La Fondation Modus prend le parti d’agir à l’échelle locale en se positionnant comme un accélérateur du changement et un soutien aux acteurs déjà en place. Ce soutien se matérialise à travers des interventions concrètes sur le territoire et auprès des habitant·e·s du Canton de Genève.

Name: Sindh Mass Transit Authority
Description:
The Sindh Mass Transit Authority (SMTA) was established in October 2017 under the Sindh Mass Transit Authority Act, 2014, under the administrative control of the Government of Sindh, Transport and Mass Transit Department (T&MTD). It has a province wide remit and is responsible for the management and delivery of the Transport Master Plan 2030, developed by the Government of Sindh, with the assistance of the Japan International Cooperation Agency (JICA).
Vision
“Our vision is to move people – not just vehicles – by providing a mass transit system for Karachi, and ultimately the province of Sindh, that is efficient, sustainable both economically and environmentally, and allows all those who need, or want to travel, to do so affordably, safely and with dignity.”
Mission:
To deliver and manage this integrated mass transit system, catering to the needs of the ever expanding travelling public and helping Karachi become a world class city.

Name: Green On
Description:
Expert en vélo-mobilité, Green On vous conseille, vous fournit et assure le suivi de tous vos projets vélo ! Location longue durée de vélos électriques, vélopartage, bornes de recharge, installation de solutions de stationnement et d’abri : Green On vous accompagne dans la promotion du vélo auprès de vos usagers pour l’implanter dans votre organisation.

Conçue comme une solution clé en main et sur-mesure, l’offre de vélopartage à assistance électrique proposée par Green On inclut de nombreux services. 

- Installation des bornes
- Fourniture des vélos
- Réservation possible des vélos deux heures avant le départ souhaité, via un portail web dédié et personnalisé
- Pré-réservation des vélos plusieurs jours en avance via le portail web 
- Reporting afin de connaitre l'évolution de l'utilisation des vélos
- Des badges permettant le déverrouillage des vélos  - compatibles avec ceux de votre entreprise sous conditions.

A destination des entreprises, les collectivités et les acteurs du tourisme qui souhaitent optimiser leurs déplacements, nous proposons le VAE en libre service, car le vélopartage se positionne en solution idéale pour répondre aux obligations des Plans de Mobilité (PDM) ainsi qu'aux grandes problématiques : santé au travail, mobilité en ville, sécurité, environnement de qualité, stationnement facile, plaisir de se déplacer… Le vélo apparaît comme un mode de déplacement idéal pour répondre à tous ces enjeux à la fois.

#vélo #VAE #vélopartage #ebike #véloélectrique #LLD #services #événements #mobilierurbain #mobilité #durable

Name: C-TRAN
Description:
C-TRAN provides safe, efficient and reliable public transportation in Clark County and the Vancouver-Portland region. Our service includes Local bus routes within Clark County, Regional and Express routes to Portland, on-demand rideshare service The Current and C-VAN paratransit service for passengers with disabilities. C-TRAN also launched the region's first bus rapid transit system, The Vine on Fourth Plain, in 2017, and a second bus rapid transit line, The Vine on Mill Plain, in 2023.

In 2019 and 2022, C-TRAN was named North American Transit System of the Year by the American Public Transportation Association.

At C-TRAN, we believe we are more than just a transit agency. We are community stewards, tasked with making Clark County a better place to live and work. This is Our Community, Our Promise.

Name: OT Trans
Description:
A Empresa OTIMA TRANSPORTES DE SALVADOR S/A SPE - OTTRANS é concessionária do Sistema de Transporte Público de Salvado iniciando suas atividades em 22 de abril de 2015. 

Atualmente opera com uma frota de 1034 ônibus no sistema convencional e o sistema do BRT com 20 ônibus Padrón e 05 ônibus Elétricos, distribuída em 6 garagens.

São 5420 colaboradores trabalhando para uma melhor mobilidade urbana na cidade. Operamos 160 linhas, percorrendo aproximadamente 230.000 quilômetros diariamente, transportando em média 530.000 passageiros por dia.

Utilizamos modernos sistemas de planejamento operacional e de logística de transporte. Toda a frota é equipada com sistema de GPS possibilitando o acompanhamento em tempo real de nossa operação através de um moderno Centro de Controle Operacional que atua na gestão da operação e fornece informações para os usuários, facilitando a mobilidade por ônibus e suas integrações.

Nossa empresa tem compromisso com o meio ambiente, com o social e com a governança, implementando serviços e oportunidades. 

O nosso propósito é prezar por um ambiente de trabalho inclusivo, plural, que valoriza a ética, o respeito e a igualdade de oportunidade a todos.

A OT TRANS está em busca de talentos que queiram vir fazer a diferença e somar ao nosso time! Já pensou em fazer parte de um time que contribui para a transformação da mobilidade em Salvador? 

Se identifica conosco? Inscreva-se no site: www.ottrans.com.br

Name: sasa
Description:
sasa is the largest local public transport company in the Autonomous Province of Bolzano.
It offers its service to more than 20 million passengers a year in the municipalities of Bolzano, Laives and Merano.
From 14 November 2021 it has also started the management of about 30 suburban lines, expanding its fleet and its service range.
With hydrogen, electric and hybrid buses, sasa relies on innovative technologies to make sustainable urban transport possible today. It is also involved in several pilot projects for the study and development of innovative forms of mobility. Founded in 1948, sasa is today a joint-stock company and since 2017 has been operating in compliance with the requirements of current legislation on in-house providing.

Name: Stowarzyszenie Tak dla CPK
Description:
Jesteśmy jedynym oficjalnym profilem Stowarzyszenia Tak dla CPK – organizacji społecznej i eksperckiej, której celem jest wspieranie budowy Centralnego Portu Komunikacyjnego jako kluczowego projektu infrastrukturalnego dla Polski. 

Nasza misja to:
 Wspieranie innowacji i rozwoju – działamy na rzecz nowoczesnej infrastruktury transportowej i logistycznej, łącząc ludzi, regiony i rynki.
 Promowanie zrównoważonego rozwoju – stawiamy na harmonijne połączenie postępu gospodarczego i ochrony środowiska.
 Edukacja i transparentność – zapewniamy rzetelne informacje o postępach Programu CPK, dbając o przejrzystość inwestycji.

Dołącz do nas, by być na bieżąco z najważniejszymi informacjami o CPK, poznać nasze analizy i dowiedzieć się, jak wspólnie możemy przyspieszyć rozwój Polski.

L’expérience numérique est également au cœur de notre offre avec l’application Moovizy et des solutions de paiement dématérialisées.

Sous l’autorité de Saint-Étienne Métropole, qui définit la politique de mobilité de l’agglomération, le réseau STAS est exploité par Transdev Saint-Étienne dans le cadre d’une délégation de service public. En tant que filiale du groupe Transdev, nous contribuons à un modèle de mobilité durable, accessible et intégré.

Name: Navocap
Description:
Créée en 1989, Navocap est reconnue pour son savoir-faire et sa capacité d’innovation. 

Au fil des années, son équipe de 60 personnes est devenue experte dans la fourniture de solutions d’aide à la mobilité nécessitant la maitrise de la conception, de la fabrication et de l'installation d’équipements embarqués, de réseaux de radiocommunication et de centres d’exploitation.

Son chiffre d'affaires 2012 est de 5 millions d’euros.

Depuis le 8 juillet 2016, Navocap a rejoint Ratp Smart Systems, filiale de la RATP spécialisée dans les systèmes de billettique et d'information voyageurs.

L'offre :  

Hopen Go est un système d’aide à l’exploitation et d’information voyageurs complet, doté de fonctionnalités modulaires et évolutives. La souplesse de la solution permet de répondre à vos exigences et de s’adapter à vos contraintes. Le système d’aide à l’exploitation accroit rapidement la performance de l’offre commerciale tout en optimisant les coûts d’exploitation.
Véritable plateforme embarquée, le calculateur Thelma, conçu et produit en France, fait preuve d’une technologie innovante. S’adaptant aux périphériques déjà en place, l’outil est prévu pour évoluer avec votre réseau. Il est configuré à partir de fonctionnalités dynamiques très poussées et répond aussi bien aux enjeux de mobilité urbaine qu’aux besoins d’exploitation.
Un réseau plus dynamique et plus fiable, c’est un réseau plus utilisé. C’est aussi une meilleure qualité de vie pour les voyageurs, un environnement mieux préservé et une image renforcée de réseaux avant-gardistes tournés vers l’avenir. Hopen Go contribue ainsi à accroître l’attractivité et l’accessibilité de votre réseau de transport.

Name: TEVX

Imagine um futuro onde as ruas são mais silenciosas, o ar mais limpo e as cidades mais conectadas. Essa visão é o que impulsiona a TEVX Motors Group. Estamos aqui para transformar essa realidade com soluções integradas de cidades inteligentes, trazendo uma linha inovadora de veículos elétricos — vans, ônibus e caminhões de diversas dimensões — que utilizam tecnologias de ponta, como Bateria de última geração, Ultra Capacitor e Hidrogênio. Além de fornecer toda infraestrutura customizada para cada projeto.

Nosso compromisso vai além de apenas representar essas tecnologias avançadas. Criamos um impacto positivo na mobilidade urbana e rodoviária do Brasil. Estamos determinados a introduzir soluções sustentáveis e resilientes que atendam às necessidades do presente, sem comprometer o futuro. Com cada veículo que trazemos ao mercado, estamos moldando um novo capítulo na história do transporte, onde eficiência e responsabilidade ambiental caminham lado a lado.

Name: Moove
Description:
Il nostro obiettivo principale è incorporare nella vita di tutti i giorni una forma di mobilità sostenibile, accessibile a tutti e basata sulla condivisione.

Operiamo in 20 città europee, offrendo una flotta di veicoli completamente elettrici e a emissioni zero, tra cui biciclette, monopattini e scooter. Questi mezzi sono distribuiti in modo diffuso nelle città e sono a disposizione sia dei residenti che dei visitatori.

Per usufruire dei nostri servizi, è sufficiente scaricare l'app dedicata, attivare la geolocalizzazione e prenotare il veicolo più vicino a te. Offriamo una gamma di tariffe flessibili tra cui scegliere, tra cui l'opzione oraria, giornaliera e abbonamenti mensili.

I nostri servizi sono attivi in modo automatico 24/7, e abbiamo un assistente virtuale sempre disponibile per rispondere alle tue domande e fornire assistenza.

Ti invitiamo a visitare il nostro sito web all'indirizzo www.moove.it per scoprire i dettagli dei nostri abbonamenti e non farti sfuggire le nostre offerte speciali!

Name: Vertical Unity
Description:
Vertical Unity is on a mission to connect the disconnected. We build integration layers, intelligence tools, and real-time platforms for industries that move people, goods, and infrastructure.

From public transit to airlines, trucking, and logistics-heavy manufacturing, our focus is vertical industries where legacy systems, siloed data, and manual processes still dominate.

We believe better visibility leads to better decisions and that the future belongs to data-informed operators, not spreadsheets and swivel-chair workflows.

Name: Moove
Description:
At MOOVE, we believe the future of mobility is sustainable, shared, and accessible to everyone. 

Our mission? To make getting around the city simpler, more fun, and most importantly, green! 

We offer flexible and affordable micro-mobility solutions with electric vehicles like scooters, bikes, and e-scooters, ready to take you wherever you need to go, without the hassle and without harming the environment.

We operate in 20 cities across Europe, and it’s super easy to get started: download our app, activate geolocation, choose your preferred vehicle, and you're ready to go! 

Whether for an hour, a day, or with a monthly subscription, MOOVE gives you the freedom to move at the right price.

With us, every ride is a small step toward a greener future. Because changing the world starts with your daily commute!

Hop on with MOOVE.

Name: Moove
Description:
Ciao! Siamo un’azienda Italiana che si occupa di micromobilità condivisa in più di 20 città d’Europa.

Per utilizzare i nostri mezzi ti basterà scaricare l’app, successivamente in base alle tue esigenze potrai prendere in prestito: bici, scooter o monopattini elettrici.

Il nostro obiettivo è quello di creare un sistema di mobilità sostenibile, mettendo il rispetto dell’ambiente al primo posto.

Inoltre crediamo fortemente che le città debbano avere dei servizi alla portata di tutti, per questo ci impegniamo per offrire dei pacchetti a prezzi convenienti.

Name: Moove
Description:
MOOVE è un'azienda leader nella micro-mobilità condivisa, attiva in 20 città europee con una flotta di veicoli elettrici – bici, scooter e monopattini – che rendono la mobilità urbana accessibile e sostenibile per cittadini e turisti. 
Fondata nel 2020 per rivoluzionare gli spostamenti in città, MOOVE ha saputo crescere rapidamente grazie a un servizio intuitivo e tecnologico che permette di noleggiare veicoli in pochi clic tramite app, con tariffe flessibili. 
I nostri valori – sostenibilità, innovazione e responsabilità sociale – guidano ogni aspetto della nostra attività e promuovono una cultura aziendale fondata sulla collaborazione e sul miglioramento continuo. 
Guardiamo al futuro con l’obiettivo di espanderci e diventare un partner di riferimento per le città e le aziende, offrendo soluzioni di mobilità su misura che migliorano la qualità della vita urbana e riducono traffico e inquinamento. Abbiamo una flotta completamente elettrica, un approccio personalizzato e tecnologia avanzata, rappresentando un'alternativa affidabile e innovativa nel settore della micro-mobilità condivisa. 

Per saperne di più, visita il nostro sito web e seguici sui social.

Name: Moove
Description:
Noi siamo Moove, una società leader nel settore della micro mobilità condivisa.

La nostra missione è quella di fornire soluzioni di micro mobilità 
che siano flessibili, convenienti e rispettose dell'ambiente.

Abbiamo a disposizione numerose flotte di veicoli elettrici, tra cui monopattini, e-bike e scooter elettrici, disponibili in 20 città europee comprese Milano e Roma.

I nostri veicoli sono parcheggiati nelle principali città europee e sono a disposizione per cittadini e turisti. 

Per utilizzare uno dei nostri veicoli devi scaricare l’app, attivare la geolocalizzazione e prenotare il mezzo desiderato più vicino. 

Puoi scegliere diversi piani di noleggio tra cui tariffa oraria, giornaliera o abbonamento mensile.

Scarica l'app attraverso il nostro sito web o nel tuo app store del telefono!

Name: Moove
Description:
Moove è un'azienda leader nel settore della micro mobilità condivisa. Opera dal 2018 e in tutti questi anni di attività è riuscita a portare i suoi mezzi elettrici in ben 20 città dell'Europa. 
Nasce da un sogno e un ideale, ovvero quello di portare la mobilità sostenibile e condivisa nella vita quotidiana di tutte le persone. La fondatrice di Moove è nata e cresciuta in una grande città dove spostarsi in macchina era praticamente impossibile, quindi doveva sempre usare diversi mezzi, tra cui tram, metro o bus. Il suo sogno era quello di poter materializzare la sua bici quando doveva andare a lavoro e doveva aspettare il tram, o durante le sue passeggiate in città. Questo suo desiderio l'ha spinta a dare vita a Moove, app che consente a cittadini e turisti di prenotare facilmente il mezzo più vicino a loro, scegliendo tra bici elettrica, monopattino elettrico o scooter elettrico.

Name: MB Mobility
Description:
PROPÓSITO
Facilitar una alternativa de transporte sostenible, cómoda y accesible para toda la población de Sitges, con especial atención a jóvenes de 10 a 22 años y adultos mayores de 50 a 85 años, promoviendo la inclusión, el bienestar y la autonomía en sus desplazamientos diarios.

MISIÓN
Implementar la primera red de bicicletas eléctricas y convencionales en Sitges, distribuidas estratégicamente por la población, para fomentar la movilidad sostenible, la actividad física y la conexión entre los diferentes barrios y servicios esenciales, con un enfoque inclusivo para todos los residentes.

VISIÓN
Convertirnos en una solución de movilidad urbana de referencia en Sitges, logrando un alcance óptimo y asequible para toda la población, mediante la creación de rutas y estaciones que conecten de forma eficiente viviendas con colegios, centros de salud, servicios públicos y zonas de ocio como las playas.

Name: MUEVT Taranto
Description:
L’ambizioso progetto TARANTO-M.U.E.V.T.! – Mobilità Urbana Ecosostenibile per la Valorizzazione del Territorio -, nasce nell’ambito del Programma sperimentale nazionale di mobilità sostenibile casa-scuola e casa-lavoro (Legge 28 dicembre 2015, n.221) con i fondi ottenuti dal Comune di Taranto e intende dare seguito a iniziative di mobilità sul territorio. Un progetto concreto promosso dal Comune di Taranto in partenariato con AMAT (Azienda per la mobilità nell’area urbana di Taranto), UNIBA, GREENROAD, MASHMALLOW, e INGREEN, che si concentra nelle zone del centro storico e del Borgo, e punta ad alleggerire il traffico privato, ridurre le emissioni che ne derivano, migliorare l’esperienza quotidiana e la vivibilitàà della città.

Azioni che rafforzeranno in termini tecnologici il trasporto pubblico locale, come una piattaforma di monitoraggio del territorio, dei servizi ad esso correlati e delle infrastrutture di mobilità, utilizzo di big data a supporto e strumenti per il monitoraggio ambientale della qualità dell’aria e servizi di messaggistica per le comunicazioni a cluster di cittadini coinvolti nella sperimentazione durante le fasi rilevanti del progetto. TARANTO-M.U.E.V.T.! prevede inoltre interventi di informazione e sensibilizzazione dei bambini in età scolare su tematiche di sicurezza stradale attraverso piattaforme di didattica digitale per le scuole all’interno dei quartieri interessati dal progetto, giochi digitali in forma di applicazioni mobili, laboratori di ascolto e corsi di sicurezza stradale.

Description:

Chi Siamo:
Moove è un'azienda leader nella micro mobilità condivisa, impegnata a trasformare la tua esperienza di spostamento urbano. Con servizi disponibili in 20 città europee, offriamo una gamma di mezzi elettrici, tra cui bici, scooter e monopattini, per rendere i tuoi viaggi più flessibili, convenienti e rispettosi dell'ambiente.

La Nostra Vision:
La nostra visione è quella di integrare nella vita quotidiana una mobilità sostenibile, condivisa e alla portata di tutti. Vogliamo ridefinire il concetto di spostamento urbano, contribuendo a una città più verde e a un futuro in cui la mobilità è al servizio di tutti.

Come Funziona:
I nostri mezzi sono liberamente parcheggiati in città e sono a disposizione di cittadini e turisti. Scarica l'app, attiva la geolocalizzazione e prenota il mezzo più vicino. Scegli tra tariffa oraria, giornaliera o abbonamento mensile per personalizzare la tua esperienza di mobilità.

Perché Moove:

Sostenibilità Ambientale: Contribuisci a un ambiente più pulito con i nostri mezzi elettrici.
Flessibilità: Scegli tra una varietà di mezzi per adattarti alle tue esigenze di viaggio.
Convenienza: Tariffe competitive e opzioni di pagamento flessibili.
Innovazione: Stiamo guidando il cambiamento nella micro mobilità con soluzioni all'avanguardia.
Unisciti a noi nella trasformazione del modo in cui ci muoviamo!
Seguici per rimanere aggiornato su nuove città, partnership e iniziative per una mobilità più intelligente e sostenibile.

Name: Anygo Technologies
Description:
We’re building the future of effortless city travel.

Every urban commuter knows the struggle — juggling multiple apps, tickets, and modes of transport just to get from point A to B. AnyGo changes that.

We are a Mobility-as-a-Service (MaaS) platform that unifies public transport, EVs, cabs, bikes, and parking into one seamless experience.
With a single ticket and intelligent route planning, AnyGo gets you anywhere in the city — combining the best options based on your preferences: fastest, cheapest, or greenest.

Our mission is simple yet bold:
 Make travel effortless for people, efficient for cities, and sustainable for the planet.

 What We Offer:

End-to-End Journey Planning: Connects first and last mile to major transit systems.

Single-Ticket Payment System: No more multiple bookings — one tap covers all.

EV & Parking Integration: Smart charging and parking recommendations for hybrid trips.

Dynamic Route Optimization: AI-powered suggestions based on time, cost, or carbon footprint.

City & Operator Partnerships: APIs for public transport agencies and mobility operators.

 Our Impact:

Reduces city congestion and commute stress.

Lowers carbon emissions through shared mobility.

Enables data-driven smart city planning.

We’re here to help cities breathe easier, travelers move smarter, and partners grow faster.

 Currently preparing to expand our pilot deployments and inviting early investors, city collaborators, and tech innovators to join the journey.

Name: EVSpot
Description:
EVSpot is at the forefront of mapping Kenya's rapidly evolving Electric Vehicle (EV) charging infrastructure, playing a crucial role in the nation's transition towards sustainable transportation.

The Challenge We Address:
As the adoption of electric vehicles gains momentum in Kenya, the lack of readily available, reliable, and comprehensive information on charging stations presents a significant barrier. This uncertainty affects EV drivers' confidence ("range anxiety") and complicates effective planning for infrastructure expansion.

Our Platform, Products & Services:
EVSpot directly addresses this challenge through our core offering:

A Comprehensive, Dynamic Mapping Platform: This user-friendly, interactive map serves as Kenya's central, go-to resource for EV charging information. It provides crucial details needed by drivers and planners alike.
Accurate Charging Station Data: Our primary service is the provision of detailed and up-to-date information on charging points across the country. This includes:
Precise locations
Charger types and specifications (e.g., AC/DC, connector types, power output)
Operational status and availability (where data permits)
Access details (public, private, tariffs if known)
User-submitted reviews and photos.
Community-Powered Verification: What makes EVSpot unique is our reliance on a robust, community-driven approach. We empower EV drivers, enthusiasts, and station owners across Kenya to contribute, verify, and update information, ensuring the platform reflects the real-world situation accurately and promptly.
Our Mission & Vision:
Our mission is to eliminate range anxiety and make owning and driving an electric vehicle in Kenya practical, convenient, and reliable. We envision a future where EVSpot seamlessly connects drivers to the charging network, accelerating the nationwide shift to cleaner electric mobility and supporting Kenya's sustainable development goals.

Who We Serve:
EVSpot provides value to a wide range of stakeholder

Name: Roost - Scale Scooter Parking
Description:
Roost - Smart Infrastructure for Urban Mobility

Urban mobility is evolving, and with it comes the need for efficient solutions to organize public spaces. At Roost, we help businesses, cities, and retailers manage electric scooter parking in a safe and organized way. We facilitate the transition towards more structured and sustainable cities.

What Do We Do?
We design and install smart parking solutions for scooters, optimizing space usage and improving security in streets, shopping centers, transport stations, businesses, and universities.

Our Solutions:
 Nido H70 – Compact and modular parking with a secure locking system.
 Percha T4 – Vertical storage for up to four scooters, ideal for maximizing space.
 Percha T2 – A compact and functional solution for smaller spaces.

Why Choose Roost?
 Reducing urban clutter – We prevent disorganization and promote structured public spaces.
  Security & efficiency – We protect scooters from theft and vandalism.

Name: CompanyMoove
Description:
Da dove nasce l'idea?
La fondatrice nasce in una grande città dove per spostarsi senza macchina si alternano diversi mezzi differenti: tram, metro, bus. 
Ha sempre sognato di poter far materializzare la sua bici in giro per la città nei tratti a piedi o quando non voleva aspettare il tram. Con questa idea, ha creato Moove.

Vision
Integrare nella vita quotidiana una mobilità sostenibile, condivisa e alla portata di tutti.

Mission
Fornire soluzioni di micromobilità che siano flessibili, convenienti e rispettose dell'ambiente.

Chi siamo?
Moove è un’azienda leader nella micro mobilità condivisa. I loro mezzi sono disponibili in 20 città europee. I mezzi messi a disposizione sono bici, scooter e monopattini, tutti elettrici.

Come funziona?
I mezzi sono liberamente parcheggiati in città e sono a disposizione di cittadini e turisti. Per utilizzare un mezzo è necessario scaricare l’app, attivare la geolocalizzazione e prenotare il mezzo desiderato più vicino. Si può scegliere tra tariffa oraria, giornaliera o abbonamento mensile.

Name: Letubevert
Description:
Le projet Letubevert est une solution innovante et écologique pour la mobilité des travailleurs automobilistes en Île-de-France. Il consiste à proposer des trajets mutualisés en car aux automobilistes qui se rendent quotidiennement sur leur lieu de travail, afin de réduire les émissions de gaz à effet de serre, de fluidifier le trafic routier et de favoriser le bien-être des usagers.

Les avantages notables du projet Letubevert sont multiples :

- Réduction de l'empreinte carbone : En remplaçant les voitures individuelles par des cars collectifs, le projet contribue à la lutte contre le réchauffement climatique et à la préservation de l'environnement.
- Atténuation des embouteillages : En diminuant le nombre de véhicules sur les routes, le projet participe à l'amélioration de la circulation et à la réduction des nuisances sonores et de la pollution de l'air.
- Bien-être des travailleurs : En offrant une alternative pratique et économique, le projet améliore la qualité de vie des usagers, qui gagnent du temps, de l'argent et de la sérénité.
- Desserte de tous les territoires : Le projet se distingue des autres solutions de mobilité urbaine par sa capacité à desservir toutes les communes, y compris les plus petites et les plus isolées, contrairement aux offres qui se concentrent principalement sur les grandes agglomérations.

Comment Letubevert se distingue des autres solutions de mobilité ? 

- Le projet utilise un algorithme performant pour analyser les flux de circulation et identifier les communes de destination des travailleurs, ce qui lui permet de proposer des trajets adaptés et personnalisés.
- Nous respectons les habitudes des usagers, qui conservent leur liberté de choix, de flexibilité et d'autonomie.
- Letubevert offre plus de confort, de sécurité et de convivialité que le covoiturage classique. Letubevert s'occupe de tout, éliminant les soucis liés à la rencontre entre usagers et conducteurs ainsi que les difficultés à trouver un trajet.
